jIIplys.name: Pepinster
jIIplys.anchorsInfo:
West side:
- 3 bolts
- Small frame advisable
- Using slings:
  * Main: 2 outside bolts: sliding X from 5m + 3m sling. Extend with 2.5m
  * Backup: Middle bolt + bolt from railing: sliding X from 5m + 3m sling. Extend with 3m

East side:
- 3 bolts
- Small frame or enough padding for the rock edge
- Using slings:
  * Main: Bolt 2 + 3: sliding X from 3m sling. Extend with 1m sling
  * Backup: Bolt 1 + metal structure: Sliding X from 3m + 1m sling. Extend with 1m sling

Both sides BFK preferred/possible

6wnN9Tx.name: Bat'karé à Buzet
6wnN9Tx.description:
Nice highline, easy to acces (5min) and to rig.
We found it while climbing in the sector, but the spot is quite obvious when you walk down the path.
We rigged it after riding about 400km from Venise ! We were travelling as light as possible, that is why we did not have very thick slings and protections for the anchor.
6wnN9Tx.anchorsInfo:
Both natural anchors, one on rocks, other on trees (with deviation)
You need only protections and slings
6wnN9Tx.accessInfo:
From the river, and go up to the cliff by following the edge, 5 min.
No tracks but the way up is quite obvious

UWlwYGx.name: Unidos Somos Mais Fortes - United we´re stronger
UWlwYGx.description:
The Utiariti Falls, which is located on the Parrot River, marks the border between two indigenous communities of different ethnicities. On the left side, for those looking at the waterfall from the front, live the Parecis and on the right, the Nambikwara. Today they live in harmony, but in the past they fought for control of these lands.
From this story came the idea of ​​a line that would join the two ends of the waterfall and thus become a bridge for crossings, a symbol of unity between the two peoples.
A line that would appear where it previously seemed impossible to walk on foot and that walking would be a message that crosses and exchanges knowledge.
The line was built and the crossing completed, thus giving it the name "united we are stronger" as a dream of a future of mutual collaboration and friendship between people,
UWlwYGx.restriction: partial: You will need to be authorized by the native people who own this land, the indigenous parecis
UWlwYGx.anchorsInfo: A magical place prone to deep meditation could not have been a better choice to set up a highline and cross the abyss over the avalanche of water that rises back up.
UWlwYGx.accessInfo: You need a Guide to get to this location, get in touch if you´d like to know more at equilibrionomade@gmail.com

vLp0KDl.description: 80m line, sharing the anchor with the 60's
vLp0KDl.anchorsInfo: The shared anchors has multiple bolts, you can choose those you like the most. To access that anchor, its recommended to install some kind of security (rope...) because you have to climb a boulder to get on top of it. The other anchor its on top corner of a rock, to access the anchor you have to climb in the side, there's one plate where you can clip in. 3 bolts for the main, one for backup/tail. The plates are on the anchors, you dont have to carry it.

ZLEvOSZ.accessInfo: Access a bit complicated, take 40m of rope with you to rappel down after the rigging

yWyWmAz.name: Nedeljska južna
yWyWmAz.anchorsInfo: Tension side A: 2x tree: 4,5m and 5,5m sling to 1,5m high A-frame. Static side B: from tree 3,5m extension to tree for height.

w9spSHB.anchorsInfo: 3 SS bolts with hangers each side. Maillons or carabiners are needed. 15 m static rope for each side  are needed.

F-7E-9_.anchorsInfo: close side (Abandoned houses ) natural anchor it's a three and far side 4 bolts

AAcEVKm.name: Rusty Breakfast
AAcEVKm.description: Urbex highline in an abandoned heating plant, technically not legal, but nobody cares, there's no guard and passersby barely notice. If you rig on the very top, expect the chimneys to swing a little during leashfalls etc., but it is perfectly safe, from the bottom the swing is practically unnoticable. Very short line, but the view all over Warsaw makes it totally worth the effort.
AAcEVKm.anchorsInfo: For each anchor you need about 5-5.5 m of spansets (that is, if you want to put backup in separate weblocks on both sides, you need at least 20 m). Its really easy to go around the chimneys with a spanset, once clipped in to a ladder you can sit on the rim of the chimney and reach the other side.
AAcEVKm.accessInfo: Just climb both ladders and use a tagline to get the webbing up. The bottom of the ladder might be covered with tar to prevent people from climbing up, you can either just accept to get your hands dirty, or first climb one of the supporting pillars, and then transfer to the ladder.

ui_QSNq.anchorsInfo: Anchor east (Diamond) 4x12mm 7m from the cliff, use A-frame (2m) , west side 4x12m in 10m behind the cliff cave, use small A-frame
ui_QSNq.accessInfo: Road to Refuge de Mayen requires authorisation, ask comune and police de Leysin, inform local airport at Bex

yr6o1AW.anchorsInfo: fare side anchor is in the wall and needs to be rapped down to

o_gzV9A.accessInfo: Complex walk in, contact Adelaide Slackline group for more details.

VvZMuLM.name: Skippers Canyon, You old bitch!

Opened in January 2017 by the team Ekiwibristes.
Skippers Canyon, Queenstown 9300, New Zealand
THIS LINE IS CURRENTLY ILLEGAL!! The Queestown climbing club negotiates the access to the climbing crag next to it, hopefully it’ll be possible to walk it again.

Park right after the portal at the beginning of Skippers Canyon, walk down the gravel road to the obvious pinnacle (5x12mm expansion bolts + 2x12mm back up expansion bolts in the back slab, bring hangers).
Go across the gully, head for the slabs above you on the right (up the canyon), find 2x12mm bolts to rap down 8m slightly on the right, there are 3x12mm bolts on a vertical slab. Bring hangers.

GgAEXZm.name: DO NOT RIG THIS LINE - Read below
GgAEXZm.description:
Access is open, but sensitive at this location. No new bolts are to be placed, but most highlines can be rigged. Be sure to evaluate the integrity of the bolts before rigging. Please read the information below. 

Kjerag is a pristine natural gem with 1000m high fjords and glacier lakes. It is a very popular tourist attraction, due to the fjords and the curiosity of Kjeragbolten, a large boulder jammed between two cliff faces. (https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Kjeragbolten)

Highline have been in this area since 2010 when it was opened by a group of French highliners who placed 4 lines (~20m, 22m, 23m, and 55m) in the area around the bolt (http://highlinedatabase.blogspot.com/search?q=norway) between 2010-2012. Since then, a few more lines have been added and this site is one of the most striking and well known highline areas in the world with vertical exposures of 1000m sheer drops. 

Bolting or any other permanent change to the natural landscape is illegal in Norway without express permission of the landowner or land managers and they take this very seriously. 

The first lines were bolted without permission, as the "ask forgiveness not permission" approach was more common at that time. However, in 2016, the local tourism, climbing, and conservation organizations became aware of highline bolts being placed without permission. A line was placed by Czech slackliners across the large gap in front of Kjeragbolton. With 3000 people a day hiking to the site to take a photo, this drew too much attention. 

The local organizations initially considered banning highlining in the area. The International Slackline Association worked with these organizations to maintain access in the area. 

Currently, no new lines are to be bolted at this site. The current bolts can still be used, with the exception of the bolts placed for the line behind Kjeragbolton (marked on this map for clarity but noted as off limits). 

Additionally, the ISA has had reports of rust on the bolts of the 23m line, BASEline, which was made famous in the film, I Believe I Can Fly. Be very cautious using these bolts. If anyone is motivated to replace them, please contact the ISA at info@slacklineinternational.org for more information. 

Please see the ISA post: 
http://www.slacklineinternational.org/2016/11/update-bolting-and-highlining-in-norway/
GgAEXZm.anchorsInfo: Lines are bolted, but no new lines should be bolted in this area. Bring hangers for 12mm and 10mm bolts (see http://highlinedatabase.blogspot.com/search?q=norway for more info on the original lines).
GgAEXZm.accessInfo: It's a fairly long but beautiful uphill hike from the parking area. Look up "hiking Kjeragbolten" for information. You can camp at the top without a permit, and don't need to bring much water since the water up there is pristine and drinkable.

Invented and bolted by Pablo Beck, Paul Wieth and Lars Beck in December 2021

5Nvz0E9.accessInfo: After the long lines Spot, follow the trekking path into the forest on the right, towards Triffbahn. Walk for 10 minutes on a gravel Path, and the line will be next to the small red bridge on the right.

usamos bolts con cadenas y de los dos lados los anclajes son verticales 
del lado A se tiene que hacer un pequeño descenso en rappel para llegar al anclaje y del lado del puente se llega facilmente caminando

wlKAyS0.anchorsInfo:
3 12mm bolts for each anchor.
2 bolts on the north anchor are a bit further out and need to be redirected on the 3rd.
bring hangers.
wlKAyS0.accessInfo: South anchor needs a bit of rappelling or super careful downclimb

uEPkGPX.name: El Fauno
uEPkGPX.anchorsInfo: Se requiere un hang frame. El lado dinamico se encuentra en el este. Tiene bolts de ambos lados

5_vcYEk.name: La sbatta tra i denti
5_vcYEk.description: 3 spit dal lato scomodo 2 da 10 + 1 da 12, calarsi dalla madonnina in ferro fino alla sosta di arrampicata calarsi dalla sosta di arrampicata, si trovano 3 spit su una cengia il back up si può utilizzare uno spit dell'arrampicata qualche metro più...
5_vcYEk.anchorsInfo:
3 spit dal lato scomodo 2 da 10 + 1 da 12, calarsi dalla madonnina in ferro fino alla sosta di arrampicata calarsi dalla sosta di arrampicata, si trovano 3 spit su una cengia il back up si può utilizzare uno spit dell'arrampicata qualche metro più in alto. Sling da 3. 

il secondo ancoraggio subito sulla destra della chiesetta 3 spit visibili (necessarie portarsi le piastrine (2 da 10 ed 1 da 12 inox) sling da 3 + sling da 1 o 2 m per uscire dalla roccia.

_FyUEaJ.name: Who's line is it anyways
_FyUEaJ.description: Beautiful line over several cascading waterfalls
_FyUEaJ.anchorsInfo: Home anchor is a large pine tree with a large downed log in front of it.  We backed it up to a tree behind it. Far anchor are 3 rock wraps using 10ft spanis that are backed up to a rock wrap that is very far back. Bring lots of treepro!
_FyUEaJ.accessInfo: The waterfalls can be seen from the dirt road you drive in on.  Follow the stream on the eastern side going up to the waterfalls.  To get to the far anchor go up a bit further and cross directly over the falls.

q69VXPi.description: De chaque coté, 3 points pour la force + 2 points pour le backup. Équipement sur broches (peinte en jaune)
q69VXPi.anchorsInfo: De chaque coté, 3 points pour la force + 2 points pour le backup. Équipement sur broches (peinte en jaune).

947J2LN.name: NN
947J2LN.accessInfo: Very easy acces to both anchors.

2E2YNgA.name: W zasadzie niegroźna
2E2YNgA.description: Beautiful line, you can take some good photos there.
2E2YNgA.anchorsInfo:
1. side - big stone with a hole (3 m sling) + 8 m sling for a backup (bolt)
2. side - 2-3 sling holes (2+2+1+3+1,5 m) + 2 m sling for a backup (bolt)
2E2YNgA.accessInfo: 1. side path, 2. side you have to climb 6a+ route or take a risky ridge

2ygR7i3.name: Straße der Kunst
2ygR7i3.description:
Longest Urban Highline, from Churchtower to a platform over the city of Meran!
During Streetart festival "Asfaltart" 2016

_V_6amt.name: Tree Hugger
_V_6amt.description: A great, short line that's begging to be rigged on tight nylon! You'll want some pulleys for this line because you'll need a good bit of tension to keep the line off the edge as the anchor tree on the west side is 20ft from the edge. In addition, the line runs quite close to a side wall so a tight line will keep you and your friends from hitting during a wild whip. Also, beware of the no fall zone next to a tree which leans off the rim to within 4ft off the line. This tree is the inspiration for the line's name: "tree hugger".
_V_6amt.anchorsInfo: Spansets off trees, we felt safer using a master point off two trees on the east side.
_V_6amt.accessInfo: Walk up, along rim of the hollow

qBQN08f.name: Windy Cave
qBQN08f.description: The first highline on Karpathos rigged in October 2021
qBQN08f.accessInfo: Park near Finniki and go uphill on the left side of United climbing sector and then cross to the cave. To the anchor on ridge you can go more uphill and then to the edge. Go down by easy terrain few meters and you will find bolt to descent and probably see from there bolts for anchor

Cf9NLvS.name: Gertrude’s Cooperative Crew (GCC)
Cf9NLvS.description:
An amazing line, very exposed not only by its height but also side exposure, on both side. From the line you can see the village and even the sea ! It’s also a quite, wild place. A lot of shadow in the canyon, can be cold in the winter. Quite a difficult access and rigging, you should go there for a few days in a row and with a good team :)

Open by : Moritz Wohlauf, Laetitia Gonnon, Maurice Ammann, in February 2016
Cf9NLvS.anchorsInfo:
When looking at the sea/village, right anchor : 4 bolts of 12mm for a master point and 1 extra for a general back up 5m away on a vertical rock. The 4 bolts are on the ground on the rocks. Bring a lot of padding and about 6m slings and the plates. 
Left anchor : 4 bolts of 12mm, + 1 removing bolt 4m away. 4-5m slings is enough to make a master point on the 4 bolts.

Picture of the right anchor when watching towards the sea. No picture of the other anchor sorry.
Cf9NLvS.accessInfo:
Park at the top of the St Niklas Monastery, then walk the way up to the canyon. Continue in the river bed, then follow a path of the left for the anchor of the right side (when looking at the sea). After 15min walk, once you are very far from the canyon and you can see the hill with the flag, leave the path and continue to the left (there is a biginning of a path but it stops quickly). At this point you should be in a new small canyon (mini river bed), walk « up » on the left until you reach the plateau. Then, walk 10min through the bushes and on the rocks. It’s hard to find the anchor, they are high above the top of the climbing route called Leptospirosi.

On the other side (left side when looking at the sea), there was no path but we made one, if it still exist follow it during 15min until you reach the top of the cliff. The bolts are above a climbing route called Agios Nikolaos. There is one removing bolt to rappel down on slippery days. If not slippery, you can down climb 2m to a platform where the bolt are. There is a little tree at this place (not sure if you can rappel on it, though…).

ilynbqY.name: Cheddar Pinnacle Highline (BANNED)
ilynbqY.description:
The highest inland cliffs in the UK and home to one of the most epic highlines, 
unfortunately the restrictions in place by Longleat Enterprises stop anyone from rigging this line in the future..

4G2_Vwy.name: River of Snot
4G2_Vwy.description:
Established ?

Fairly well sheltered line. Relatively simple tagging, requires throwing tag to quarry floor and managing a few small but spiky shrubs. Possibility of up to 4(?) parallel lines, with at least 10m separation
4G2_Vwy.restriction:
none: Disused quarry regularly used by climbers, access status unknown.
Potentially nesting peregrine falcons March - August.
4G2_Vwy.anchorsInfo: Several good tree options both sides
4G2_Vwy.accessInfo:
Either park in a small lay-by on Farnsley Lane at the North of the quarry, follow the vague path into the quarry then up moderate terrain to the south east anchor.
Or park off Middleton Lane at the southern tip for a shorter walk to the south east anchor.

MCtGc0d.name: La salvaje del oeste
MCtGc0d.description:
Wild wild west. 6 mms
No usar parabolt. Caminando, preguntamelo

36YkRQq.name: Leashfall Lover
36YkRQq.description:
Side of climbing Sector: two glue-in bolts, may be backed up on questionable tufa.
Hillside: Three glue-in bolts on big rock in the bushes
36YkRQq.anchorsInfo: Bolted with glue both sides in beginning of 2022
36YkRQq.accessInfo: Go to HADA at the far right end of the cave. For the other side you cross the canyon

WkTIGgX.name: Cech
WkTIGgX.description: One of the first lines of UHF

HPyejMH.description: Cool short line. But not existing anymore, because they build a hanging bridge directly where it was. Maybe there is a possibility of rigging new one next to the bridge.

_D6UO3M.description:
For details contact Andrei or Matei from Slacksylvania
 slacksylvania@gmail.com or on fb https://www.facebook.com/slacksylvania/

nARdrg-.name: La Puta
nARdrg-.description: I think it’s around 69m but I’m not to sure. Enjoy the beach and don’t forget your fishing rod. During high tide the headland becomes an island
nARdrg-.anchorsInfo:
Static side rigged off the group of pohutukawa using spansets or static rope leading to a branch that you good use as a frame. It’s a sketchy tree climb so wear a harness.

Tension side is rigged off the obvious big tree to the east, I climbed and rigged in the tree to void abrasion, you’ll figure it out
nARdrg-.accessInfo: Follow the track leading up the ridge till you come to the first outcrop of pohutukawa this is where the static side is. Head down hill to the beach then follow the steep choss trail up to the lone big pohutukawa for tension side. KEEP IN MIND THAT THE ROCK HERE IS SEDIMENTRY COASTAL ROCK. And I guarantee you will not find a rock as weak as this shit

mqP3dlZ.name: Kremšnodl
mqP3dlZ.description: Very short but exposed and with a nice view.
mqP3dlZ.anchorsInfo:
Tension side (south): tree: extension of ~10m
Static side: tree: extension of ~11m, piton for stabilizing on edge.

HgzdWtT.name: La casita del árbol
HgzdWtT.description: Excelente linea, bastante imponente, con el río Trabun Co corriendo por abajo. Cruzar el cordín es un pegue si no está puesta la tanza. Va de un coihue enorme al que hay que trapar usando un tronco de cipres como escalera, a un ciprés del otro lado. Para cruzar el rio hay una picadita bastante sucia o un puente caminado un poco hacia arriba. Abierto por Gon Catu Y GonPi

K0Fhkht.name: Hospital Krotova
K0Fhkht.description: 42m is a maximum length. Lines 15, 18, 36m can be rigged on heights from 8 to 28meters.
K0Fhkht.anchorsInfo: Protected slings 2 meters long are perfect. Not less then 2m are needed. And lots of additional protecting textile.
K0Fhkht.accessInfo: City bus №45 from the city centre.

LOdcwIq.anchorsInfo: Static side: 2x 12mm bolts and 3x 10mm bolts for backup. Rappel for 10m is needed into a rock face to get to anchor. Might be tricky to find. On tensioning side there are strong trees and you need atleast 4m of slings with some padding.

LtzkNaQ.name: Serengeti 2
LtzkNaQ.description: 3 bolts one side 2 on the other with 2 more further back.

dz_2r7q.name: Chimba estas Loca
dz_2r7q.description: Beautiful and so easy to rig
dz_2r7q.anchorsInfo: 3 bolts each side with natural anchors for additional backups

U9CmINe.name: Nickelodeon
U9CmINe.description: Línea de fácil acceso dentro del parque las grutas del mamut
U9CmINe.anchorsInfo:
-Lado estático/ anclaje mixto 1 bolt mecanico y 1 árbol de pino
-La dinámico / anclaje natural 1 árbol de roble
U9CmINe.accessInfo:
Lado estático / subiendo por las escaleras que van a la tirolesa.
Lado dinámico / cruzando el rio por el puente colgante subiendo el sendero atrás de la tirolesa anaranjada

55NzqoZ.description: De chaque coté, 3 points pour la force + 2 points pour le backup. Équipement sur broches (peinte en jaune)
55NzqoZ.anchorsInfo: De chaque coté, 3 points pour la force + 2 points pour le backup. Équipement sur broches (peinte en jaune).

V00Ne1D.name: Cinta floja
V00Ne1D.restriction: partial: Local community is not always welcoming.

kGwQf1Q.name: Mega Monkey
kGwQf1Q.description: This is one of the biggest, most spectacular lines in the park.
kGwQf1Q.anchorsInfo:
Bolted anchors on the static side in the cave on the Monkey.  The bolts have climbing hangers and they are a little small, so bring quicklinks.    These bolts are shared with the Long Monkey line.

The Tensioning side anchor is natural.  Bring lots of spansets, static, and padding to wrap a large boulder.
kGwQf1Q.accessInfo:
The static side is in the west-side cave of the the Monkey.  To get there you will need to climb up the Monkey somehow.  A strong climber could take the "West Face or Astro Monkey routes directly to the cave.  A more moderate way may be to take the Pioneer Route, and from the summit rappel into the cave. 

The tensioning side can be accessed by hiking around the cliff edge, south of the Monkey.

oYpDQHE.name: Dream catcher
oYpDQHE.description: Easy accessed small alpine line off of red mountain pass. High clearance vehicle allows one to drive a 100ft from the anchors. Treenet is up there as well.
oYpDQHE.anchorsInfo: Tree anchors. I use 8 and 10 ft green slings. Branches have been cleaned out to make it easy. Line faces northwest, great sunsets.

ytpgh-I.anchorsInfo: trees booth anchors, a frame needed

tX4GP-I.name: Taft Point
tX4GP-I.anchorsInfo: Bolts on both sides. You might need your own hangers.
tX4GP-I.accessInfo: Easy 1 mile walk from the carpark. Follow the signs to Taft Point. It's a common tourist destination.

3W1m-OK.name: Brightside of the rain that will come
3W1m-OK.description: Iconic line with views to Bled, Triglav, Stol and near waterfall.
3W1m-OK.restriction: partial: Ask SlackAlien for air traffic info.
3W1m-OK.anchorsInfo: Tree both side. 2m sling needed and some rope to backup the trees.

xXPFO8s.name: Svet je jeden záchod
xXPFO8s.description: Beautiful highline over the Avalanche couloir in Maninska Gorge
xXPFO8s.anchorsInfo: rock pillar + trees as backup on the one side (first picture), trees on the other side
xXPFO8s.accessInfo: 15 minutes walk from the parking lot

EuexVzz.name: The Solstice
EuexVzz.description: Main om Level line across the pool of the quarry
EuexVzz.anchorsInfo: Trees far back from the edge on each side. Use multiple trees on the car park side.
EuexVzz.accessInfo: From the car park walk down the path on and then hop the fence foe one anchor. For the far side carry on up the hill nutil you reach a barbed wire fence. Hop over this and then follow the edge of the quarry around.

HCxB66q.name: Serra da Leba 65
HCxB66q.description: Freestyle length line across the gully with views of climbing routes below
HCxB66q.anchorsInfo: Bolted anchors 10mm stainless steel expansion bolts with hangers. East side accessed 5m lower than cliff face (Abseil or roped scramble). West anchor ground level (chill side). Bolted on 9 June 2025

SuLDqMc.name: The Spire Long
SuLDqMc.description: Dłuższa taśma na Lost Arrow Spire. Stanowiska z boltów po obu stronach.

7Dx9tls.name: Jabberwalky
7Dx9tls.description: Intimidating exposure.  Great view of class 5 rapids. Wave to the people on the train!
7Dx9tls.anchorsInfo: Home Side has 5 bolts with the front most used as a redirect.  Far side is off the obvious red tree ( 20ft back from cliffside).  Rig off the base of the tree and extend anchor to cliff.
7Dx9tls.accessInfo: Follow access trail all the way down to the anchor.  Send far side to via ferrata and tyrole and access trail

wVTUpu9.name: Krosni s kroksy
wVTUpu9.description: long highline with easy rig and a nice view

JG3Riha.description: Nice highline, close to the waterlie spot. 27m with a beautiful view of the canyon.
JG3Riha.anchorsInfo: Bolts. 3 for main, 2 for back up on each side. The climbiing plates are already there

_MJ_f0n.name: Phishing
_MJ_f0n.description: 65-70ish meter line over looking taylor canyon
_MJ_f0n.anchorsInfo: 3 bolt anchors on each side. Typically rig the second butress as the tension/Home end. Other set of bolts are directly across. The middle bolt on home end needs extended via a spanset so you dont need to use a massive cut of anchor rope
_MJ_f0n.accessInfo: Park across from granite tent campground, small goat trail going up the drainage. 10-15 minute scrambell up to the 2nd butress on the ride side, looking up the drainage for home anchor. Other bolts directly across

3U9eeKe.name: Lac de Mayen
3U9eeKe.description: Line over the lake, many times installed, easy installation, at least 200m long
3U9eeKe.anchorsInfo: Tree anchors on both sides, on the west side use redirection with one of the trees, attache on the low part and use 3m sling to redirect.
3U9eeKe.accessInfo: Road requires authorisation by the commune de Leysin

d2ISkkd.name: La Rastafaray
d2ISkkd.description: Cinta increíble que une la selva con el Océano el inicio de la vida
d2ISkkd.restriction: none: Ninguna restricción si se comunica de la mejoranera a los moradores dejando una semilla para mejorar el lugar ecológicamente
d2ISkkd.anchorsInfo: Anclajes naturales y árboles nativos de la zona
d2ISkkd.accessInfo: Acceso normal al cementerio que será el lado A y al árbol para realizar el anclaje B

US-HMYF.name: Missing HILTI adaptar
US-HMYF.anchorsInfo: 3 glueins 10mm and 1 for backup both sides.
US-HMYF.accessInfo: Anchors positioned on the obvious location on the top of sharks head and on the corner rock on top.

vjWDWYB.name: Colmillo de guerreras
vjWDWYB.description: Hermosa línea en la magnífica peña de La Muela en el parque nacional Mineral del Chico.
vjWDWYB.anchorsInfo: 3 tensores Fixe de inox. de 3/8'' por 3.5'' de cada lado. Se recomiendan deltas para usar eslingas o usar cuerda estática directamente en el tensor.
vjWDWYB.accessInfo:
Hay que llegar al centro de visitantes del parque nacional Mineral del Chico, ahí es posible estacionarse y se debe pagar una cuota de $30 pesos por persona (julio de 2017). Ahí mismo nace un sendero que lleva directamente a la peña de La Muela. El sendero está muy bien marcado y señalizado por lo que no hay forma de perderse. Es una caminata muy sencilla de 20 minutos desde el estacionamiento.

El lugar se reconoce porque hay un pico de roca con una cruz en la parte más alta. La línea está en una pared de roca con forma de herradura atrás de este pico. Tras haber llegado a la cima de la peña por el sendero, se puede observar este pico. Es necesario caminar hacia la izquierda y volver a descender algunos metros, rodeando la peña por su costado sur. Se desescala una pared vertical de unos 3m con muy buenos agarres y pies, y de ahí se vuelve a subir por la roca hacia la zona de la herradura. Una vez que se ha llegado a la parte alta, se vuelve a bajar y desescalar por todo el borde de la peña hasta llegar al primer anclaje.

Para llegar al otro extremo es necesario hacer una pequeña travesía relativamente sencilla, y con muy buenos agarres y pies, por toda la herradura hasta el otro lado.

JDIW8W5.name: FROG
JDIW8W5.description: This is a nudism beach,please respect the people around and dont be noizy. On the right side you will find 4 x 12mm bolts and on the left side there is a big rock you can do a natural anchor and you will need a sling at least 6m long and protectio...
JDIW8W5.anchorsInfo: On the right side you will find 4 x 12mm bolts and on the left side there is a big rock you can do a natural anchor and you will need a sling at least 6m long and protection
JDIW8W5.accessInfo: by car heading to limanakia beach No2

Xp1Ol3b.name: Reakcja Pogańska
Xp1Ol3b.accessInfo: Climbing is necessary to get to one anchor

YDQ22so.name: Хайлайн в Парке Драконов
YDQ22so.description: Очень живописная линия между двух скал.
YDQ22so.anchorsInfo: Распорные анкера на обеих сторонах, залаз на скалы с помощью альпснаряжения. Станции пробиты в 2014м году.

Asu5mPD.name: Hakuna matada
Asu5mPD.description:
Five star front range classic. 
FA by D. Collins ett all. Circa early 2010s

This is the 120m line that runs from the citadel east to the top of the mineshaft wall. Walking towards the tower provides one of the most spectacular lines for the length in Colorado. 

Home side accessed from the top of the citadel. See palace area information for details.

Far side accessed by taking the climber trail toward the Poudre face and a short scramble starting in the chimney left of the climbing route "check your head"

Home side bolts updated to glue ins 2024?
Asu5mPD.anchorsInfo: Bolts on top of the citadel for home side. Far side is rigged natural by wrapping a large block.

EXK8DbA.name: Bura Fighter
EXK8DbA.accessInfo: Tensioning side is a rock above the path, bolts for 135 and 170m lines are laying on top of it. Static side bolts are on the other side below the boulder.

NtUNusA.name: Classic Monkey
NtUNusA.description: The first highline at Smith Rock.  Probably the shortest highline you could walk and get exposure like this.
NtUNusA.anchorsInfo: Giant pieces of angle Iron on each side, bolted into the rock.  They aren't meant for rope to run through, so bring some quicklinks or shackles.
NtUNusA.accessInfo: Someone will need to climb the monkey. The Pioneer Route gets you to the monkey's mouth in 2 pitches.  The other side can be accessed by hiking up Misery Ridge, then around the summit until you see the Monkey.

Iahu-NI.name: Der goldene Johnny
Iahu-NI.description:
Name: golden Johnny 
Length: 75m
First sent:  Tom Peek 

If you like an adventure and you don't mind you take up the gear this is a beautiful 75m line with an exposure to lake Garda and beyond. there is tons more potential on Monte Casale. With the right equipment and cojones, you can get to a beautiful ridge/spire that's even more exposed, and lines over 200m should also work out just below the cross.
Iahu-NI.anchorsInfo:
1 side 4bolt other side 3 bolts. 12mm. Hangers should be taken.
The bolts are made from: A4 stainless steel.

Note: bolted in August 2017
Iahu-NI.accessInfo: You hike up to the mountain: Monte Casale. Or you can use a car to get to the parking. Note: It's a dirt road and you need an off road car to get to the top. From the parking  Refugio don zio you walk up the mountain (approx 30 minutes). When you see the first house, leave the path and go right up the mountain. In front of you, you see two bushes of big trees and in between you can walk over the grass. Go there and walk al the way up. At an certain moment you will be at the cliff walk to the left and you find a small rocky path that goes a bit down take this path.

UQadQia.name: Dean's Line (the 130)
UQadQia.description: This line was established by Dean Potter back in the day, and it's absolutely a classic.  This line is perched right on the edge of the Fruit Bowl where the exposure can start to take hold.
UQadQia.anchorsInfo:
Western anchors are 5 glue in bolts 4.5 feet back from the lip.  No stabilizer bolt.

For your Eastern anchor there are 5 glue-in bolts 9.5 feet from the stabilizer bolt.  This side is slightly off level, and many people choose to use an a-frame at this anchor.
UQadQia.accessInfo:
You can see google map directions from Moab here:  https://goo.gl/maps/WFWL6gKqRw6vknwm6
Take UT-313W and turn right onto Mineral Bottom Road.  Follow that for 8 miles until it crosses the only cattle grate.  Turn right soon after that onto a well established off-road trail, and follow that the rest of the way to the parking area.

5b3RYeu.name: 240 shorty
5b3RYeu.anchorsInfo: sling large boulder, use log for pro, bolts on top of pineapple buttress
5b3RYeu.accessInfo: DO NOT RIG ON CLIMBING BOLTS. LEAVE NO TRACE

-ciSTiV.description:
La mythique highline de l'arête des Cosmiques. 
La ligne est à 3800m d'altitude, elle surplombe la vallée de Chamonix et est au cœur du massif du Mont-Blanc. 
Vue à couper le souffle garantie.

Photo : https://www.instagram.com/p/CtreEmRM-JC/?img_index=1
-ciSTiV.anchorsInfo:
Côté téléphérique : 3 goujons de 12 + 2 pour accéder par la vire.

Côté refuge : 3 goujons de 12.
-ciSTiV.accessInfo:
Deux solutions s'offrent à vous : 

- Faire l'arête des Cosmiques depuis le refuge, dans ce cas-là, il faut se référer au topo pour la voie normale.

- Partir à l'envers sur l'arête des Cosmiques en prenant les premières bennes de L'Aiguille, afin d'éviter de se retrouver trop dans le flux des alpinistes qui le font dans le sens classique. Pour ce faire, il faut faire un rappel (45m) au bout d'un éperon (cf. photo). Après la traversée d'un petit col, on accède au premier gendarme.

Côté téléphérique : on accède par une rampe de neige à l'arrière du gendarme de Digital Crack. L'ancrage est au bout d'une fine vire.

Côté refuge : continuer sur l'arête des Cosmiques et accéder à l'arrière du deuxième gendarme. Un fin col avec un relais marque le début de la voie. 

La voie en TA suit les lignes de fissure (45m). Cotation 5a/c selon les grimpeurs. Un niveau 6c en grimpe sportive est un minimum pour espérer passer. Il est néanmoins possible de passer en artif.

T60YgZL.description: De chaque coté, 3 points pour la force + 2 points pour le backup. Équipement sur broches (peinte en jaune)
T60YgZL.anchorsInfo: De chaque coté, 3 points pour la force + 2 points pour le backup. Équipement sur broches (peinte en jaune).

IunF-iX.name: Tezcatiliztli
IunF-iX.description: La primera linea de altura en Puebla de facil acceso y para el entrene

uKYk7JE.name: SWARMED
uKYk7JE.description: SWIFTBURN, Access via main road park at swiftburn underpass for foot traffic and walk 5 minutes along bike path. Used natural anchors on both side, tree roots on close side and elderberry tree on far side.
uKYk7JE.anchorsInfo: Natural. Two large tree roots two point to a A Frame. Far side one large Tree up high.

tK0zDas.name: Sokolia Pizza
tK0zDas.description: Beautiful 115m highline rigged to Veľká Sokolia veža (second highest rock tower in Slovakia!).Opened by Kamil Dudek (PL), Katarzyna Staśkiewicz (PL) and Adam Kaniak (SK).
tK0zDas.anchorsInfo: For side with tree you need 1,5m sling (girth hitch), for tower 9-10m of slings.
tK0zDas.accessInfo: Park the car in Poddolina and go by blue trail to the bottom of the tower (around 15min). Climbing to the tower is quite easy (around V). To another side you have to go straight through the forest till you reach big massive of rock, then you have to go to pass/col (it's on the photos) and climb it up (be careful, it's a lot of loose rock there)

QsbWg82.name: Škrbasta grinta
QsbWg82.description: Very cool alpine line on a pillar. ~2230m ASL
QsbWg82.restriction:
partial: ABOVE STATIC ANCHOR WAS A BIG ROCK FALL, POTENTIALLY DAMAGING THE BOLTS.
Ask SlackAlien for air traffic info.
QsbWg82.anchorsInfo:
Tension side(west): 4m sling around rock pillar, 10mm expansion behind to hold sling in place. 2x 10mm expansion on sides to hold slings in place and for backup. 4x 1m padding.
Static side(east): 2x 12mm expansion bolts + 3x 10mm expansion bolts, BFK with 10m static rope, some padding. Anchor is 4m off level.
QsbWg82.accessInfo: Follow paths on the maps to this ridge. Shortest is north side from Češka koča.  Tension side access requires 50m of easy free solo climbing.  Static side is ~20m of V grade climbing, equipped with 2 bolts and 4 pitons.

O-fCriL.name: Land Send
O-fCriL.description: In a sea gully. Makes for lots of spray in big waves
O-fCriL.anchorsInfo: Sling natural rock anchors. Throw line required.

Co7oeMW.anchorsInfo: Natural anchors on both sides. Hug a boulder on far side and 3-5 hourglass holes on the near side.
Co7oeMW.accessInfo: Access to near anchor through bar at the top.

Z0nlBGe.name: Waterfall Line
Z0nlBGe.description: The OG line on Mt Greville, and for good reason. It's located in the perfect spot above this palm filled gorge. Relatively flat on both sides, horizontal, and adjacent to the gorge.
Z0nlBGe.anchorsInfo:
East - Main/backup - similar to west anchor.
   West - Main/backup - 2 M16 threaded rod, 3 M10 threaded rod with FH (A frame highly recommended)
Z0nlBGe.accessInfo: At the top of the gorge, cut back around the top on the east side for best access. For west side access, follow the vague path from the top of the gorge westerly for about 200m, cross the small creek line and follow it down to the cliff edge. A short exposed scramble will get you to the anchors.

zgUitVS.name: nave do goa / goagil spaceship
zgUitVS.description: private area. pousada ecológica boa vista
zgUitVS.anchorsInfo:
south anchor : 3 big car axle on the ground with rope and and spansets and a wood eyeframe 
north anchor: 2 bolts 10m on a rock , and 2 group of steel sticks on the ground
zgUitVS.accessInfo: you must pass on a private hotel, pousada ecologica dos canions and talk with the gently owners to setup a line on the board of the canion. this part of the geoligical fence in south brazil are all priate lands, so you need to ask permission.

ySoFBxD.name: FRUIT SALAD
ySoFBxD.description: Protected 'Forest' highline Gavin Lewis, Conor Reiland
ySoFBxD.anchorsInfo: Multi Point on Left side and Single point Large beech on right , Two stage tag throw in either side and tie middle.
ySoFBxD.accessInfo: Oxenbridge tunnel hike, all the way, up and past rock climbing on left and youll find the clearing up above. one word, Bushbash

s_emL5U.name: Raztežalnik
s_emL5U.description: Really nice spot, very beautiful, peaceful. There is a road but usually nobody even notices you. There is no official path to the place.
s_emL5U.anchorsInfo: Trees on both sides, small ones for height and big ones for anchor.

ssohFau.name: Dezorganizacja
ssohFau.description:
1. side - 2 rings for main, backup to the tree.
2. side - 2 rings for main, backup to the third ring. Path on both sides
ssohFau.anchorsInfo:
1. side - 2 rings for main, backup to the tree.
2. side - 2 rings for main, backup to the third ring.

S1SxVI-.name: Senza Regole - No Rules, Cala Goloritze
S1SxVI-.description:
Amazing highline with a really great view on the sea.
Highline opened by  the team : Pedro Pimentel, Nuno Santos, Tim Good, Simon Egger, Filipe Carvalho, Franziska Heidenreich, Diogo Lapa, Pedro Ferrão Patrício, Steve Scott

yxZwlBX.name: Sakura
yxZwlBX.description: Just a cozy highline with a bit of nice flat area at an anchor point to chill and a water spring flowing below

Tx3NVaO.description:
For details contact Andrei or Matei from Slacksylvania
 slacksylvania@gmail.com or on fb https://www.facebook.com/slacksylvania/

jKpZU1g.name: Valhalla
jKpZU1g.description: Highline over small Cedronas river. There was felling of some obstructing trees and shrubs done to clear the area for safety because of the power lines above. Spot became usable for highlining now, but all the felled shrubs were just left as is there, so getting the line across is a pain - a pain to walk and a pain to unhooking the line from random branches. To get the line over the river you have to walk over a fallen tree while minding the line and praying it wouldn't get stuck somewhere again.
jKpZU1g.anchorsInfo: The far anchor is a meter above the ground on a Pine tree of not too big of a thickness. Tensioning side also doesnt have any thich accessible trees, so we used two trees standing close by as a single unit for an anchor - also about a meter above the ground. Worked well, but might have been the reason line was bit prone to swaying.
jKpZU1g.accessInfo: Both slopes are covered in felled trees and shrubs, so walking, ascending or descending there is a mess - necessary evil while getting the line across. But when done, there is a forest trail a just a bit away, so for anything else it's easy.

MNmcO-R.restriction: full: fully restricted they don't want to see any highline here now..

udAqYxG.name: Hanging Around
udAqYxG.description: Low Highline, first of 4 in the same Spot. New Zealand 1st and 2nd Higline Festival Spot.
udAqYxG.anchorsInfo: 5 bolts (hangers 12mm needed on 3 of the 5) on one side. 4 bolts  (hangers 12mm needed on 3 of the 4) on the other side. Easy to use spansets, and preferable rope to extend out of cliff. One end starts 4m from ground.
udAqYxG.accessInfo: Cooper's Knob - Summit Road - Toilets are 700m from Spot on the track direction to Christchurch.

s5JSGUz.name: Moustrap Zawn
s5JSGUz.restriction: partial: Follows the Bird Bans detailed in the BMC RAD (found online or download the app) Roughly March 1st- 31st of July
s5JSGUz.anchorsInfo: Easy to sling large bolder on the east side. The west side is slung around a small section of cliff. Anchor locations on the map are an estimate. There are a few options to choose from.
s5JSGUz.accessInfo: A short walk down the hill from the car park. The west side is accessed via the path down to the lighthouse.

96c98r8.name: Treeline Laouga Cazaux
96c98r8.description: You can park just under the line. Quiet area where you can camp / sleep in your car/van. These are big pines, you'll need 3 meters spansets. Tree climbing / rappel / jet bag + throwline etc
96c98r8.anchorsInfo: These are big pines, you'll need 3 meters spansets.
96c98r8.accessInfo: Tree climbing / rappel / jet bag + throwline etc...

HUxhtOb.name: Witch Deep (Ведьмина падь)
HUxhtOb.description:
Stations are within walking distance.
many climbing tracks

0Bkwfts.name: Blue Dream
0Bkwfts.description: This is one of the longest lines in the park, and a beauty!
0Bkwfts.accessInfo:
The quickest way to the top of the gully is to hike directly up through Agro or Cocaine gulley.  From the bridge into the park, follow the river before turning uphill following the climber's trail up through either Cocaine Gulley or Agro Gulley.  Either are a steep slog uphill, but Cocaine Gulley has a 1 move boulder problem mid way.  Alternatively, you can hike up Misery Ridge, and then around towards the Monkey before hiking downhill towards the anchors, though this is much longer.

The tensioning side anchors can be found about as far downhill as you can go.  The bolts are on a ledge with a large boulder (the anchors for Overdose are on the same ledge).  The static side anchor can be accessed by scrambling down the fin of rock that separates Cocaine and Agro Gulley.  It's a narrow, but non-technical.

pASr6GO.name: The King Line
pASr6GO.description: Aptly named, this is the tallest, most exposed and most EPIC line in the park. You'll have to put in work to walk this line because the approach and rig is no picnic. In the end it will all be worth it to walk this line.
pASr6GO.accessInfo:
Start by crossing the bridge into the park and follow the river to the south end of the park and around the point. When the trail turns north, start watching for heard paths going uphill towards Phoenix Buttress. The trail doesn't look like much at first, but has well established switch-backs higher up. You will reach a point where you can see the King Line gap at a rocky outcropping. 

To get to the tension side, you will need to climb a 20m, 5.4 section. A proper belay and trad pro is recommended. People often fix a rope once they reach the top so that others can prussic-in while climbing up, or rappel down. 

The Static side is where the adventure really begins. Scramble up to the base of your first ascent, where you will find the bolts for the Bishop. From here there are maybe 4 draws placed about a body length apart to get to the top of a middle summit. The rock is crumbly, and the bolts are a little questionable, so it takes a very attentive belay because you wouldn't want a hard fall onto the bolts. From the top of the first section you do a fun little exposed catwalk traverse on choss until you rappell into the notch that can be seen from the tension side. Once here you have another short crumbly but easy climb to get to the top of where the bolts are. Maybe 6 bolts on the last climb. You should see the glue-in bolts there.

a3qN4uZ.name: No Sleep Allowed
a3qN4uZ.description: 861 meters, tree to boulder wrap. Tagging must be done by hand and will take 4-6 days to tag. May luck be on your side to rig this beast, it’s a gamble and a challenge
a3qN4uZ.restriction: partial: NOTAM and coordination with Park Service required.

lTzqrL9.name: CLOUDLINE
lTzqrL9.description:
Natural Anchors, 10m anchor material for mains either side, Hard access

Rigged By Dylan Bennett, Miguel Obrien, Gavin Lewis
lTzqrL9.anchorsInfo: Large natural anchors, requires many spansets or much rope!
lTzqrL9.accessInfo: Remarks Car park, Hike up Shadow descend gully and traverse either ridgeline to desired anchors, we chose the obvious ones.

IVeT47U.name: El P*to Parabolt
IVeT47U.description: Each side 3 main bolts and one to re direct a bit the line

gZp3hbB.name: Szczęście w nieszczęściu
gZp3hbB.description: You need wrap two towers around. 20-25m of slings. Free solo easy climbing to both sides
gZp3hbB.anchorsInfo: You need wrap two towers around. 20-25m of slings
gZp3hbB.accessInfo: free solo easy climbing to both sides

9WnS5Ao.name: Między Widoczkami (Windy Gap)
9WnS5Ao.description: Second, longer and more exposed highline in Hejszowina (Szczeliniec Wielki). It was my fourth highline send and a big achievement for me (I nearly tripled my personal best with this walk). Beautiful line. Probably my favourite Polish highline

PZAkPz5.name: Ascenção por um Fio
PZAkPz5.description:
This highline was opened for an event held at the Caracol State Park with the purpose of encouraging the practice of slackline in the region and showing where the sport can go.
THE INSTALLATION OF THIS HIGHLINE WILL NOT BE PERMITTED WITHOUT AUTHORIZATION OF THE MUNICIPAL CITY HALL.
PZAkPz5.anchorsInfo:
4 fixed bolt inox with 10mm diameter each side.
need 8 bolt hanger for all
PZAkPz5.accessInfo:
Access to anchorage 1 is made by a rappel of ~ 20 meters. Mooring of abseiling is done on trees.
Beware there are many loose rocks and wasps


Access to base 2 is more complicated, needs to cross the river,
climb on trees ~ 12 meters make use of a fixed rope and use another rope of at least 25 meters to the second abseil.
This abseiling occurs quite friction, take protections for rope.

-svfSNz.description: Coté ouest, 5 goujons de 10mm et un pin (plus simple pour le backup) ; coté est, 7 goujons de 12mm, apporter les plaquettes. Même accès que pour la 30m
-svfSNz.anchorsInfo: coté ouest, 5 goujons de 10mm et un pin (plus simple pour le backup) ; coté est, 7 goujons de 12mm, apporter les plaquettes

KnD8KjW.description: Who could ask for a more beautiful spot?  The sound of the river below you, sheer cliffs on either side; it's a great place to spend your day.  This is probably the biggest line available, with the shortest line around 70m.
KnD8KjW.anchorsInfo: Big pine trees.  The north side pine tree requires a little bit of climbing to get a level line.
KnD8KjW.accessInfo: Follow herd paths from the road to the river.  To get to the north side anchors, cross the bridge just a bit down the road and hike along the river.  Look out for poison oak.

O0ERQ0b.name: Lo que el viento se llevó
O0ERQ0b.description: Es una de las líneas más cortas de la Peña de la Muela, ideal para principiantes pues se puede colocar una cinta en la parte superior para crear un tibetano con dos leashes. A pesar de ser de las más cortas de la zona, es una de las que tienen mejor vista y paisaje.
O0ERQ0b.anchorsInfo: Hay 3 tensores inoxidables de cada lado, donde se puede tejer directamente cuerda estática para los anclajes. En las paredes posteriores a los anclajes hay colocados 3 bolts de cada lado para poder montar una línea aérea para un leash extra ("tibetano"). Las placas no están presentes de ordinario para evitar que se las roben, por lo que es necesario llevar cada quien sus 6 placas con arandelas y tuercas de 3/8 (de preferencia de inox) en caso de querer instalar la línea aérea. No apretar en exceso las tuercas, los bolts ya están expandidos correctamente.
O0ERQ0b.accessInfo: Hay que llegar al centro de visitantes del parque nacional Mineral del Chico, ahí es posible estacionarse y se debe pagar una cuota de $30 pesos por persona (julio de 2017). Ahí mismo nace un sendero que lleva directamente a la peña de La Muela. El sendero está muy bien marcado y señalizado por lo que no hay forma de perderse. Es una caminata muy sencilla de 20 minutos desde el estacionamiento. El lugar se reconoce porque hay un pico de roca con una cruz en la parte más alta. La línea está en la parte más norte de la zona

kFpSCpD.name: Zephyr
kFpSCpD.anchorsInfo: X2 150mm glue in carrots, rhs is bomber tree with backup options as well

HPb8S25.name: Baleia Franca
HPb8S25.description: One side natural anchors other 4 inox bolt's 10mm

3pOtjgL.name: Wrong Ball
3pOtjgL.description: Same beta as Right Ball, but this is just a bit shorter and closer to the ground.

vEN2OgY.name: Ovrag
vEN2OgY.description: Nice spot which is located over the natural ravine. Bases are two trees. The entrance to the line is extremely convinient (It's depend on hight you plane to pin, 1 meter above the ground excellent for the knot tieing)

DT0cxCh.description: Be aware of climbers below, don't kick any loose rocks down onto them when getting on/off the line. Ground stakes on south side, crawl through the bushes on the north side and you'll find a few nice trees that can be equalised and extended out
DT0cxCh.anchorsInfo: Ground stakes on south side, crawl through the bushes on the north side and you'll find a few nice trees that can be equalised and extended out

72Y-RTV.name: Abuelika Kika
72Y-RTV.description: Primera linea en todo el salto. El spot para ver la linea es increible, muy comodo.
72Y-RTV.anchorsInfo: Se usan diferentes arboles en lado dinamico, en lado estatico se usan bolts y un crash pad como frame.

4-xEnrZ.name: ONE MILE
4-xEnrZ.description:
Easy Approach, Short line in Beech forest.
Very Natural anchors

Dylan Bennett, Hoel Yugg Andrew Rankin
4-xEnrZ.anchorsInfo: Use Pine tree on left anchor, and multiple beech trees on right.
4-xEnrZ.accessInfo: Park at End of Thompson street and head up the closed track going to Ben Lomond,(for right hand side anchor) Continue over bridge and up the track take the soonest right hand track up Bike track (caution) And find anchor 5 minutes up, Large Pine tree.

rExkVuO.name: Puente la Piedra
rExkVuO.description: Depending on the day, there may be a lot of tourists walking in the area. you can also hang hammocks at the tension side. You need GOOD padding for the line because there is a rock to the right of the path near the begginig. There is a tree on one...
rExkVuO.anchorsInfo: There is a tree on one side and roots/rocks on the other. A sling works for tree side and 11mm static rope is good for other side though you can probably use a sling too

ynQo80T.description: Line at the top of the lost world
ynQo80T.anchorsInfo: Big boulders on either side. Lots of edge padding needed.

48N1wAn.name: Dolina Dolžina
48N1wAn.description: First highline above 100m in Slovenia. Above climbing area. Be aware of rockfall!
48N1wAn.anchorsInfo:
Tension side: tree, ~5m extension to the edge.
Far side: trees, good tree is ~10m back from the edge, so it needs to be extended and stabilized.
48N1wAn.accessInfo: Far side: At the end of climbing area you go left and up the steep hill. You come above the most right routes.

QFi-xcm.name: LAZAREV KANJON
QFi-xcm.description: Each side 3 holes 12mm for removable bolts + backup to the small tree on one side and rope around the rock on the other. About 40 minutes-1h walking from the car trought the forest without any path. Use GPS coordinates: 44°01'24.7"N 21°56'01....
QFi-xcm.anchorsInfo: Each side 3 holes 12mm for removable bolts + backup to the small tree on one side and rope around the rock on the other
QFi-xcm.accessInfo: about 40 minutes-1h walking from the car trought the forest without any path. Use GPS coordinates: 44°01'24.7"N 21°56'01.8"E

HuYI3c4.name: Branetova
HuYI3c4.description: Short line from the platform great for beginner training.
HuYI3c4.anchorsInfo:
Tension side: 2x 12mm expansion bolts. We use tree and rock wrap to stabilize it and it works great with these slings: 2x 2m + 1m + 2,5m spanset
Far side: 3x 12mm expansion bolts in overhang.
HuYI3c4.accessInfo: Far side: most of the time you can just climb to it from the path.

UWOd8FT.name: Saquito de te
UWOd8FT.description: Se puede pasar cordino por el puente
UWOd8FT.anchorsInfo: 3 bolts del lado A y arboles del lado B

Rm_ROwT.name: Las Turistas
Rm_ROwT.description: If you rig from the right side of the viewpoint you get a beautiful, perfectly even line!
Rm_ROwT.anchorsInfo:
All natural - no bolts (well, one bolt with ring in the hole on top of the arch)
7,5 Meters of spansets for the tree-anchor on the landside (right side of the view-point-platform)
6 Meters of spansets for redirecting the tree-anchor from the handrail
8 Meters of spansets so wrap around the hole on top of the arch
Rm_ROwT.accessInfo: Swim over to the arch around the right side, there's an easy way up. Use a 60 cm meter sling to get out of the water.

YPpbxOZ.name: Szpadel taty v3.0
YPpbxOZ.accessInfo: rope is hidden on far anchor. Do you need cross a super small river

9lonm4O.name: Home Spot Line C
9lonm4O.description:
People from Coimbra were desperate for a Highline close enough and with fast and good access so we can train daily. So we found this spot that after some team work in cleaning everything and cutting trees we made it possible.
There is no fall zones in the first 5-10m of one side because or a big orange tree under the line that we didnt manage to cut yet.
This line is not free to rigg by everybody, Only together with the slackline coimbra team since its above a private terrain on a little village. So if u want to rigg the line or enjoy it u must speak with Daniel Couto from the Coimbra Slackline Team.
9lonm4O.restriction: partial: The only restriction is the fact that is above a private terrain that only the slackline Coimbra Team has permission for it. Talk with Daniel Couto
9lonm4O.accessInfo: Very easy access. From the car to the line its 20m  distance litteraly.

ue6Dg0e.name: Ishikiri Mountain highline 90m
ue6Dg0e.restriction: full: Permission is required for use. For inquiries, please contact us on our Instagram account @slackaholix

k65YEOK.name: Babilônia Line
k65YEOK.description: You need cleaning tools to access the trees, the woods are closed and you are in the middle of the trail that climbs to reach the top of the waterfall, at the look of the to elaborate the access, there are several trees with various types of options.

MlGPMPg.name: Little Fiji
MlGPMPg.description: park Car near Large boulder on road, access same as The Boneyard climbing area.
MlGPMPg.anchorsInfo: Use Bolts on left side, Use natural on right with a A FRAME

QEjp-1g.name: Bird Man Gap
QEjp-1g.description:
A beautliful 75m gap parallel with China Man Gap.
Great opportunity to rig two parallel freestyle highlines with one of the best views on the mountain!
FA by Alejandro Sanchez and James Xu
QEjp-1g.anchorsInfo:
All bolted with 3-4 bolts on each side. Could be rigged naturally but is way less sketchy to use bolts.
I believe the parking lot side anchor has glue-ins, and requires a fair amount of rope (at least 40m) if you want to equalize off of all the bolts. It has been rigged off of 2 bolts before. The masterpoint should sit on top of a cool stacked rock feature. 
The other side uses normal hangers and require quicklinks, but uses much smaller amount of rope. Anchor should hang over a small corner on the wall.
- 40m+ static rope, or some combination of spansets to extend points.
- 10m static rope
- quicklinks
- lots of padding
QEjp-1g.accessInfo: Same approach for anchors of China Man Gap, except the anchor closer to the parking lot does not require a scary hop across move to access it.

s7FPKT-.name: Cul qui roule n'amasse pas mousse

HlnASF1.description: Las mejores vistas de todo el Salto,
HlnASF1.anchorsInfo: Puras cuerdas a bolts. De un lado se puede caminar, del otro es necesario escalar un multilargo.
HlnASF1.accessInfo: Se puede llegar facilmente caminando, sube la terraceria, una vez que empiece a bajar es a la izquierda por una pequeña vereda.

z0hq6Al.description: 4 bolts on every anchor. near the edge
z0hq6Al.anchorsInfo: 4 bolts on every anchor. near the edge

MtRfajt.name: Vodítko
MtRfajt.description: Thick beech left from the Gastonka crag on the one side, few pine trees on the other side. 15 minutes walk from the parking lot
MtRfajt.anchorsInfo: thick beech left from the Gastonka crag on the one side, few pine trees on the other side
MtRfajt.accessInfo: 15 minutes walk from the parking lot

CXsMCY7.name: Ruine Reußenstein
CXsMCY7.description: Relative low line. It's nice to have main-backup connections like b-loops.
CXsMCY7.anchorsInfo: Go around the pillar for the far side, for the tension side there are a few older bolts.

8yTgMKN.name: highline faron nord
8yTgMKN.anchorsInfo: 2 pins de part et d'autre de l'anse, il y a aussi des goujons de 10 coté ouest

YcDyydz.description: Contact @grab.slacklines for more info!. Big boulder and tree

VTXu3VQ.name: Victoria Bridge, 69 and the Eroticats
VTXu3VQ.description:
Opened in January 2017 by the team Ekiwibristes.
Victoria Bridge on the SH6 over Kawarau River, New Zealand.
VTXu3VQ.anchorsInfo:
* Connection :
Easy as, walk the bridge with your tagline.
* Anchor 1 :
South side : rappel 10m to the anchor slab (rap from the only tree away from the edge, you’ll need a 40m rope). 3 expansion bolts 12mm. 1x3m 1T spanset, back up with the access rope.
* Anchor 2 :
North side : climb up one big tree and sling it 4m above the ground.
VTXu3VQ.accessInfo: Famous local highline spot. We open this new one so you still can rig the 30m line.

My2jRuT.name: Napoleonica
My2jRuT.description: Short and not high line perfect for begginers.
My2jRuT.anchorsInfo:
Tension (west) side: 3x glue-in bolts
Static side: 3x glue-in bolts. 10m rope for rappel needed.

aXH_vfj.name: Tivoli
aXH_vfj.description: Most obvious longer line to us at this spot.
aXH_vfj.anchorsInfo:
Tension side(north): Use 2m spanset on good tree.
Static side: 3x 12mm expansion bolts: 10m rope bfk and 2m spanset. 10m abseil.
aXH_vfj.accessInfo: Tension side: A few meter down from path. Static side: Best way is around 20min by some small path and after just animal paths.

ztSVxOK.name: Wind Makes Me Feel Good
ztSVxOK.anchorsInfo: Sling large boulders on each side, back up to some smaller boulders further back
ztSVxOK.accessInfo: Walk up Sca Fell, the line is down from the summit in the direction of Scafell Pike

6fWm_wf.name: Serengeti 3
6fWm_wf.anchorsInfo: Glue in bolts on one side. 2 expansion bolts on the other.

adGViHz.name: Boven Highline
adGViHz.description:
5 bolts with hangers on either side. 
Quicklinks are vital.  Some extra slings may need to be used to extend master point over the edge. There is an easy scramble up and down both sides. Line can be accessed from the farm house or Tranquilitas cam...
adGViHz.anchorsInfo:
5 bolts with hangers on either side. 
Quicklinks are vital.  Some extra slings may need to be used to extend master point over the edge.
adGViHz.accessInfo: There is an easy scramble up and down both sides

mSTMx4Y.name: Solsticij
mSTMx4Y.description: Not as high line but goes to edge of rock wall. It has nice view on Kamen castle, Begunje and surrounding mountains.
mSTMx4Y.anchorsInfo:
Tension side A (west): 3x 12mm holes for removable bolts; 8m bfk and 3m spanset, 2x 0,5m padding
Static side B (east): Tree; 1,5m spanset, 10m rope to backup a tree
mSTMx4Y.accessInfo: Park next to the road at statue. Then just up the hill, you can try to find some paths.

k4YyHuF.name: Berimbondo BadBoy
k4YyHuF.accessInfo: Recomenda-se uma linha de vida para acessar a rocha embaixo dos bolts durante a montagem do lado B.

_DI0dG1.name: The Elora Line
_DI0dG1.restriction:
partial: Access here is based on us following the rules below.
If you're on the other side of the fence you must be tied into a personal anchor system if you are within 3m of the cliff edge. All anchors must use at least two trees even if you have one massive bomber tree to rig off of.
_DI0dG1.anchorsInfo: Two large clusters of multiple trees on each side.

kpdbbK7.name: Batracio Lunar
kpdbbK7.description: Beautiful 25m highline in La Muralla, in the State of Querétaro.
kpdbbK7.anchorsInfo: 3 SS bolts with hangers each side. Maillons or carabiners are needed. At least 25-30 m of static rope for each side.

o-ZDlVD.name: Highline Beleza Amazônica - Cachoeira da Neblina
o-ZDlVD.description:
Highline easy to assemble. Line established on 12/11/2016 by team formed by: Leandro Barroncas, Saulo Balieiro, Deilon Marques, Yana Hara and Juscelino Costa. Both anchors are easily accessible. Cordelete can be passed when crossing the formed lake swimming from one end to the other. Any questions, contact Leandro Barroncas via facebook or instagram.

Highline fácil de montar. Linha aberta em 12/11/2016 por equipe formada por: Leandro Barroncas, Saulo Balieiro, Deilon Marques, Yana Hara e Juscelino Costa. Ambas ancoragens de fácil acesso. Cordelete pode ser passado ao atravessar o lago formado nadando de uma ponta a outra. Quaisquer dúvidas, contatar Leandro Barroncas via facebook ou instagram.
o-ZDlVD.anchorsInfo:
Natural anchors (large trees) on both sides at the base of the trees. In the main anchor we use 4 meter slings. In anchoring backup we use 8 meter ropes.
Ancoragens naturais (árvores de grande porte) em ambos lados na base das árvores. 
Na Ancoragem principal usamos Slings de 4 metros. Na ancoragem backup usamos cordas de 8 metros.
o-ZDlVD.accessInfo:
Location of the Neblina waterfall: Highway Am 240, Km 51, City Presidente Figueiredo, Amazonas State, Brazil.
Geographic coordinates on Google Maps: 6892WCMJ + W4
Geographic coordinates in the GPS (Garmin) S02 01.715 '; W059 35,524 '
To get to Cachoeira da Neblina, it is necessary to travel almost 100 kilometers on Highway BR -174 and then access Highway AM-240 (known as the Road to Balbina), and continue until km 51.
The entire route, according to the Garmin GPS device, is 6.32km from the beginning of the trail still on site to the point of arrival at the waterfall. These were done in 1h30min on the way.
To access the waterfall trail, it is necessary to enter in private property (farm) which charges the amount of R$10,00 per person to camp. Park the vehicle at this location and take the trail (flat and well-defined route, no guide required)

Localização da cachoeira da neblina: Rodovia Am 240, Km 51, Município de Presidente Figueiredo, Estado do Amazonas, Brasil.
Coordenadas geográficas no Google Maps: 6892WCMJ+W4 
Coordenadas geográficas no GPS (Garmin) S02 01.715'; W059 35.524'
Para chegar até a Cachoeira da Neblina, é preciso percorrer quase 100 quilômetros na Rodovia BR -174 e, então, acessar a Rodovia AM-240 (conhecida como estrada para Balbina), e seguir até o km 51. 
O percurso todo, segundo o aparelho de GPS Garmin, é de 6.32km entre o início da trilha ainda no sítio até o ponto de chegada da cachoeira. Estes foram feitos em média de 1h20min na ida.
Para acessar a trilha da cachoeira, é necessário entrar em propriedade particular (sítio) o qual cobra o valor de R$10,00 por pessoa para acampar. Estacione o veículo neste sítio e pegue a trilha (percurso plano e bem delimitado, não precisa de guia).

19GKiVz.name: Saint antonin - 100m
19GKiVz.description:
Highline de 100m de Saint Antonin Noble Val.
Elle part a coté de la 80, du belvédère pour aller a gauche de la faille caractéristique en face.
19GKiVz.anchorsInfo:
Coté Belvédère : Point de 12mm a partager avec la 80m.
Coté falaise : Faire un rappel sur arbre, en tirant a gauche sur la première terrasse (5m). On trouve 4/5 points en 12mm, prendre plaquette.

VFpRp5l.name: Juo Dam Highline 190m
VFpRp5l.restriction: full: Permission is required for use. For inquiries, please contact us on our Instagram account @bodyproducts.ibaraki.

APLA9Mx.name: Basti im Glück
APLA9Mx.description:
Tree to tree anchor.
Does not matter which tree there.
Just find the open line between the trees

GzIjCuC.name: Highline da Pedra da Gavea - By Hugo Langel

p3ame-Q.name: Pączusie
p3ame-Q.description: Nice line next to a climbing sector
p3ame-Q.anchorsInfo: Trees about 10 m far from the edge, you need a lot of spansets or rope.

5S51spP.name: Mala mujer la planta
5S51spP.description: Buena linea para caminar o freestyle.
5S51spP.anchorsInfo: BFK para ambos lados, se puede llegar caminando a los dos anclajes, pero el que apunta al sur es algo peligroso. Tambien se puede llegar por un rappel ubicado más arriba. Asegurarse que anclaje quede afuera de la roca.
5S51spP.accessInfo: Subir por el chorreadero, pegarte al lado derecho siempre.

9gExrJg.name: Ornk Rute
9gExrJg.description: True highline above ferrata Hvadnik. Very nice view on the Julian Alps mountains.
9gExrJg.restriction: partial: Ask SlackAlien for air traffic info.
9gExrJg.anchorsInfo:
Tension side A (north): Big tree; 1,5m spanset
Static side B: Tree and 2x 12mm holes; equalise 3m spanset on 2 removable bolts and a tree
9gExrJg.accessInfo: Tension side you can reach via ferrata or path that goes down to the road. Static side you can reach from grass field on top. Rappel of 15m needed next to big beech tree. Then few meters by foot to this rock pillar. About 10 more meters of rope here needed.

1uDeZMh.name: бухта Средняя Лагерная
1uDeZMh.description: Деревья на каждой станции. Чтобы пробросить реп-шнур нужен или квадрокоптер, или сбрасывать с двух сторон, и связывать внизу. Подъезд на автомобиле
1uDeZMh.anchorsInfo: Деревья на каждой станции. Чтобы пробросить реп-шнур нужен или квадрокоптер, или сбрасывать с двух сторон, и связывать внизу.

1BNZ0xO.description: Rescpet the area, and have fun, remeber always leave clean and don't disturb

yKjMyHE.name: Faerie Graveyard
yKjMyHE.description: Maybe the longest you can safely rig here..
yKjMyHE.accessInfo: Don't climb the security gate! head up the road and follow the footpath, then climb the fence.. Head through the woods until you reach the tree you require..

cjzO_wn.description: The Goat. Super nice line with panoramic view to old town of Bakhchisaray.
cjzO_wn.anchorsInfo: Four 12mm glue bolts on one side and three 12mm glue bolts on another. You need hangers.
cjzO_wn.accessInfo: About half an hour walk from the old town. On a single rock you need to climb 10m wall, bring at least 5 quickdraws.

0n7ekvS.name: Brezza di Sicilia
0n7ekvS.description:
Beautifull Highline on the Scogliera near San Vito lo Capo.
The Line is on Top of the Climbing Wall.
0n7ekvS.anchorsInfo:
On both sides are 4 x 10mm Inox bolts.
Bring the Hangers
0n7ekvS.accessInfo: Drive from San Vito a small road to the Top of the Cliffs. From there in 5 min. to the Spot

PFGcVvJ.name: Are You Guys For Real
PFGcVvJ.anchorsInfo:
One large boulder on the east side to sling. 
Choice of boulders in the limestone pavement on the other side.
PFGcVvJ.accessInfo: Park in Malham Village and walk up the sign posted path towards Malham Cove and the limestone pavement

ss6oSuV.name: The Spire
ss6oSuV.description: Krótsza taśma na Lost Arrow Spire. Stanowisko z camów + bolt na back-up na odstrzelonej płycie na ścianie, stanowisko na turnii z boltów do wyboru

-PUpHyc.name: Costa Del Sol
-PUpHyc.description: Overlooking Llandudno's south beach and Conwy Sands, this line has a stunning exposure view and soaks in the evening sun.
-PUpHyc.anchorsInfo:
One side has 3 U bolts at various distaces back fro the edge.

The other side has 3 bolts (two expansion 1 U) to abseil down a couple of metres to attach to two U bolts on a very small ledge on the cliff face.
-PUpHyc.accessInfo: There are a couple of paths leading up from the old gatehouse. Zig zag up the sheep paths to get there.

rivFeJO.name: Scrambled Tofu
rivFeJO.description: "Scrambled Tofu", a fun-to-rig, all-natural highline that soaks the sunshine year round and blocks wind from the North. Recommended at night as the city lights shine behind the highliner! Rigged by the Dunedin Slackliners :)
rivFeJO.anchorsInfo: All natural. 3 boulders on each side. Some boulders are a few metres in diameter - several spansets, big spansets, and static rope recommend on both sides. Boulders are several metres back from master points, so be clever with equalising. The west side has a ~3 metre platform (no-fall-zone), ideal for pulley systems. Static side on the east.
rivFeJO.accessInfo: Park at the top of Mt. Cargill, walk under the antenna, then follow the obvious track that heads east. When the path splits, there is a sign: head to Butter's Peak (the highline spot). Drive time from Dunedin city: ~15 minutes. Walk time from Mt. Cargill: ~15 minutes.

whj0cnD.description: Please note that the Kostolec gorge is open for climbing, therefore also fo highlining from 15.6. untill 31.12. In spring and in winter climbing is forbiden due to birds nesting there. Tension side: there is 10mm hole for screw in bolt for positio...
whj0cnD.anchorsInfo:
tension side: there is 10mm hole for screw in bolt for positioning and the line is anchored in trees that are maybe 15-20m from the cliffedge

Static side: big tree + one 10mm screw in bolt for positioning, +- 10meters of spanset needed

qTMRgJx.name: La Centrale du milieu
qTMRgJx.anchorsInfo: 3x10mm bolts, no padding needed, bring your hangers

pbH3fa6.name: No Base Jumping
pbH3fa6.description: A unique deep cove on the Pictured Rocks National Lakeshore with excellent highline potential.
pbH3fa6.anchorsInfo: Trees! Use tree pro, please do not jeopardize access!
pbH3fa6.accessInfo: Hike 3.5 miles to Chapel Beach, follow the lakeshore trail west to Chapel Cove

yka1-Cu.description: Above Il Mito rock climbing crag
yka1-Cu.accessInfo: For the far side there is a rope attached to 3 bolts and is relatively easy to climb up from the bottom of the canyon.

sHydpOr.name: Through the muck
sHydpOr.description: Look for the Fishing line which has been run through two bolts to be used for pulling rope through for ascent. Set of 3 glue-ins atop the the first column and beam on the west side, access by ascending column. Second anchor is the cypress tree acr...
sHydpOr.anchorsInfo: Set of 3 glue-ins atop the the first column and beam on the west side, access by ascending column. Second anchor is the cypress tree across the river, wise to have a belayer.

VrMPbhq.name: Pierożek
VrMPbhq.description: Nice line for begining and training.
VrMPbhq.anchorsInfo:
Anchors: 2 main expansion bolts 12mm/15cm in length + 1 expansion bolt 12mm diameter/10cm in length per side -- take 6 12/13mm diameter hangers with you

2 x 1 meter spanset will be long enough to connect two main bolts into anchor. 

On one side you have to rappel down from the back-up bolt to built an anchor.

Elwtghi.anchorsInfo:
Far side (static) uses 2 trees set back and a third as an elevator near edge;
Cliff side (tension) uses 2 trees set back and the common elevator tree in rock.

bJReh2F.name: Orcanator
bJReh2F.description: Nice spot with incredible view over the ocean. Easy acces from the road and tolerated camping options on the otherside of the road.
bJReh2F.anchorsInfo:
Dynamic side on the S/E rock:
Use the rather small but definately strong birch trees at the base for an anchor. Equalize the anchor over multiple trees. Use the trees in the back for a back up anchor.
Extend your anchor for about 8 meters to the edge of the rock and use an A frame to lift it a bit of the ground.

Static side on the N/W rock:
Use the same kind of small trees on the otherside for your static ancor and back it up to another one behind it.
Make sure you wrap all the branches.
There are also some climbing anchors at the top of this rock that you probably could use for your anchor. However it is prohibited to bolt more anchors.

CKMKGc0.name: Siedemdziesiątka
CKMKGc0.description: This is a private area. If you have questions, ask Urban Highline Festival.

5FpgxPu.name: Down in the vallis
5FpgxPu.description: Only worth it if you are in the area..
5FpgxPu.accessInfo: Climb the hill or take the path in the corner..

VMIaZeB.description: 4 bolts on every anchor. near the edge
VMIaZeB.anchorsInfo: 4 bolts on every anchor. near the edge

KwgNuEh.name: Agro Gully Line
KwgNuEh.description: A good, more moderately long highline at Smith Rock
KwgNuEh.anchorsInfo: three bolts on each side that will accommodate static rope.
KwgNuEh.accessInfo: The quickest way to the top of the gulley is to hike directly up through Agro or Cocaine gulley.  From the bridge into the park, follow the river before turning uphill following the climbers trail up through either Cocaine or Agro Gulley.  Either are a steep slog uphill, but Cocaine gulley has a 1 move boulder problem mid way.  Alternatively, you can hike up Misery Ridge, and then around towards the Monkey before hiking downhill towards the anchors, though this is much longer.

Nbi6XGb.name: Mexico Mágico
Nbi6XGb.description: La linea más larga dentro de este cañon
Nbi6XGb.anchorsInfo: Ambos lados tienen bolts, de lado dinamico es necesario un frame

AO4DoAw.name: Dragonfly
AO4DoAw.description: High waterline. Falling down into water in the middle is safe :)
AO4DoAw.anchorsInfo: Ropes and taglines needed to get up into the trees

nsPR9LG.name: Memento Mori
nsPR9LG.description: Probably the nicest highline I rigged so far, great length to height ratio. Line is located in Kostolecká gorge and goes right next to the great arch.
nsPR9LG.anchorsInfo: One anchor is 3 bolts, they are about 6 meters from the cliffedge, right from the little tree. Another anchor consists from two main bolts, they are further back, in the counterslope and two more bolts for the backup on the top of the hump, on the left, close to the wall.
nsPR9LG.accessInfo: 20minutes uphill from village Kostolec, you can park next to the log pension.

8Qz2uGz.description: Shapito. Nice line for newbies, quite easy to rig and giving fun.
8Qz2uGz.anchorsInfo: Four 12mm glue bolts on one side and three 12mm glue bolts on another. There is also neighbor anchor that can be used for backup.
8Qz2uGz.accessInfo: About half an hour walk from the old town. You need 30 meters rope for get to the anchor safely from the top of rock.

BFOMU04.name: Feliz Ano Novo
BFOMU04.description: Área particular, deixar o carro na placa de entrada do pico montenegro. Preserve!. Lado A: 4 parabolts de 10 (levar 4 chapeletas de 10) + 1 corda de 80 a 100 mts para ancoragem + cavalete. Lado B 40 metros de corda 4 bolts removíveis ou 4 parabolt...
BFOMU04.anchorsInfo: Lado A: 4 parabolts de 10 (levar 4 chapeletas de 10) + 1 corda de 80 a 100 mts para ancoragem + cavalete. Lado B 40 metros de corda 4 bolts removíveis ou 4 parabolts da via Jujuba (um pouco acima dos bolts removiveis)

yZMNSHl.name: SoHigh
yZMNSHl.description:
never installed, but sure possible
the rock is not the best, we have to test it if we can use regular bolts
an other option would be natural anchors, please check out the sport first

Xyr9RLy.name: El ojo
Xyr9RLy.description: Solo se ha montado una vez mayo info @soldorado_col esto gracias a @jchrise el criss de Valencia abriendo puntos épicos junto a el inglés Txalbi Germán Alex Parri y peru la energía muchachos

s07uwxt.name: Newbie highline
s07uwxt.description:
3 glued 12mm bolts on one side + natural backup
3 glued 12mm bolts on the other side + through the bend 2 big stones as backup
Bring hangers with you
s07uwxt.anchorsInfo:
3 glued 12mm bolts on one side + natural backup
3 glued 12mm bolts on the other side + through the bend 2 big stones as backup
Bring hangers with you.

vsDACzX.name: Falcons take off
vsDACzX.description: Falcons take off is a fun 20m line with easy access to both sides. Finding the spot is done by going to the cattle yard crag, and following the orange markers to the rock face. Side one has 3 main expansion bolts, and one gluein back up. Side two has 3 main and one back up also, but one of the bolts is 10mm instead of 12mm. Bring hangers! Beautiful outlook over the lake, you will also likely end up hanging out with local climbers or falcons.
vsDACzX.anchorsInfo: 12mm stainless bolts, all are expansions expept for the backup on side 1. You will need hangers!
vsDACzX.accessInfo: Approach the cattle yard crag, follow orange markers. Finding the path to the bolts can be tricky, acess to both sides is easy enough from the bottom of the gap though. Tag line with a weighted bag or slingshot, trees make it difficult otherwise

Yq8B1cQ.name: El Juguete
Yq8B1cQ.description: Https://youtu.be/xRLdSB9ta2U. 3 bolts each side. One side easy to access, to get to the other anchor short rappel is needed

X7O0Gtu.name: El Tambo
X7O0Gtu.description: Highline con vistas espectaculares a 4000 m.s.n.m. Tierra privada, Hacienda el Tambo, para acceder contactarse al +593 987682823

wkL9hgq.name: Mother's Cake
wkL9hgq.restriction: partial: Line is located on private property. For now the owner seems to enjoy the presence of the lines, but please be friendly and respectful when approached about it! Also make absolutely sure you leave the spot cleaner than you found it.

tgXPnVw.name: Respeite meu medo!
tgXPnVw.description:
Highline de fácil acesso e o mais longo que temos em Campinas. A montagem requer alguém embaixo da pedreira para fazer o tagline ou utilizando drone.
Montagem tranquila sem necessidade de acesso.
tgXPnVw.anchorsInfo:
Do lado B : 4 bolts 
Lado A: ancoragem natural com redirecionamento em Bolt a frente
tgXPnVw.accessInfo: Na rua sem saída estaciona o carro no fim, e segue a trila que beira o topo da pedreira até o outro lado

EXAKl8S.name: Batline
EXAKl8S.description:
A midle line, not very high but really beautiful in border of the cave. The line was first laid on March 1, 2024. Be careful with the leash, as it can hit the rocks if you're too close to the anchors. You need to present you at Green Climber Home for installation. It's perfect spot because you can sleep and eat nearly at the line. 

Video : https://youtu.be/nE8rczldK-U?si=jx2g9_3g7bqLO8Ti
EXAKl8S.anchorsInfo: The anchors used for the first installation were PETZL Removable Anchor Coeur Pulse 12 MM. The holes are already drilled, but for a new installation you need to bring your own anchors. You need to climb for instalation.
EXAKl8S.accessInfo: cave where green climber home spot

WZPWzT0.name: El Gigante
WZPWzT0.description: Primera linea en este spot. Corta pero precisosa
WZPWzT0.accessInfo: Se debe hacer la via ferrata, el descenso es por otro lado> Es necesario llevar cuerda de escalada para el rappel.

Em8VB_M.name: Druga obrambna linija
Em8VB_M.description: Very good climbing area with a relief feature that was just calling for highline. From small rock spike to overhang spine in the wall. Both sides are vertical wall almost all the way down.  The canyon is full of natural pools. It can be very windy here.
Em8VB_M.anchorsInfo:
Tension side (north): Rock spike. Use natural holes in the rock and 15m static rope for bfk. Or do scorpion with 6,5m spanset. Tree for backup. 
Static side (south): 3x12mm expansion bolts. Use 20m of rope for bfk.  Or 15m + 2m spanset.
Both anchors need padding and some small rope to tie masterpoint down so it doesn't rub.
Em8VB_M.accessInfo:
Tension side: To access you must to pass private land. Best stealthy path could be from the parking area above climbing crag, then up to this abandoned ''road'' and through bushes. We asked the owners and could access through their grass field. They were very friendly.
Static side: Go down in the climbing area, pass the water and follow the ridge to the anchor. Bolts are hidden down on the ledge at obvious overhang.

5oxfYP-.name: Plan D
