nPEU_4i.description: Located entirely on my property, multiple lines can be set up here. 25m height on one side, 30m on the other.
nPEU_4i.restriction: partial: Contact me for access details.
nPEU_4i.anchorsInfo: Three rock anchors are now installed on one side, the other side can be anchored to trees.

q_wISCB.anchorsInfo:
Nearside: Large spruce tree with fixed Tagline
Farside: smaller spruce tree

B7Ph5G7.name: Turbína
B7Ph5G7.anchorsInfo:
One side is super bomber concrete rounded piedestal for a old turbine (8m of spansets). 

Second side is tree, approximately 8m from the edge (90°). Gear: 3 m of spanset for the tree, extended with a rope (25m doubled + 1m spanset for the railing) or spancets (13m). The railing isn't perpendicular to the line, so the extension will move from left to right, this should be avoided. Padding should be used to protect the railing and the extension needs to be visible to cyclists and pedestrians.
B7Ph5G7.accessInfo: In the city center, super easy to get there by public transport (closest are Štvanice or Vltavská)

hUzsYZw.name: Mandingo
hUzsYZw.description: Line rigged in the Pontón the la Oliva, easy to make the conection, easy acces. Recomended to not rig in weekends due to the massive amount of people climbing under the line
hUzsYZw.anchorsInfo: For both anchors: 3 bolts for main and one for the tails/backup. Looking from the bridge, the left one is bolted with 10x90 bolts and the other anchor with MMS. 3.5-4m long spansets leave perfectly the weblock out of the edge.

CUvhb4a.name: Heaven and Erath
CUvhb4a.description: from the highest part of heavenly wall to the top of Terror Incognito

KHfSs7S.name: ŻeLKa
KHfSs7S.description: Highline rigged on Lublin Juggling Convention (ŻeLKa)

LviD_n_.name: Nightjar
LviD_n_.description: Easy to reach line with a nice view over the canyon and climbing crags.
LviD_n_.restriction: none: We asked the local community, as long as nobody complains its good. Prob there are less restrictions since it is a climbing area anyway
LviD_n_.anchorsInfo:
Left side/static side: 3 12mm bolts just below the cliffedge on the wall, redirected to a block on the corner of the cliff. Redirect is then secured to a little tree on the right to make sure it stays in place. (See picture)
Right side/dynamic side: natural anchor. We slinged one of the rocks in the back and extended the anchor (see picture)
LviD_n_.accessInfo: Follow the road towards climbing Parking( sec. Čelinka; sec. Brštane). Its the road behind the road that passes "etno village". Continue this road till the end, park your car here and hike up the path on your right. Follow this till you are almost at the cliff edge and turn right following a small hiking trail. Follow this shortly till you reach the first gap in de cliff.

CPFimFd.name: Soho's big brother
CPFimFd.description: Twin tree's to the far side, over the pinnacle..
CPFimFd.anchorsInfo:
1) Twin tree one side..
2) Stakes or spansets with 15m extension..
CPFimFd.accessInfo:
1) Same approach as 'Soho Sendage'
2) Go all the way around the outside of the quarry and climb the wall..

B4PECMB.name: Mausloch
B4PECMB.description: You can write me for details.

2YufETW.restriction: full: Permission is required for use. For inquiries, please contact us on our Instagram account @bodyproducts.ibaraki.

tpTI4ou.name: Han sido los franceses
tpTI4ou.description:
You're in a natural parc, slackline is not allowed. Don't rig the line for long periods of time as you could get in trouble. Tree on one side, 3 bolts on the other (10mm). 
With 2 ropes of 10m each you can build both anchors. From Benasque go up t...
tpTI4ou.anchorsInfo:
Tree on one side, 3 bolts on the other (10mm). 
With 2 ropes of 10m each you can build both anchors.
tpTI4ou.accessInfo: From Benasque go up to Refugio de Coronas and follow the GR11 up to Ibón Bajo de Vallibierna.

NMGRD55.name: Potato Power
NMGRD55.description: On each sides 2 bolts 12 mm take your own hangers 12 mm
NMGRD55.anchorsInfo: On each sides 2 bolts 12 mm take your own hangers 12 mm

8wIIRak.name: Vai Cavalo
8wIIRak.description: The anchor in the south side is natural . you have one rope with 50 meters or more. and in the other side have four threaded rods with 10mm and 15cm depth. You find many routes in this place because is a first ascent climb in Rio Grande do Sul
8wIIRak.anchorsInfo: The anchor in the south side is natural . you have one rope with 50 meters or more. and in the other side have four threaded rods with 10mm and 15cm depth.
8wIIRak.accessInfo: you find many routes in this place because is a first ascent climb in Rio Grande do Sul.

K-UVNIq.name: The Duck
K-UVNIq.description: Large no fall zone on west/south side (10m)
K-UVNIq.anchorsInfo: Bolted static side (2x), threads and slings on boulders tension side

H6m4FtR.name: Peter Pan
H6m4FtR.description: Nice longer line to the tower.
H6m4FtR.anchorsInfo:
Tension (west) side: 3x glue-in bolts and A-frame.
Static side: tower: 6m spanset

fZfi36S.name: Řízlá Sosna
fZfi36S.description: Permission required. Concrete pillars. Through balcony

ijK8Dyh.name: Yosemite Falls Classic
ijK8Dyh.description: First highline directly over Yosemite Falls.
ijK8Dyh.anchorsInfo: 3 Bat'inox glue-in anchors on both sides.  Use 18 inch (.5 m) spansets to extend the 3 bolts, then equalize a 6 foot (2 meter) spanset from those 3 extended points.  Equalize a 6 foot (2 meter) spanset on the far (Eastern) side.
ijK8Dyh.accessInfo: Hike up the Yosemite Falls trail for 3.6 miles to the Yosemite Falls lookout point.  Anchor is on the other side of the railing.  The Far (Eastern) side requires crossing the river and rappelling down to the tip of the "nose" from 2 trees at the top of the rim.

7m3-wS9.restriction: partial: This line has to be registerd with BAZL.

4KyjjNb.name: Jakes Peak
4KyjjNb.description: Epic line above Emerald Bay, absolutely beautiful exposure. The approach is a bit heinous (steep bushwhacking, chossy scrambling) but worth it. Definitely a full day endeavor.
4KyjjNb.anchorsInfo: 3 bolts each side, nuts and hangers not provided. South side is dynamic, north static.
4KyjjNb.accessInfo: No defined trail. Try not to get cliffed out. Get to the Emerald Bay lot early if you want to find a parking spot.

i5N7hTm.accessInfo: have fun tagging this! It's long, variable length depending where you decide to go

4JJQG4g.name: La bendición de Moctezuma
4JJQG4g.description: 65m highline at Peña de la Muela, Hidalgo.
4JJQG4g.anchorsInfo: 3 SS glue-ins on each side. The far side is on the spire with the cross. It's a 5.8 and a 5.9 climb to the top. 70m climbing rope is recommended for the descent. Watch out for loose rock and holds in this area!

ayMHufJ.anchorsInfo: 3 bolts 10 mm per side, need padding
ayMHufJ.accessInfo: by foot, 10 minutes from the road

8nCHU_M.name: Fedorovsky
8nCHU_M.description: Cool place for highline. I think there is no anchors now, but you always can rig the line using the beam between the columns. A little more work, but no need extra harware.

smNavoe.name: Tin Tan Bell
smNavoe.description: Three anchors per side with chain. The access is very easy. You climb by car towards the top of the "cerro de la campanal" before arriving to the top, you find a parking and from there down a small road, you walk 2 minutes and you find t...
smNavoe.anchorsInfo: Three anchors per side with chain
smNavoe.accessInfo: The access is very easy. You climb by car towards the top of the "cerro de la campanal" before arriving to the top, you find a parking and from there down a small road, you walk 2 minutes and you find the place. It is very easy access is not necessary to climb.

yUg4DXO.name: Last minute
yUg4DXO.description:
It's protected area, but I don't think so that can be a problem. Anchorpoints are ready so you don't  damage anything. Just pad well the concrete blocks. 3 bolts on rock, you need hangers.
Another side is rigg to big concrete blocks that limit the...
yUg4DXO.anchorsInfo:
3 bolts on rock, you need hangers.
Another side is rigg to big concrete blocks that limit the observation deck.

oHeZDNv.name: Pa jo je grofica pobrala
oHeZDNv.description: Only line above climbing crag Gornji Ig with beautiful view on Iški vintgar. Some trees on the static side are quite high. Curtain style rigging recommended.
oHeZDNv.anchorsInfo:
Tension side (north): 2 small trees; use 6m spanset to equalize on both and add 2m spanset over the rock to the edge. Use climbing anchor directly under to tie it down.
Static side (south): 3x 12mm holes for removable bolts; 2,5m spanset, 12m of rope for comfortable access

0KNKqMq.description:
For more details contact Matei or Andrei from Slacksylvania :
slacksylvania@gmail.com or on facebook https://www.facebook.com/slacksylvania/

7RqzdCn.name: Unknown - Castle Hill
7RqzdCn.description: Highline. Natural Anchors both Sides, you cannot bolt in Castle Hill
7RqzdCn.anchorsInfo: Natural on both side. You need 10/15m Spanset/Ropes on one side and at least 2 3m ones in other side. Protect your gear, rock is soft and sharp.
7RqzdCn.accessInfo: Before Castle Hill Village is you are coming from Christchurch. Get into Castle Hill Reserve. Walk flat and turn left when you hit the big wall, then next to the toilet is the highline Spot

inlKBbI.name: Olvido
inlKBbI.description: 70m highline at Peña de la Muela, Hidalgo.
inlKBbI.anchorsInfo: 3 Fixe glue-ins on each side. Rope can be threaded directly through the anchors. Rigging includes climbing a class 3 climbing on the far side, up to the back side of the crag where the static side is. Watch out for loose rock and holds in this area!

C_sk8py.name: La vida no vale nada
C_sk8py.description: Hermoso highline en el cerro de La Bufa a las afueras de Guanajuato. Con 63 m exactos de largo y aprox. 50 de alto y una vista muy escénica.
C_sk8py.anchorsInfo: 3 tensores Fixe de acero PLX de 3/8" por 3.5" o  6.5" de largo en cada lado. Se puede colocar cuerda estática directamente en ellos o se pueden emplear maillones/eslabones o deltas con eslingas.
C_sk8py.accessInfo:
El ascenso es muy simple: se llega en carro hasta la Cueva de San Ignacio de Loyola (https://goo.gl/maps/rHRyuxbAMNt) y desde ahí se camina por el sendero hasta unas escaleras, por donde hay que subir hacia la izquierda hasta el punto más alto cerca de la cruz. Ahí se debe volver a bajar un par de metros en dirección al otro extremo y buscar los anclajes en la roca (N 20.99323° W 101.25282°).

Para el otro extremo hay que subir a la columna de roca en escalada libre y relativamente sencilla, pero hay que tener precaución.

goB1R2s.name: Tom and Sorya Dutchloveline
goB1R2s.description:
Easy acces highline with parking spot and climbing

Possibility to bolts more lines shorter than 100m
goB1R2s.anchorsInfo: 4 bolts m12, plates and nuts missing

xM3Hzuy.name: Sahalie Falls Line
xM3Hzuy.description: Great line in a beautiful location and an easy walk from the parking lot to the anchors.  What more do you need?
xM3Hzuy.anchorsInfo: Trees on either side.  Bring BIG spansets, 8'-10' for one side, and 15'-20' to the other.  On the viewing platform side, use one of the trees outside the railing that has large metal spikes coming out the back.  For the far side anchor find a log upstream to cross and then use the giant tree right by the  edge of the falls.

G4TXWEN.name: First base
G4TXWEN.description: Shortest and least exposed highline at Paradise highline area
G4TXWEN.anchorsInfo: Tree anchors. I use 8 or 10ft green spansets to basket around the trees. Trees have been cleaned and prepped
G4TXWEN.accessInfo: Starting from Purgatory resort parking lot. Take county road 578/Hermosa Parkway. Left turn on Elbert creek road. Park at gate 8, has a few ski trail signs nearby and plenty of room to camp.

oZ-ANPU.name: Jumanji 2.0
oZ-ANPU.description: A longer and more suitable for freestyling highline variation at this spot.
oZ-ANPU.anchorsInfo: Both reachable from the ground. Static side is a bit higher than the tensioning one. Not very noticeable when on nylon.
oZ-ANPU.accessInfo: On tensioning side it's adviseable to use an attached to the anchor slackline that you'd be carrying to the static side anyway to controlably descend quite a steep slope. Helps with ascending back up when deriging and detentioned.

Y-WqkCa.name: Reckless Endangerment
Y-WqkCa.description: A unique deep cove on the Pictured Rocks National Lakeshore with excellent highline potential.
Y-WqkCa.anchorsInfo: Trees! Use tree pro, please do not jeopardize access!
Y-WqkCa.accessInfo: Hike 3.5 miles to Chapel Beach, follow the lakeshore trail west to Chapel Cove

RYD_s3h.name: The Great Arch
RYD_s3h.description: Equalize two trees at the top of the Corkscrew climbing route for tension side, go to obvious mostly level tree on the other side of the great arch about 100ft away. Spanset for that tree with either trad anchor backup or extra static rope to back...
RYD_s3h.anchorsInfo: Equalize two trees at the top of the Corkscrew climbing route for tension side, go to obvious mostly level tree on the other side of the great arch about 100ft away. Spanset for that tree with either trad anchor backup or extra static rope to back up to another tree 20ft or so above the anchor.
RYD_s3h.accessInfo: Follow instructions to climbing area, scramble up fourth class ramp...or bushwack down from the top of the red dot trail.

09MpwMG.name: Cape Farewell – Gabrielle
09MpwMG.description:
Opened in december 2017 by the team Ekiwibristes.
Cape Farewell, Golden Bay, New Zealand.
09MpwMG.anchorsInfo:
Anchors :
Trees and 1m long stakes. On the East side we used a nice tree big enough and a stake + 2 stakes for back up (you could just use the tree and 1 back up stake). On the west side we used 2 small trees and 3 stakes, and backed up with trees further away. See pictures.
Connection :
Walk around with your tagline, easy as bro (start on the highest point in the middle and walk to the anchors, one person each side).
Anchor 1 :
East side : a tree and a stake for main + 2 stakes for back up (you could just use the tree and 1 back up stake) 1x3m 1T sling.
Anchor 2 :
West side : 2 small trees and 3 stakes for main, and backed up with trees further away. 1x1m.
Gear : 
East side : 1x3m 1T spanset + 2*2m 1T spanset + 3 stakes 1m long, 20mm diameter.
West side : 1x1m 1T spanset + 2x2m 1T spanset + 20m static rope + 3 stakes 1m long, 20mm diameter.
09MpwMG.accessInfo: Walk to Cape Farewell from the carpark (2mn) then go over the fence on the south side and walk up to the next bay (10mn)

97MAQF8.name: Plod dolgčasa in svobodne volje
97MAQF8.description: Surprisingly interesting line. From small rock pillar in the middle of trees to edge of rock wall. Established as a solo rig. South anchor is nice to chill on but in summer there is no shade.
97MAQF8.anchorsInfo:
Tension side A (south): 3x 12mm holes for removable bolts; 15m rope BFK and 4m spanset, 1m padding, short rope to tie it down
Static side B (north): From tree across rock pillar. 5m spanset. Needs to be tied down with some 12m rope.
97MAQF8.accessInfo: Park next to the road at statue. Then just up the hill, you can try to find some paths.

7TAWCV2.name: One love
7TAWCV2.description: Aún no montamos esta pero el Spot es perfecto

Lj3SLRW.name: La Dépucellerie
Lj3SLRW.description: Opened by Sébastien Bouchet, Clément Fabre. Novembre 2012.
Lj3SLRW.accessInfo: The parking spot is located here: 43.524056,5.505447 Drive to Le Tholonet from Palette. When you reach “ Le château du Tholonet “ make a left and turn right 300meters further on the “ chemin de la paroisse “. Stop at the end of the slope on the muddy spot. The parking lot is tiny ! So if you plan on parking with more than a couple of cars it is better to park inside Le Tholonet ( here for instance: 43.521901,5.510436 ) to keep parking space for hikers. The line is located here in the Gorges more or less parallel to the bridge of “ la petite mer “ : 43.528405,5.509408 15 to 20 minutes hike, start walking from le chemin de la paroisse, take the right path at the end of the slope to reach the cliff. Enjoy the point of view on la sainte-victoire and hike down along the cliff until you reach the bridge. The 23m is the 2cd line more or less parallel to the bridge.

9sAZD8W.name: Dijon home line
9sAZD8W.description: Jolie petite highline facilement accessible, 5 min de route forestière puis 5 min de marche et voilà. attention à la no fall zone ;)
9sAZD8W.anchorsInfo:
Ancrage départ coté ouest : prévoir 12m élingue / corde pour encercler le bloc à l'arrière et utiliser le petit éperon (visible sur la photo) comme support.
ancrage Est : soit encercler la roche avec le becquet à l'arrière soit redirection autour de la roche depuis la base du sapin.

cdF3NGU.name: El Sueño de Buen Chacho
cdF3NGU.description: Take care about regulations on this area. A pine on one side, 4 holds for MMS in another one
cdF3NGU.anchorsInfo: a pine on one side, 4 holds for MMS in another one

tDCjora.name: I Like it Better On Top
tDCjora.description: Line at the top of the quarry
tDCjora.accessInfo: Walk down from the bus stop car park

WQeDpKA.name: Victoriae reginae
WQeDpKA.anchorsInfo: BFK en ambos lados, uso de 3 bolts. Anclaje  debe de salir de la piedra.

vKZrCuX.description: Trees. Bring gear for two trees on both sides with some distance from each other. Note that there may be sharp cliff edges
vKZrCuX.anchorsInfo: trees. Bring gear for two trees on both sides with some distance from each other. Note that there may be sharp cliff edges.

8KFhZro.name: Profilka
8KFhZro.description: Line with great view on Bled and Dežela.
8KFhZro.anchorsInfo:
Tension side: slings around trees and rocks
Static side: 3x 12mm expansion bolts: 15m abseil
8KFhZro.accessInfo: You can drive to the west side field and park on the edge. The owner of the small house is friendly. Offer him a beer! The line is on the edge of the plateau.

4Doav2w.name: Crane lines
4Doav2w.description: Super easy to rig, take the first cranes you see to avoid any issue's
4Doav2w.anchorsInfo: Its steel so bring treepro for padding

zg1AMMo.name: Valtieri
zg1AMMo.anchorsInfo: Long anchor on main side. Lots of rope needed. Dificult to find. Ask for more info

sZJxppH.description: Easy reach and super easy rig with a bridge beside. More lines around 45m are possible to be rigged between the bridge and trees. But check the conditions of the trees carefully!
sZJxppH.anchorsInfo: 3 bolts each side. Hangers are on site. So just a few quicklinks and slings and a bit of padding needed. Granite of awesome quality.
sZJxppH.accessInfo: 50m walk from bus station or parking spot

k93Ud7B.name: 中国浙江江郎山风景区

u3047xC.description: Rescue me. Highline in Sikati cave. The first highline on island, made in 2013 with the support of Kalymnos rescue team. Super line and place, spectacular from all sides. Easy to rig.
u3047xC.anchorsInfo: Three 10mm wedge bolts both side. On the left one there are also 2 bolts above for backup. On the right side use a big stone for wrapping.
u3047xC.accessInfo: Half an hour trekkiing from the parking on the road.

e9LBnZ6.name: Destel
e9LBnZ6.description: cette ligne n'existe pas (mal tracée sur la map), c'est celle à coté, les infos sont correct
e9LBnZ6.anchorsInfo: Plaquettes d'un côté,3 pour la force et 2 pour le back up (elles y sont toutes)et1 pin de l'autre coté

E3NRO16.name: Wandoorer
E3NRO16.description: most of the line is over water, peaceful during weekdays. Lots of birds and wildlife around. plenty of shade and water to swim in if you get too hot (maybe keep your head out of the water though)
E3NRO16.anchorsInfo:
Eastern side is 4 expansion bolts with hangers, (quick links, static rope and a lot of rope protection required) 
Western side is 2 gumtrees rigged in a Y (slings, tree pro, static rope, and shackles required) a small A frame at the master point would be ideal to get the line level with the eastern side.
E3NRO16.accessInfo:
Access via Rushton road Gosnells. There is a gate 1.4km away from the quarry, it closes at 17h and is closed during 'high fire danger'. The car park 400m from quarry and is susceptible to break in's so leave no valuables in vehicle. 4WD access can be done via Roleystone but it is a rough track via mills road east (along the power line).
Anchor access: It is easier to access eastern side anchor from the north of the quarry (there is a foot trail along the ridge most of the way) consider a 20m rappel rope from eastern anchor to make life easier. Western side is straight forward.
Tag line to start from western anchor, throw down to the waters edge, walk tag line to eastern side at base of cliff, eastern side rigger to pull tag line up on another 20m rope.

8dbMjVc.description: Attention la ligne ne peut pas être marché sur toute sa longueur. Plaquettes. Accès: Rappel sur les buis coté sud et Sur des plaquettes coté nord
8dbMjVc.accessInfo: Accès: Rappel sur les buis coté sud et Sur des plaquettes coté nord.

R1w1lOs.name: El cabrón del león se rie de mi
R1w1lOs.description: Highline in el Cañon de Uceda, 114m rigged on parabolts on both sides
R1w1lOs.anchorsInfo:
The static side (north or the one with the big monolith) is bolted with 4 bolts for main and another one a few meters back for the tails. It's bolted with parabolts 10x90mm. We rigged it with a 15m static rope for equalising and extending it with a spanset of 1.5 meters. Not a lot of protection needed.
The south anchor (the one on top of the climbing routes) it's not as good. There's a big stone with two bolts (it's not the best rock, but we have rigged it only to this 2 points and it was fine), and behind it, 4 meters from the edge, there's 3 solid bolts on good quality rock. Bolts 10x90mm. We rigged to the 2 closests points and made a backup of the rock on the bolts behind, the best I think would be to equalize the back 3 points an extend it, with 2 spansets of 3 meters should be enough. Protection needed for the edge, an also there's a little rock 30cm from the edge, so is good to have a rope protection or similar
All the hangers still on the anchors
R1w1lOs.accessInfo: You can park near the road, in front of a bridge, and go by foot under it. Keep the track until the climbing routes on a 25-30m wall (not the small ones on the forest). there you can split for going to each anchor. For the monolith you have to unclimb a bit and just go straight, for the other one, you keep the track and there's a little path climbing at your left, easy.

NkKmZ4s.name: Seagulls!
NkKmZ4s.description: Abandoned torpedo testing site from World War II
NkKmZ4s.anchorsInfo: Use the stone construction same as trees, about 4 m of spanset needed on each side + more for backup. In any case the anchors look a bit sketchy. I advise to put the tensioning side opposite as I did, that is on the anchor seen on the first photo. The other side has some extra structure on the side which You wouldn't like Your gear to touch.
NkKmZ4s.accessInfo: Torpedownia is located about 500 m off-shore, a kayak / rafting boat is needed to approach.

I0Joo_O.name: Little Porthgwarra
I0Joo_O.description: Big boulders on either side. Take lots of padding
I0Joo_O.anchorsInfo: Big boulders on either side. Take lots of padding.

yRBFtHy.name: Sheila
yRBFtHy.description: Pretty cool line giving a 360 view of oakura bay, best walked during sunset and sunrise. Keep an eye out as dolphins are common in the area. During high tide the headland becomes an island
yRBFtHy.anchorsInfo:
Static side rig of the obvious trees, I equalised off the two to the left using the branch in front as a frame.

Tension side requires a lot of rope or spansets  as there is a big pohutukawa tree 12m back from the edge. I’ve used 60m static folded 4 times or 12m of spansets which will get you around to the big rock of choss
yRBFtHy.accessInfo: Follow the right side or the left side of the island about 7mins to you reach a cove. Then follow the steep choss trail up either side to the anchors. KEEP IN MIND THAT THE ROCK HERE IS SEDIMENTRY COASTAL ROCK. And I guarantee you will not find a rock as weak as this shit

tBqJXgh.name: la cecille
tBqJXgh.description: No permission needed, parking at 300 m

yh6sZVS.description:
Mid-Waterline (Waterline also possible, water is 2.5m deep).

Also as of 02/2023 we have a permaline rigged here (there is a sign with phone numbers in the tree).

To get to the other side either swim or use the old bridge ~500m south.

Please respect the closed for traffic sign and leave your car at the parking lot.
yh6sZVS.anchorsInfo:
East side anchor tree is easily climbable and has a comfortable branch to stand on while rigging.
West side anchor consist of a bunch of smaller trees (~30cm diameter) that share a root. A rope is helpful for climbing. As of 02/2023 we have a rope hanging in the tree.

r-9rzZG.name: Ajdnovi žganci
r-9rzZG.description:
Other side view line on Ajdna. 
Steel wires are in a way. But can be moved if put back.
r-9rzZG.anchorsInfo: Tension side A: Tree, 2m sling. Static side B: Tree, 6m extension over rocks.
r-9rzZG.accessInfo: Static side B is steep to access. 15m rope recommended.

vLOcpqL.name: devers a lenvers
vLOcpqL.anchorsInfo:
5 plaquette cote gauche de la rive .
5 trou en M12 cote droite pour mise en place de plaquette cœur pulse petzl m12.

drhbmkE.name: Laser
drhbmkE.description:
1. Anchor point: has 4 M12 bolts with plates on it .Easy access ancoring with short spansets with no dangerous edge
2. Anchor point: Has 2 M12 bolts with plates on them. They are locate on the back of a rock, padding for a 4m long spanset required, also the line on this side goes 1m above the rockso a crashpad is advisible for the backup if the main line breaks. Backup on a three and a M10 bolt with a plate still on it. 

Beautiful 25m high line with a nice expousure :)

l7vzNYX.name: Windsurfer
l7vzNYX.description: The line is really exposed on the W side, and has a nice place on the E side for people to sit on the ground and watch, on the South anchor, the cliff goes straight down, and on the Northern side of the line, it goes in between 2 trees.
l7vzNYX.restriction: partial: It is a national park, so respect the people, and the animals, don't feed the animals, try to not disturb the nature, and most importantly, try to leave no trace, take with you all the trash, and hang the food, so the animals can't get it.
l7vzNYX.anchorsInfo: The northern anchor is a big and healthy tree, about 5 meters from the edge. The south anchor is 3 12mm stainless bolts.
l7vzNYX.accessInfo: The car can be parked 1 km from the spot, the trail has a bear feeder in between the parking spot and the line, and the last 300 meters is off the path.

5mYIhI-.name: 55m
5mYIhI-.restriction: partial: Only acces for UIAA insured members. Like in Belgium KBF or CAB
5mYIhI-.anchorsInfo: Tree side and rock side with 4 bolts. Rock side access by Via Ferrata use propper VF PBM's
5mYIhI-.accessInfo: Rock side access by Via Ferrata use propper VF PBM's

44X1NQ-.name: Caverna do Dragão - Cave of the Dragon
44X1NQ-.description:
This is the first line that was conquered in Gruta do Lapão. When I first went there in 2023 it already existed but I don´t know for sure who were the people behind this mission on the first occasion. 
Me and my partner went and set up the line on the 23 of february of 2023 and then we came back in november 2024 and put up two more lines along side this one. The trail is quiet easy but its also easy to get lost. If you want to get to know this spot or any of the others in the Chapada Diamantina, get in touch with us for more information.
Follow on instagram at @_desinfluente and @juliabluu to check out some of our other adventures conquering Highlines all over Brasil.
44X1NQ-.accessInfo: You need a Guide to get to this location, get in touch if you´d like to know more at equilibrionomade@gmail.com

p_4lMxz.name: limonada de mango
p_4lMxz.description: highline de anclajes naturales por el frente de una cascada de ochenta metros
p_4lMxz.anchorsInfo:
Anclajes naturales 
el lado A el arbol esta a 8m adentro del borde
p_4lMxz.accessInfo: se puede llegar comodamente caminando a los dos lados

2lt66Np.name: East is a delicate matter
2lt66Np.description: 2 pieces of 40м rope. Spansets 12m in total with protection. By ladder

ikoyNCu.name: Amor de lejos
ikoyNCu.description: Ubicado en el peñon un highline muy escénico
ikoyNCu.accessInfo: Se puede llegar caminando por cualquiera de los dos lados

4Z0op-v.name: Wet Beaver (the 92)
4Z0op-v.description: The desert ecosystem around the Fruit Bowl can be very fragile.  DO NOT gather wood for firewood; bring your own if you want a campfire.  Also, stick to established footpaths so as to not disturb the cryptobiotic soil.  Human waste has been an iss...
4Z0op-v.anchorsInfo:
North anchor has 5 chain bolts with a stabilizer bolt.  The ground is level and could take an a-frame.  9 feet from anchor to stabilizer, 1.5 feet from there to the lip.

South anchor has 4 chain bolts, no stabilizer bolt here.  9 feet from the anchor to the lip.
4Z0op-v.accessInfo: Take UT-313 W and turn right onto Mineral Bottom Road.  Follow that road for 8 miles until it crosses over the only cattle grate.  Turn right soon after that onto a well established off-road trail, and take that the rest of the way to the parking area.

LSIbQmg.name: DniproHES Wall
LSIbQmg.anchorsInfo: you'll need 6 climbing bolt "ears" 10mm diameters and 6 nuts for them. 2 more if you want to rig 40m waterline below
LSIbQmg.accessInfo: Just ask for "Zaporizhia Сossack museum", and then follow north

lQq8YOY.restriction: full: Permission is required for use. For inquiries, please contact us on our Instagram account @bodyproducts.ibaraki

J8d03hU.name: fusilla
J8d03hU.description:
very easy to access. the line stays right above the casa cantoniera restourant (very king and helpfull owner and staff) parking lot. you can camp overnight and there's water, a lot.
for infos find SLACKLINE BRESCIA ASD on facebook and ask us!
J8d03hU.anchorsInfo:
west anchor got 4 bolt on the rock over the gallery's wall, we setted up a iron ladder, if there isn't just climb in front of the restaurant and walk along the wall.
east anchor, the hard one, either you "climb" the valley throght the trees on the right of the wall and repel 10m down from a tree, either you come down from the road on the other side of the valley. you'll find some bolt here we used to rig this and the other line, usually 4 system bolt.

no need of padding both sides are hanging, not touching the rock

DpD1oBT.name: West Cape Howe
DpD1oBT.description:
65m Line around the climbing crags at West Cape Howe National Park. It is the furtherest point south in WA (next stop south is Antarctica).
Beautiful, not too exposed, often windy and a lot of salt spray.
DpD1oBT.anchorsInfo: 4 Glue in 10mm eye bolts both sides, 15 odd meters of static rope each side and a little rope protection is required, there are posts around to prop the master point up.
DpD1oBT.accessInfo: Access to the crag is by foot (4km from shelly's beach road) or by a 4WD with low range and decent clearance,reduce tire pressure, the sand is soft, steep and pitted in some spots, (recovery equipment and an air compressor is a must) you can park vehicles within 100m of the line.

3f4xGZx.name: Hall of Horrors
3f4xGZx.description: Super fun and aesthetic beginner highline at the Hall of Horrors in JTree! There are some good trad and sport climbing routes in this immediate area as well.
3f4xGZx.anchorsInfo:
3 bolts with hangers on each side. Rebolted in 2016 by Shawn Snyder and Dave Kingston.
Hangers are sharpish so bring quicklinks.
8m - 10m of static rope is fine for either anchor.
3f4xGZx.accessInfo:
Park at the Hall of Horrors area. Walk south around the back of the leftmost rock and scramble up the ramp to the top. The second highest point on this rock is where most people will hang out. You must cross a small gap to get to the anchor. Some people have a bit of trouble getting across but its easy enough.
Tagging the static side is somewhat trickier. To summit the rock you take a airy traverse, so being prepared with a rope and a couple cams could help. You can leave this rope on the static side to repel with when derigging.

CcsjEYA.name: Scarier Than Sex
CcsjEYA.description: Main om Level line across the pool of the quarry
CcsjEYA.anchorsInfo: Trees far back from the edge on each side. Use multiple trees on the car park side.
CcsjEYA.accessInfo: From the car park walk down the path on and then hop the fence foe one anchor. For the far side carry on up the hill nutil you reach a barbed wire fence. Hop over this and then follow the edge of the quarry around.

V5lThGv.name: O Presente secreto
V5lThGv.description: The secret is a beautiful highline, located between the soft beach and Joaquina beach, on a secret beach, the first giant highline of the island of florianopolis, chemical anchorage, with abseiling access on the north side, and access by trail on the side south.

Dk8ubxs.name: Cromagnon
Dk8ubxs.description: Highline straight over the main gap of Natural Bridge, right over the waterfall.

bPQXQ5e.name: HS 40
bPQXQ5e.description: Shorter OG line fairly well sheltered. CAUTION - this line must be rigged with a high stretch webbing or bungees. Webbing can be walked around the gap with no obstruction.
bPQXQ5e.restriction: none: Be respectful of climbers, this is a BMC owned quarry so if the climbers complain about slackliners then it will create access issues.
bPQXQ5e.anchorsInfo:
East anchor - 4 glue-ins (Ca. 2013) Shared with 20m.

West anchor - 4 glue-ins (Ca. 2013) Shared with 70m.
bPQXQ5e.accessInfo: Park at the main Horseshoe Quarry carpark or lay-bys, approach the quarry then follow the track up the hill to the right. Once level with the top of the quarry follow the path to the left, up a few steps then carefully make you way the large tree.

0foknIS.name: Morski pas
0foknIS.anchorsInfo: 2 glueins 12mm and 1x 10mm for backup both sides.
0foknIS.accessInfo: Anchors positioned on the top of sharks head and on the wall above those green ledges (access from below)

uhbU4tO.description: An easy to rig longer highline in a decent climbing area. 10min from car to either anchor.

nccN_Nc.anchorsInfo: Big white tree on the far side by the house. Large obvious tree on the side by the forrest. Need static ropes and jumar to jug up to both anchors

LPpCT6F.name: High Level Dreams
LPpCT6F.description: Restricted access. Rig this line discreetly. Early weekend morning.

ivB5DcP.name: Polêmica
ivB5DcP.description:
This line took many weeks to be set up and conquered, with no drone, the line was passed crossing by foot and bypassing the vegetation.  We were able to camp and live on the spot for weeks just training and having fun, we also received many visitors, including many of which who had never went on a Highline before. So we initiated many people on the line. There were gatherings and many beautiful moonlit nights at this place, I´m thankfull for this experience. This is one of the many lines conquered by me and my partner while traveling all over Brasil in search for spots to put up the most incredible Highlines. The trail is quiet easy but its also easy to get lost. If you want to get to know this spot or any of the others in the Chapada Diamantina, get in touch with us for more information.
Follow on instagram at @_desinfluente and @juliabluu to check out some of our other adventures conquering Highlines all over Brasil.
ivB5DcP.restriction: partial: This line is called "Polêmica" because eventually after many weeks leaving on the spot and receiving visitors from all over the Diamantina , We were asked to take down the line and threatened to receive penaltys by the local ICMBIo (the guards of the national park area)
ivB5DcP.accessInfo: kind of prohibited but climbing is allowed there so we feel like its unfair not to be able to Highline also, and we do it anyway.

13oBndz.name: Gertrude Saddle, Levitating Cactus
13oBndz.description:
Opened in February 2017 by the team Ekiwibristes.
Gertrude Saddle, Darran Mountains, New Zealand.
13oBndz.anchorsInfo:
* Connection :
Easy as, walk around the lake with your tagline.
* Anchor 1 :
East side : Follow the cables around the lake, then walk 200m following the cairns, you reach a single boulder laying above a slab. 3 expansion bolts 12mm, bring your hangers. 1x3m 1T spanset, back up on the boulder behind.
* Anchor 2 :
West side : Cross the stream exiting the lake, pass the bivvy spot and climb up north west to the top of a big slab easily seen from the other anchor (a clear rock overhanging a ledge). 1x3m 1T spanset, back up on the boulder behind.
13oBndz.accessInfo: Walk to the Black Lake on the way to Gertrude Saddle.

BAkOxBn.name: The Crucifix
BAkOxBn.description: A cool highline off of the edges of the sheep rock cliffs. Maybe one of the most exposed highlines in Montana, but certainly the most exposed in the Bozeman area.
BAkOxBn.restriction: partial: The approach crosses through private land. Get permission!
BAkOxBn.accessInfo: Get permission from the Christian camp to cross their bridge, hike is around the south east side of the formations

tlWV0r6.anchorsInfo: Bolts on both sides. Vertical anchor on far side.

ZqkK3Wz.name: Czysty Koszmar
ZqkK3Wz.description: You need to buy entrance ticket
ZqkK3Wz.anchorsInfo: left side sling holes, right side boulder

JydNi_5.description: Goes from the bolts on the jumping rock to the tree right across. Make sure you check the bolts before using them. Great beginner highline.
JydNi_5.anchorsInfo: 3 bolts on one side, a tree on the other.
JydNi_5.accessInfo: Just park right by the little lookout there, or in the cemetary and hike in 10 minutes.

-u1a_8f.description:
never installed, but sure possible
the rock is not the best, we have to test it if we can use regular bolts,
an other option would be natural anchors or a dead man anchor,
please check out the sport first

DTvF0fX.name: Vyhliadka
DTvF0fX.description: Beautiful really exposed highline over the road in Maninska Gorge
DTvF0fX.anchorsInfo: 4 bolts on the one side, trees on the other side (at least 10 meters worth of spansets needed)
DTvF0fX.accessInfo: 15 minutes walk from the parking lot

vndPX4x.name: Baby line
vndPX4x.description: Impressive highline parallel to the canyon in one of the V shaped gaps. Both ankers are easy to reach from the road, minimal approach through the bushes. Line is a bit off level but these anchors were the best option of not having a ledge close below the line.
vndPX4x.restriction:
none: There has been another highline in the second part of the canyon, we think we saw the bolts but they were destroyed. We dont know why. This line is in the first and higher part of the canyon and more hidden.
wildcamping possible 3 minutes walking distance.
vndPX4x.anchorsInfo: Both sides are bolted with 3 12mm bolts, they re clearly visible on the top of the cliff
vndPX4x.accessInfo:
Coördinates of our dynamic anchor: 40.468075,20.258890. For location of other anchor see the picture of the line.
Btw enter the canyon from the north side, so through Berat. From the south its only possible with a 4x4 car.

h2FaJRU.name: Ursa major
h2FaJRU.description: Holcomb Valley Pinnacles is a great sport climbing crag near Big Bear lake. This is the biggest line here at the moment.
h2FaJRU.anchorsInfo: Build the norther anchor by wrapping the top of the "Gun Smoke Wall" with static rope and spansets.  The Southern anchor is bolted, with two large threaded glue-in bolts (bring bolt hangers and nuts) for the main anchor, and smaller climbers bolts further back as a backup.
h2FaJRU.accessInfo: The highline is in the Central Pinnacles area of Holcomb valley. The southern anchor can be accessed with an easy scramble to the top of the"Sky Slab" .  The northern anchor is atop "Gun Smoke Wall" and is a 4th class scramble as well.

eFiJSo7.name: Surfista dos Pampas
eFiJSo7.description:
PT: highline de 26m com acesso e instalação fácil. 
Base#1 (à menos exposta, lado Sudoeste) com duas chapas para a instalação da ancorarem principal; uma chapa de 12mm en inox colocada 18/02/2016, a outra de diâmetro menor ja estava presente, em relativo bom estado; mais dois pontos estão presentes mais para tras, usei estes para o backup. Usei a Base#1 para a tensão da fita. Recomendo utilizar uma mochila ou algo semelhante como A-frame logo abaixo do "main point" da ancoragem principal.

Base#2: do lado Leste, Nordeste, mais exposto lado oceano, ancoragem principal em três pontos, eu usei duas equalisaçoes (ver foto); cuidado a chapa do lado mais externo da pedra esta bem enferrujada e nao recomendo sua utilização. Substitui esta por um ponto novo, 12mm inox colocado 18/02/16. backup primeiro no "main point" e depois amarrado ao redor do bloco de pedra logo atras da ancorarem. Precisa proteger bem os slings da ancoragem contra abrasão na pedra.

--

EN: 26m highline with easy access and installation.
Base # 1 (the least exposed on South-West side) with two plates for the installation of the main anchor; 12mm inbox bolt placed 02/18/2016, the other bolt has smaller diameter and it was already present in relative good condition; two points are also present further back, used these for backup. I used the Base # 1 for the tension. I recommend using a backpack or something similar as an A-frame just below the "main point" of the main anchor.

Base # 2: East Side, Northeast, more exposed ocean side, main anchor with three points, I used two equalisations (see photo); be careful NOT TO USE the bolt on the outer side of this stone, it is badly rusted and I do not recommend its use. Replaced this with a new 12mm stainless bolt placed 02/18/16. backup first in the "main point" and then tied around the stone block just behind the anchor. Need to protect the slings against abrasion with the rock.

1wEwk0r.description: Bolts are instaled you will need 6screws and hangers,  and your gear haha
1wEwk0r.anchorsInfo: Bolts are instaled you will need 6screws and hangers,  and your gear haha

t_RkOwx.name: EstiloLivras (sem fumo, sem paracord e sem desculpas)
t_RkOwx.anchorsInfo: ancoragem na pedra com utilização de Aframe

yMRA3VZ.name: The Tagline
yMRA3VZ.description: Hundred meter line above the pine tree forest, natural anchors on both sides and a cave to spend the night.
yMRA3VZ.anchorsInfo:
6 slings surrounding a big ass rock in the west anchor, backep up to a rock and a pine tree with 50m of static rope. 
Pine trees as main and backup anchors, around 5 or slings in total and edge rock as a frame in the east anchor.
yMRA3VZ.accessInfo:
Easy hike to the anchors from the parking, less than 20 minutes. 
There's a big cave on the valley to spend the night.

hO7hwFi.name: Peace of mind
hO7hwFi.description: To pass the webing, use cord 130m. One side has 4x 10mm bolts, the other is a tree. Easy access down the slope
hO7hwFi.anchorsInfo: One side has 4x 10mm bolts, the other is a tree.

V1qWBrl.name: Waterfall Ugrić
V1qWBrl.description: The Highline is above the waterfall of the river Ugrić. First time rigged by Slacknetz Leipzig. Reachable with car, its a dirt road to the waterfall
V1qWBrl.anchorsInfo: We rigged on trees on both sides
V1qWBrl.accessInfo: On the road side there's a rock, reachable around to the top and possible to rig on the trees. On the other side, we rigged higher up on the trees

SdrGMJh.name: Devels Horn
SdrGMJh.description: from the Devels Horn rock to Terror Incognito

48JhQkV.name: Concrete Everywhere
48JhQkV.description: Small urban line in Bratislava on remains of old shopping center, first established in 2012.
48JhQkV.anchorsInfo: Around supporting collumns - 4m of spansets needed for each side.
48JhQkV.accessInfo: Access is easy, walk through hole in fence, and go by stairs to third floor (top floor is possible only in shorter length, because of missing columns).

xfX7UsQ.description: Not yet rigged, but uses bolts for the 45m and slings boulders on the far side. Possible you’ll get wet in the middle at a wide range of tides.

fTrykfe.name: Big Long Project
fTrykfe.description:
/!\ You'll need to ask permission to the mayor, go to the spot page to see the protocol.
A slightly longer alternative to the 110m. The right side anchor follows the form of the cliff however the bolting is unorthodox due to poor rock quality and requires a bit of creative triangulation to make it work.
fTrykfe.restriction: partial: Before the 1st of september might be restricted because of bird nesting. See the spot page for all the infos.
fTrykfe.anchorsInfo:
Left anchor
Three expansion bolts and a backup bolt further back which are all painted black. Avoid using the other bolts which are intended for climbing.
Right anchor
Several bolts and glue-ins on a 1m ledge a bit futher than the main chill area . Various configurations can be used and in all cases will require a bit of extension and padding. WARNING : one bolt is under recall from petzl and should not be used at all. It's also in straight pull. Better to use the glue-ins and bolts in shear below

XB_MKee.name: Consett Viaduct
XB_MKee.anchorsInfo: Multiple tree anchors to choose from

AfQQ_K_.name: Atlantis
AfQQ_K_.description: Only possible, when waterlevel is very low.
AfQQ_K_.restriction:
partial: Due to sensitive relationship with the Verbund (owner of the lake)  highliners need a membership at Sportverein slackline.at for an insurance. 
Please contact slackline.at, before highlining there!
AfQQ_K_.anchorsInfo:
farside: tree 
nearside: 3 M12 bolts without hangers

M5_Y2kb.name: AquadeiVescovi
M5_Y2kb.description: Nice highline in a little canyon with more possibilities of lines we set up a joker and was great
M5_Y2kb.anchorsInfo: Tree anchors both sides , big solid tree ,
M5_Y2kb.accessInfo: Walking about 15 min from the parking below

C7eLMm8.name: Marina Får Life
C7eLMm8.description: Place with lots of lose and cracky rock. Spancets huging rocks and 60m rope each side for equalization. Plus slings for backups. 20 Minutes walk from the car park
C7eLMm8.anchorsInfo: Spancets huging rocks and 60m rope each side for equalization. Plus slings for backups.
C7eLMm8.accessInfo: 20 Minutes walk from the car park

J3mWZV2.name: Hala
J3mWZV2.description: Old train repair hall. One can rig here almost endless combinations of highlines. It's possible to rig an floatline here up to 100m long.
J3mWZV2.anchorsInfo: Steel and thick construction of hall. It's very easy to rig a line here.

5gTfjnw.name: Dancing with Shadows
5gTfjnw.description: Established, rigged, and first sent all at night. Good little addition to the 201m, as the 51m can't be rigged when the 201m is up.
5gTfjnw.anchorsInfo:
East - Main - 2 Ring Bolts (RB)
    - Backup - 3 RB from 201m anchor.
   West - Main/Backup - 3 RB
5gTfjnw.accessInfo: For the west side there is a small exposure ledge that leads out to the anchor. A potential safety line can be established from the bushes, or a short rappel into the anchor.

2iUIW6d.name: Diagon-alley
2iUIW6d.description:
5 bolts with hangers on either side.
Quicklinks are essential. 
Bolts have been placed to fit a 3m roundsling. Master point of right hand anchor needs to be extended. Easy scramble on either side. One can access the line from the Farm house or Tra...
2iUIW6d.anchorsInfo:
5 bolts with hangers on either side.
Quicklinks are essential. 
Bolts have been placed to fit a 3m roundsling. Master point of right hand anchor needs to be extended.

NkTlVFP.name: OKIN
NkTlVFP.description:
2024 Slackline Berlin managed to rig this beauty, just before the renovation of the stadium started. According to the management these two masts will not be taken down.

Dedicated to one of Berlin's OG highliners, for being strong on and off the lines.
NkTlVFP.restriction: full: Permission by the stadium authorities is crucial.
NkTlVFP.accessInfo: Leaders inside the light masts, doors are locked.

BFK (3 bolts)

A-frame (already there)

1nZk80R.name: Jaan Line
1nZk80R.anchorsInfo: 3 bolts each side, far side with plates

CGy5kqY.name: ELOHIM

8h3Fl8Y.name: Hikuwai 60m
8h3Fl8Y.description: A line from the main trees/hangout spot in Hikuwai over to the top of a far tree. Spot has been used for the wanaka Permarig in the past
8h3Fl8Y.anchorsInfo: Pine trees both sides, far side requires climbing a tree around 20m up. Close side is accessible from the ground
8h3Fl8Y.accessInfo: Walk in from the road in northlake or along the outlet track. Crosses private land so be considerate

Y4oP7PH.name: Concrete Lunch
Y4oP7PH.description: Natural anchors. On the tree side use one short spanset for main an a longer one (2.5-3 m) for backup to attach it to a separate branch behind. On the hospital side either attach both mainline and backup to the same pillar (3m spansets will work b...
Y4oP7PH.anchorsInfo: Natural anchors. On the tree side use one short spanset for main an a longer one (2.5-3 m) for backup to attach it to a separate branch behind. On the hospital side either attach both mainline and backup to the same pillar (3m spansets will work best), or attach backup to a different pillar behind for extra safety, but for this you need about 8-10 m of spanset
Y4oP7PH.accessInfo: Hospital ascend same as for the "Solid Security" line. The tree is a relatively easy climb.

7TYAuRF.name: Smashing pumpkin
7TYAuRF.description: Very nice and easy to rig line
7TYAuRF.anchorsInfo: For the circle you need M18 nuts to connect. Other side (north) is easy to connect with spansets.

4uSxcRJ.name: Pod Borsukiem
4uSxcRJ.description: The longest highline in Poland so far (13.04.2019)
4uSxcRJ.anchorsInfo:
"Kula": Big tree on the edge
"Żabi Koń": Wrap around rocks on top (around 10-12m of slings)

C8q1PJD.name: Retarded Breakfast
C8q1PJD.anchorsInfo:
Tension side: tree; 7m spanset, 1m spanset on tree for height.
Static side: tree; 2m spanset. ~20m abseil on steep hill.

r8hdzkS.name: El Cascarudo
r8hdzkS.description: 5 chapas de cada lado. Facil acceso con treking de ambos lados
r8hdzkS.accessInfo: facil acceso con treking de ambos lados

kVubekF.name: Mallasa rock fest
kVubekF.description: Very aerial view of the city of La Paz.  It is visible from the road.
kVubekF.accessInfo: 5 minutes walking from the road and two routes to climb.  On the left a 7a.

c3Dw8Ox.description: 4 bolts on every anchor. 2 meters from the edge
c3Dw8Ox.anchorsInfo: 4 bolts on every anchor. 2 meters from the edge

rL27MC9.name: Skor 300
rL27MC9.description: Long line but it doesn't look like, because you mostly walk above forest.
rL27MC9.restriction: partial: Ask SlackAlien before rigging for air traffic info.

7XrfvjE.name: Fasting Frogs
7XrfvjE.description: Very quiet line above some questionable water that you can't swim in. Shade most of the day can be found at the dynamic (west) side. Could rig massive lines here if you have the gear and energy!
7XrfvjE.anchorsInfo:
Natural Anchors 
Dynamic: Big boulder and a tree equalised together
Static: Big boulder with another for backup
7XrfvjE.accessInfo: Can park easily anywhere nearby the road, 10/15 minute walk to anchors.

fskO90k.name: Unnamed
fskO90k.description: Ligne super belle. Difficile de passer la tagline. Surveiller les vents avant de rigger. 110m un peu offlevel
fskO90k.anchorsInfo:
Coté statique: arbre et sling. 5m de sling pour se rendre au bord de la falaise

Coté tension: 3 arbres égalisé avec corde (20m env) et extension en élingues (env 5m). Passer la ligne en bas de la rembarde du belvédère à droite.
fskO90k.accessInfo:
Stationnement 1 coin route du Mont-Blanc/132. Marche de 1h

Stationnement 2 coin route du Mont-Blanc et sentier de la Grande Crevasse. (Montée en véhicule relativement sportive..) 

Suivre le sentier de la Grande Crevasse jusqu'au belvédère de la Petite Crevasse. Les ancrages seront ensuite très évidents.

0d7BdtP.name: Balls line
0d7BdtP.description: Very hard to rig. Can´t climb the balls, so we needed to rappel down from the tower. Needed 100ms of spansets. Will be tried again soon with static ropes instead.

Id3a9X-.name: Onde o vento faz a curva
Id3a9X-.description: Para acessar o platô para as ancoragens da linha é necessário rapel ou desescalada. Pode ser feito uma transposição do abismo em 10m no plano inclinado usando ancoragem natural. Nesse caso é necessário proteção para a abrasão. Pedra Grande - Igarapé

PkyeVFm.name: AdolfoStepa
PkyeVFm.description:
4200 msnm, dificult to find secondary anchor in Adolfo Calle, 5 bolts, bad quality rock
Main side, 3 bolts, easy access

70W80cU.description: Massage. Newbie line easy to rig and walk. Perfect for warming up before other lines on this spot.
70W80cU.anchorsInfo: Three 12mm wedge bolts on both side. You need hangers.
70W80cU.accessInfo: Ascend from Luchistoe takes 1.5-2 hours. The road goes along the beautiful valley of ghosts. You can also get on a solid 4x4.

XqUTdsk.name: Excalibur
XqUTdsk.description: Most beautifull spot on this quarry
XqUTdsk.anchorsInfo: Removable bolts on both sides, Backup back to the tree. Neaded slings 1,5m on one side and 3m on the other + 2x 15m static rope for backup

JFnXd8t.name: Eucaliptus
JFnXd8t.description: para montar esta cinta, se necesita subir el eucaliptus de lado B, por cuerda fija
JFnXd8t.anchorsInfo:
Lado B: Eucaliptus, acceder con cuerda fija 6 metros
Lado B: Se utiliza otra chañar, con frame

qDNVQKD.name: Unconquered
qDNVQKD.description: Spansets on the columns, without anchors. Use stairs :)
qDNVQKD.anchorsInfo: Spansets on the columns, without anchors

BxbfY5a.name: Serengeti 4
BxbfY5a.description: At the mouth of the gulley
BxbfY5a.anchorsInfo: 3 bolts either side. 2 glue ins with 1 expansion. can back up to a boulder on the west side.

iZbIL4L.name: DniproHES Wall 35m
iZbIL4L.description: Some really cheap anchors were used to rig it. Watch carefully before rigging and while using
iZbIL4L.anchorsInfo: Take 9-12 nuts d=10mm and "ears" for the bolts

VufwH7E.name: Partner Check
VufwH7E.description:
Nice line with beautiful view. Not very high but high enough to be safe and have some exposure. Easy connexion from down. Natural anchor. Longest highline in Poland when it was open, in July 2016.
Open by Antony Newton and Laetitia Gonnon
VufwH7E.anchorsInfo:
Natural Anchor. On the side of the cross, you need 10m of slings to go around a huge rock formation (on the left side of the cross when you look towards the line) and then your sling will go over a rock (use a lot of padding and use the lunule to make a redirection point). With 10m of sling the weblock is out of the cliff. 

On the other side, 7m of slings is needed. 3m around the tree + schackle + 4m extension to be outside of the cliff.
VufwH7E.accessInfo: Park in Kobylany village, next to the fireman station. Walk towards the climbing spot in the main valley (10min walk). The line is over the walking path, from the right tower (with a cross at the top, you can either climb it in 2-3 pitches, or walk around by using the stairs). Left side, you have to walk up the hill and find a way up between the rocks. The anchor is the lonely big tree (oak) that you reach from the left.

8sL025l.name: Les Grands Malades
8sL025l.restriction: partial: Only acces for UIAA insured members, like in Belgium KBF or CAB

dA4-9ex.name: Sinas and cola
dA4-9ex.description: 80 m line with very nice exposure, easily handtaggable by walking the tagline along the ridge, just need to throw over one tree
dA4-9ex.anchorsInfo: 3 Titanium glue in bolts on each side

_fbPNpE.name: Toca Toca
_fbPNpE.description: Maior highline do Brasil 2025. Conquistado entre os dias 12-22 de março com uma equipe de 25 atletas de todo Brasil.
_fbPNpE.anchorsInfo: 6 bolts de cada lado com mais 3 bolts para linhas de vida e estaiar os cavaletes
_fbPNpE.accessInfo: Acesso por caminhada do lado A (morro da toca), Acesso por escalada no lado B (morro do crocodilo). Necessario uma corda de escalada de 60m, 8 costuras - graduação 7a BRA

c9vIcyc.name: Please don´t fall
c9vIcyc.description: Parking at the service station of la Cabrera. Going up the hill is easier on the other side via the white/yellow marked path. When you arrive at the path on the top you just cross it and already arrive at the Sector 1 of La Cabrera

OPv5VG4.description: Next obvious line out. Many variations as there are lots of anchor options.

yDss_P6.name: Risky Rock
yDss_P6.description:
Established by Chris W and Antek M, 2015
FA by Antek M

TmmgNwS.name: Objectif lunules
TmmgNwS.description:
Ligne ouverte par Antoine Mesnage, Ma Ho, Nathan et Clovis Paulin en 2019. 

/!\ Les points côtés Pointe Percée ont été enfoncés, il est toujours possible de mettre la ligne avec les lunules percées et un point d'escalade. /!\

La légende raconte qu'ils sont montés avec tout le matériel pour équiper la ligne, mais qu'ils ont oublié les goujons.

L'ouverture a donc été faite sur les lunules, puis elle a été équipée en 2025.

Ligne accessible unique via l'arête du doigt, ce qui fait un combo vraiment magnifique. L'approche, la grimpe et la highline représentent une bonne grosse journée. Mais la ligne en vaut clairement le coup. Vue imprenable sur tous les massifs environnants.
TmmgNwS.anchorsInfo:
Coté doigt : 2 spit de 12mm au sommet du doigt. Un point du relais et une lunulle percé à gauche  du relais pour le Back-up.

Côté Pointe Percée : 2 spit de 12mm, une lunule naturelle et une lunule percée.

/!\ Les points côtés Pointe Percée ont été enfoncés, il est toujours possible de mettre la ligne avec les lunules percées et un point d'escalade. /!\
TmmgNwS.accessInfo:
Se rendre au Col des Annes. Attention les GPS on tendances à faire passer par une piste alors qu'il y a un accès route.
Suivre le sentier qui mène au refuge de Gramusset. 
100m avant celui-ci, juste avant un petite barre rocheuse, traversée en suivant une ligne de querne. Rejoindre une sente dans  gros pierrier qui amène au pied de la voie 

Pour la grande voie se référé au topo "Borne Aravis Tome 1" ou Camp to camp.

La descente se fait par la voie normale en suivant des points Rouges.

Il est possible de s'échapper par une vire avant les 3 dernières longueurs légèrement plus dures.

MoophpH.name: Unknown
MoophpH.description: Parking at the service station of la Cabrera. Going up the hill is easier on the other side via the white/yellow marked path. When you arrive at the path on the top you just cross it and already arrive at the Sector 1 of La Cabrera
MoophpH.anchorsInfo:
West anchor: you have to climb a small tower that is the outest rock of that cliff next to the 44m "Please don´t fall" Bolts are very obvious
East Anchor: unknown

HjRhmi8.description: Beautiful +300m highline from viewpoint rock to Al Lègne.
HjRhmi8.restriction: partial: Obligatory to be CAB / KBF member, or an UIAA affiliated club

HKe6ePV.name: Vladan
HKe6ePV.description:
The side which is not anchored is the piece of the fortres,is realy strong to tenson line safely,inspected over 3 sessions :)
The left side anchoring point,contains 2 bolts and natural anchoring point(around "rounded" stone
HKe6ePV.anchorsInfo:
The side which is not anchored is the piece of the fortres,is realy strong to tenson line safely,inspected over 3 sessions :)
The left side anchoring point,contains 2 bolts and natural anchoring point(around "rounded" stone.

Ka4iHnz.name: Acarajé de 5 reais
Ka4iHnz.description:
This line was a dream invisioned many years before it was actually done. Giovanne, my partner, used to go there and always dream of walking and conquering this spot, but at the time he didn´t have enought webbing to cross the whole distance. In december 2024, after 3 years he came back and finally we could do it. We invited our friends who live in Ilhéus to help out and enjoy our days camping by the beach and highlining everyday. The name of the line is in honour of the best and cheapest acarajé ever, only found in ilhéus. This is one of the many lines conquered by me and my partner while travelling all over Brasil looking for spots. If you want to get to know this spot or any of the others in Bahia, get in touch with us for more information.
Follow on instagram at @_desinfluente and @juliabluu to check out some of our other adventures conquering Highlines all over Brasil.
Ka4iHnz.restriction: none: This line has no specific restriction but after a couple of days of walking on the line, the navy military asked us to take down because it could cause trouble in case of a big ship crossing below the bridge, so we took this one down and set up another line, closer to the coast and out of the way of the ships. In reality, only small boats pass in this area.
Ka4iHnz.accessInfo: easy , go in by the entrance of the restaurant called "restaurante do morro"

jj4ZhJh.name: La Pendenta 260
jj4ZhJh.description: Highline next ro the hanging bridge La Pendenta
jj4ZhJh.restriction:
partial: Please contact Grischa Slack: info@grischaslack.ch

Those lines are higher then 25m, so they need to be announced at BAZL by SwissHighline. Your contact there for the region: ramun@swiss-highline.ch
jj4ZhJh.anchorsInfo:
Riggingside:
One tree
3x removable expansion bolts
Big a frame
Ca 20m of roundslings or static rope required

Farside:
Two trees
Redirection hogh in ine tree.
With ca. 20m roundslings or staticrope.
jj4ZhJh.accessInfo: For rigging this line you will have to contact Grischa Slack, the local slackline club. There you‘ll find more information

6D7GZCn.restriction:
partial: Highline spot on the “Forest ofTHEN” property.
Entrance fee required.
For more information, visit @forest_of_then on Instagram.

I1XbBPr.name: Kibbeh
I1XbBPr.description:
4 bolts on each side.
need for each side: 
35ft or more of static rope, 3m spansets for extension, LOTS of padding, 4 quicklinks
I1XbBPr.anchorsInfo:
4 bolts on each side.
need for each side: 
35ft or more of static rope, 3m spansets for extension, LOTS of padding, 4 quicklinks

-3_aWXc.name: Cold Turkey
-3_aWXc.description: A good, more moderately long highline at Smith Rock
-3_aWXc.anchorsInfo: three bolts on each side that will accommodate static rope.
-3_aWXc.accessInfo: The quickest way to the top of the gulley is to hike directly up through Agro or Cocaine gulley.  From the bridge into the park, follow the river before turning uphill following the climbers trail up through either Cocaine or Agro Gulley.  Either are a steep slog uphill, but Cocaine gulley has a 1 move boulder problem mid way.  Alternatively, you can hike up Misery Ridge, and then around towards the Monkey before hiking downhill towards the anchors, though this is much longer.

PqX1MNK.name: El Milagro
PqX1MNK.description: Beautiful line with a lot of exposure and amazing views.
PqX1MNK.accessInfo: One of the sides is a viewpoint and the other is a spine that has to be trad climbed.

qriSXnI.name: The Col
qriSXnI.description: The most exposed line of it's length in the country.
qriSXnI.accessInfo: You have 2 different approaches for each side and the east side requires and abseil.

0CLZvoW.name: Enigma do Gigante
0CLZvoW.anchorsInfo:
Lado A: Ancoragem natural
Lado B: Bolts

-2tR_53.name: ililine
-2tR_53.description: Bolted, eays setup, hard to walk because of the waves! many local slacklines on the beach.

gfWs87D.description: Nice Highline, easy rigging because of fixed tagline.
gfWs87D.anchorsInfo:
Farside: Large spruce tree, > 2,5 m spanset

Tensioning side: ca. 2 meters rappel (there is an old fixed rope for orientation). 
4 wedge bolts with hangers.

We usually tension the line at the spruce tree for comfort, both is possible...

The tagline is permanently there, PLEASE leave it as you found it (or better) :)
gfWs87D.accessInfo:
Farside: Park at Sandwirt, walk into the Kesselfallklamm, after crossing the 6th bridge (the one above the waterfall) leave the trail and turn right, walk up a small path  (ca. 30 Meters). For the 30 Meter line go right, for the 70 m go left.

Tensioning side: Cross the 3rd bridge, turn left and climb up  a small slope ca. 10 meters. Turn right and follow a small path through the forest until reaching the highest point of the Klamm. 
47.20536° N, 15.39881° E (approximately)

BkxNgRA.name: Birthday Cake
BkxNgRA.description: Highline is close to Manínska stráž
BkxNgRA.anchorsInfo:
One side tree, around 5m of slings.
Anchorpoint on other side is 3 bolts (Screw Bolts - Hilti 10mm). 2 bolts for main are visible on the photo, 3rd one is located on wall behind. We used 2.5m sling for main and rope for backup.
BkxNgRA.accessInfo: For bolted anchorpoint you have to reppel down from last tree on the ridge.

NcrKu7m.anchorsInfo:
Static side (NE): Anchor in a wall of a boulder. 3 bolts main 1 tails. Bolts 10x90. Spanset of 2.5m perfect or rope. 0 abrasion
Tensioning side (SO): Anchor flat on a big boulder. 3+1 bolts. 3 meters spanset. Little protection needed. Behind the boulder there's a couple bolts, if you feel like securing that big big big stone.

FMLkKV9.name: Los cuatrocientos
FMLkKV9.anchorsInfo: Long anchor on A Side (West Side)

EJ9bePN.name: 中国浙江杭州北湖矿坑营地，Beihu , Hangzhou, China

OR4I1OC.name: Highline Quintal de Casa . By : Edney Junior

opYrDRl.name: camino al valhala
opYrDRl.description: Lado A "arbol al lado de la calle, lado B tres anclajes fijos tipo parabolt, cerca del tunel, tienen chapas...
opYrDRl.restriction:
partial: En la tercer repeticion de la cinta hubo problemas con el encargado de aguas del pizarro, quien llamo a la policia... ir con respeto y tratar de no ranchar en la ruta, a unos 50 metros hacia el rio hay una hermosa playa donde estar.
En los dos montajes previos se hablo con el dueño sin problema. hermosa cinta para entrenar distancia.

HNE0P0u.name: Kucuk Eniste
HNE0P0u.restriction: partial: It's the climbing area. Please don't rig this line without contacting Slackline Turkey Association
HNE0P0u.anchorsInfo: 5 expansion bolts (12mm) each side. Close to each other.
HNE0P0u.accessInfo: Leash side is on the west. You can simply connect the line walking underneath

4Yyu5EK.restriction: full: Slackline it's forbidden it's a natural Park

7kTQMV2.name: Za Mostem
7kTQMV2.description: This area belongs to Geosfera Jaworzno. You have to ask for permission: geosfera@um.jaworzno.pl. The area is monitored. Nice spot close to a pedestrian bridge.
7kTQMV2.anchorsInfo: Trees, you need a lot of slings.

8IBq3EH.name: Ocho y media
8IBq3EH.description: 3 bolts each side. Walking/climbing very easily

TzFzX0k.name: Yurto
TzFzX0k.description: Linda linea con tremenda vista al barrio y al valle. El paso del cordin puede ser un desafío Abierto por Leono, Gon Catu y GonPi
TzFzX0k.anchorsInfo: Lado norte 3 chapas con frame (tronco). Es necesario bastante cuerda/expanset , lado sur ciprés
TzFzX0k.accessInfo: Sale un sendero desde la cancha de futbol y otro desde el final del camino.

dF1cHox.name: signor ghi
dF1cHox.description: ask to torino sul filo form more info
dF1cHox.anchorsInfo:
both side 2 spit of 10 and one of 12 already the bolt and piastrine overthere. 
one site 3m of slug are enough in the other site 2 sling o 2m
dF1cHox.accessInfo:
the pat is signed with small rock from Campo Pietra is about 15min walk. In one side you have to go on the left side of the climbing wall (La Parte delle gare), on the left site of the river (coming from the waterfall). Overcame the climbing wall on the left side and continuo up on the river then follow the small rock on the right side until you reach the waterfall. There you have to go back and go down (stay on the rock) until the borra, there you take the left side. you will find to reach the bolt you have to go down for the last tree. 
the other site you have to follow the river from the waterfall on he right site go up until you find a rock-wall there you take the left and you will find spit just down of the place where you can walk.

VK2ThfK.name: Un Paso Más
VK2ThfK.anchorsInfo: 2 parabolt del 10 + 1 MMS corto en cada anclaje
VK2ThfK.accessInfo: 2 horas y media  de camino en cada lado. Lado sur (cercano) bastante cómodo con desnivel progresivo, Lado norte (lejano) más técnico y con una trepada.

gzm3vdA.name: Saint antonin - 80m
gzm3vdA.description: Highline de 80m partant du belvédère jusqu’à la paroi en face.
gzm3vdA.anchorsInfo:
Coté Belvédére : Gougeons de 12mm, plaquette en place.
Coté falaise : Deux points de 10 avec plaquette pour faire un rappel de 3m, puit 5 points de 12 sans plaquette pour force et backup.

2WmXNBN.name: Frøyas ikke så gyldne lokker
2WmXNBN.description: Quick line to rigg if you're passing by or if you live in the area. The exposure isn't that great, but the line is quite sheltered and you still get the highline feel
2WmXNBN.anchorsInfo: Both sides bolted with 4 M12 bolts inn a half moon pattern. West anchor os siper comfortable while the East anchor feel a bit more exposed.
2WmXNBN.accessInfo: Park by one of the cabins to the west, be nice if any of them are home. Walk straight up to the hill for the West anchor. For the East ancjpr yoy need to walk east, down into the gully and up from the north

_X_0ZUt.name: Duté nohy
_X_0ZUt.accessInfo: Hike from the road up. Sleep to the north side of anchor

wuM-ssz.name: Classic 80m
wuM-ssz.restriction: partial: Only acces for UIAA insured members. Like in Belgium KBF or CAB
wuM-ssz.anchorsInfo:
Tree side:
Main = 8m sling rond boom dan door redirect
Back-up = 8m sling rond boom dan door redirect
redirect op boom: 1m sling + shackle waar main en backup slings doorlopen (vergeet geen treepro!) 

Rock side on bolts:
Main = 2 deltas, 2m sling als sliding X, shackle (kan zelfs met 1m sling)
Back-up = 2 deltas, 2m sling als sliding X, shackle

Acces rock side
via ferrata
wuM-ssz.accessInfo: Via ferrata PBM's mandatory for VF access

VHRQ_gP.description: 4 spits (10)+ 1 (12) on one side and pillar of the bridge on the other side. Abseling for the brige anchor and by foot for the other side (once you arrived downstairs, you have to go left in the forest and just follow the way )
VHRQ_gP.anchorsInfo: 4 spits (10)+ 1 (12) on one side and pillar of the bridge on the other side
VHRQ_gP.accessInfo: Abseling for the brige anchor and by foot for the other side (once you arrived downstairs, you have to go left in the forest and just follow the way )

Yt0f3Tz.name: Metal Pesado
Yt0f3Tz.description: 110m Highline, ancoragens artificiais, aprox 50m altura, acesso fácil
Yt0f3Tz.anchorsInfo: 3 bolts lado A, 2 eixos de caminhao lado B com backup natural

HTo5EMG.name: BZ Slack
HTo5EMG.description: contact use on FB for real data
HTo5EMG.anchorsInfo:
take a lot of slings
far side are three bolts so use some rope

i498IQI.description: Nice beginner line, one side is little bit higher
i498IQI.anchorsInfo: Nice beginner line, one side is little bit higher

bCCcK2b.name: Gracias villar
bCCcK2b.anchorsInfo: Need to have 16mm eye nuts. 3 eye nuts each side

kDWvt_p.name: Žerjavica
kDWvt_p.description: Actual name "Takratka" line is beautiful with deep and narrow gorge directly in the middle.
kDWvt_p.restriction: partial: Ask SlackAlien before rigging for air traffic info.
kDWvt_p.anchorsInfo:
South (tension side): 2x huge via ferrata glued bolts, 1m and 2m spanset needed, 1m of padding.
North (static side): 3x 12mm expansion bolts, 2+4m spanset, 0.5m of padding, some rope to tie it down.
kDWvt_p.accessInfo:
Tensioning side: Directly across road at parking there is steep path which lead you to the top where you go left and then you reach steel cables. On the end is 15m steel wire bridge. Alternative access is by 2 via ferrata choices.
Static side: You go in the forest towards the gorge and a few meters in you turn left to small path which leads you to the edge of gorge on top. Then follow a ridge a bit and go down left to find the anchor.

e40qBMW.name: No Fun
e40qBMW.description: Nice line with beautiful exposure to the whole valley
e40qBMW.anchorsInfo: Rigg in each sides to pine trees. In first side (behind big rock) main line to below pine, backup to above pine. In second side, main line going to pine tree and backup around rock (please block well on lowest point).

gMrhrPY.name: Polish MOAB
gMrhrPY.description: Access is really easy, car leave under the highline, road to the top is also easy. You should find a road (motocross road) to up no dont need to climb there.
gMrhrPY.anchorsInfo: One anchor is a tree, big tree, back-up also tree 5 meters behind the first tree. Second anchor is also tree but not the first because is to close to cliff and have bad roots, back-up again tree 2-3 meters behind main anchor
gMrhrPY.accessInfo: Really easy access. You dont need to climb there

1bBKV4k.name: Le plan cul
1bBKV4k.description:
Nice line with beautiful exposure and view. Possibility for longer line (around 180m) but needs to be bolted with rappel etc. 
Open in june 2015 by Theo Sanson, Antoine Mesnage and Laetitia Gonnon
First ascent on june 2016 by Antoine Mesnage
1bBKV4k.anchorsInfo:
When you look at the view, right side is 4-5 bolts, left side is natural anchor on a pine tree.

En regardant la vue, à droite 4-5 points et à gauche ancrage naturel sur un sapin.

gYYnvoj.name: Opening Party
gYYnvoj.description: With an immense effort of 3h bush bashing to reach the top of the cave, from the street with gear, Victor fulfilled his dream of establishing and first ascending, not only his firstly rigged line, but also the first highline in Leonidio and the eastern Peloponnese!
gYYnvoj.anchorsInfo: Instead of walking up through bushes, you can also just (aid-)climb the 8a+ “Aimovoros” on the left side of the sector, top out and you will find the three 10mm anchor bolts above the 8b+ “”. To reach the right side anchor, you can climb up the 7c+ “Zeybrake” and find the three 10mm anchor bolts next to the climbing anchor. Also there is the option to just climb one side, walk around on the top and rappel down a bit.

gf6pvsi.name: Roto el pantalón
gf6pvsi.description: 104m highline in La Muralla, in the State of Querétaro.
gf6pvsi.anchorsInfo: 3 SS glue-ins on each side. Static rope can be threaded directly through the glue-ins. We recommend the use of A-frames for boths sides. At least 30m static rope for each side..

EFLcomN.name: Balvalajna
EFLcomN.description: Highline bolted and rigged in Oktober of 2019 by SlackAlien.
EFLcomN.anchorsInfo: 4x 10mm bolts with hangers on each side.
EFLcomN.accessInfo: One anchor is hidden down on the ledge. the other one is on top of obvious rock.

vlS-GQZ.name: Baile das araras
vlS-GQZ.description: There is no shades in the place, so bring your sunscreen, hats and a lot of water...all stuff to protect you from the sun and the heat. There is 5 anchors each side, 3 main and 2 for backups
vlS-GQZ.anchorsInfo: there is 5 anchors each side, 3 main and 2 for backups

EFkHSEy.name: Welcome in Occitan
EFkHSEy.description:
Really chilly spot for highlining during few days : hut, campsite, toilet, swimming hole, watefall at 5min from the lines.

Opened by the team "The Ekiwibrists" in February 2018.
EFkHSEy.anchorsInfo:
*Connection : use 150m tagline, start walking from the swing bridge with one guy on each side and walk together on both side of the canyon until the anchors or use the 68m highline. 

*Anchor 1 : north side. 3 bolts diameter 12mm for the tension, 1 bolt diameter 10mm for the extra back-up. Bring yours hangers. 1 spanset 4m. Use a 2m sling hanging to the backup hanger to belay you and alow you to rich the anchors with  safety.

*Anchor 2 : south side. 3 bolts diameter 12mm for the tension, 1 bolt diameter 10mm for the extra back-up. Bring yours hangers. 1 spanset 4m.
EFkHSEy.accessInfo: Check ascend of the 68m highline. When you are at the anchor of this line continue walking on the edge during 50m, just after a gap you will see the anchors on a slab area. The other side of the highline starts on a obviously pinnacle.

2506C2X.name: Quase cem
2506C2X.anchorsInfo:
one point have 3 tytanclimb anchor "P"  75mm and in the other side have 2 tytanclimb anchor "P" and 1 more parabolt 1/2.
Have too 2 more points than climber guys

yxT0u0q.name: La Conciergerie
yxT0u0q.description: Opened by Sébastien Bouchet, Clément Fabre. Octobre 2012.
yxT0u0q.anchorsInfo:
(Bring the bolt hangers) 9 12mm and 6 10mm for anchors and belays
- Stairways side: You can see 3 10mm bolts and 2 12mm ones from the bridge. Reach them cautiously or use the 2 points higher to make a belay and rappel down (recommended). Use the 3 upper 10mm points for force and the 2 12mm for backup. At least 3m long spanset for force and 2m spanset for backup.
- West side: You can see the 5 12mm bolts from the bridge. Set a handrail between the 10mm bolt on the bridge and the 5 anchors to walk on the ledge safely. Use 3 bolts for force and 2 for backup. 3m long spanset at least for force and 2m for backup.
yxT0u0q.accessInfo:
The parking spot is located here: 43.524056,5.505447
Drive to Le Tholonet from Palette. When you reach “ Le château du Tholonet “ make a left and turn right 300meters further on the “ chemin de la paroisse “. Stop at the end of the slope on the muddy spot.

The parking lot is tiny ! So if you plan on parking with more than a couple of cars it is better to park inside Le Tholonet ( here for instance: 43.521901,5.510436 ) to keep parking space for hikers.

The line is located here in the Gorges parallel to the bridge of “ la petite mer “ : 43.528634,5.50961
15 to 20 minutes hike, start walking from le chemin de la paroisse, take te right path at the end of the slope to reach the cliff. Enjoy the point of view on la sainte-victoire and hike down along the cliff until you reach the bridge. The 20m is the first line parallel to the bridge.

8BjR1tk.name: Via da Fumaça 1
8BjR1tk.description: The place is very isolated, so bring a lot of food and get some guide on the city to go there. Bolts. By foot, easy trail

7CSvV9g.name: welcome to the 80s
7CSvV9g.description: 4 bolts on every anchor. near the edge
7CSvV9g.anchorsInfo: 4 bolts on every anchor. near the edge

e-LPeuJ.name: Cześć, i dzięki za ryby
e-LPeuJ.description: You can't highlining there without a permission.

cCfIH9v.name: Lahkica
cCfIH9v.anchorsInfo:
Static side: Big spruce tree.
Tensioning side: Trees, 9m spanset, A-frame is recommended
cCfIH9v.accessInfo:
Static side: ~30m of rappel, then crossing the hill right. (tricky to find)
Tensioning side: No problem :)

xT4CCAZ.name: Ale Picz!
xT4CCAZ.description: Both natural anchors, one side you need ~5m of slings for the rock, second anchor is a tree, you need 1,5m sling. +backup for both sides
xT4CCAZ.anchorsInfo: Both natural anchors, one side you need ~5m of slings for the rock, second anchor is a tree, you need 1,5m sling. +backup for both sides

dPOWswZ.description: 3 bolts each side, bolts quite far from edge so minimum 40m rope each side

fjquozM.name: Foggingtor Quarry
fjquozM.description: Nice line in a hidden quarry..
fjquozM.anchorsInfo: M.O.D abseil stakes on both sides, each stake is pull tested every 6 months to 3kn.. Lots of rope recommended

p-MO8Lz.description: Next step after the newbie line. Good challenge and exposure. Can be riged saggy.
p-MO8Lz.accessInfo: Ascend from Luchistoe takes 1.5-2 hours. The road goes along the beautiful valley of ghosts. You can also get on a solid 4x4.

UFhQbyI.name: Palankenios
UFhQbyI.description: One base have 3 parabolts and in the other side have 3 parabolts
UFhQbyI.anchorsInfo: one base have 3 parabolts and in the other side have 3 parabolts

BWZ5LHo.name: Hawischer Highline
BWZ5LHo.description:
Trees on both sides, one about 6 meters from the cliff, the other about 3 meters.
One A-Frame is useful to level the line. Park here: 49.96430,9.18271
Walk in from here: 49.96370,9.18348
Slack here ;-) 49.96496,9.18450
BWZ5LHo.anchorsInfo:
Trees on both sides, one about 6 meters from the cliff, the other about 3 meters.
One A-Frame is useful to level the line.

BKB_oiI.name: Brooyar highline
