CDnYuMp.name: st amaro waterline
CDnYuMp.description:
natural anchors ( big rocks) you need long slings to put around (4-6 meter) for each side. 
Check the tide situation and go on high-tide time. otherwise not engough water.

4D1aLRt.name: Grido del vento
4D1aLRt.anchorsInfo: Doppio ancoraggio naturale su granito, consiglio di tensionale dal lato sinistro.

ABc6UQr.description: easy line to rig, parking, toilets and kayaks are within 5min. Can be windy. Small tree anchors... Would be more specific but the phone is buggy

RUb4_Eb.name: Another Albie waterline
RUb4_Eb.description: This line gets you further from the flow but needs to be tight to get out of the water. Best to rig when the river is running low. Be careful with how you tag it, last rig was almost a hazard trying to swim the webbing across in high flows... a tagline is a good idea! Also wetsuits will help you enjoy your time on the line but not essential. Also a good one to walk with a leash due to heigh above the water that is required.
RUb4_Eb.anchorsInfo: Trees both sides, the tree close to the track requires some creative climbing to get high enough.
RUb4_Eb.accessInfo: Park off Alison ave just at the bottom of the hill to find the walk through to the river track.

7SA1d6E.name: Cliffs Waterline
7SA1d6E.description: In this beautiful area well known by locals as "The Cliffs" there is a great waterline area. The water is very deep year round so flipping off of the line is okay in this area. The current in the area is generally slow and is therefore easy to swim in and out of. In order to rig this line, have somebody swim across the gap with a tagline and pull over all gear necessary to rig around a 1 foot thick tree. Be careful on the other side of the river as snakes and spiders, although rare, have been spotted. Once the line is rigged have fun and enjoy!
7SA1d6E.anchorsInfo: Two trees between 1-2 feet thick. Bring a few slings to make anchors around the trees.
7SA1d6E.accessInfo: Once you have passed the national park toll houses, you will see a big water basin about 1 mile up the road on your right. Park on the turnout there and you will see a hikers trail that goes down by the basin. Follow that trail all the way down to the river into some shady trees where you will find the big water bowl.

pvy4O-o.description: Trees, 4' island side 6' on the arbutus

bCmqbP0.name: doelan rive droite

15m to 35m, depending on the tide. 
might be difficult if some boats wants to come or leave!

It also has to be rigged high in the trees to avoid people running into the line at the static side anchor.

nxGtCUZ.anchorsInfo: Looking at the falls, the right side anchor has bolts about 2M away from the edge of the rock, or bring a 1/2" hanger and nut for a bolt closer to the edge.  For the left side, sling one of the rocks on the top of the cliff (8' or 10' spansets).  The line will have a meter or so difference in anchor heights.

JT_88vV.name: Summer vibes

U0TFAvB.name: Water of love
U0TFAvB.description: Rodeo de 20m, 25m de fond direct, exposition sud est sur le grand large de la mer méditerranée, cadre exceptionnel et rocher calcaire d'une incroyable qualité.
U0TFAvB.anchorsInfo: EST : rocher naturel parfait pour coincer l'élingue, OUEST : Enorme lunule formant une colonne accessible en grimpant la traversée.
U0TFAvB.accessInfo:
Un tel endroit se mérite et son accès ne peut se faire d'une manière simple. Il est caché dans le fond de la calanque et peut se faire de plusieurs manières. 
1a : Par l'OUEST, le plus simple, en kayak / paddle ou à la nage, environ 600 mètres en partant de la plage de port d'Alon. 
1b : Pour écourter la nage, on peut se rapprocher par le sentier du littoral puis descendre au tout début des calanques, plein sud après la montée qui suit la deuxième plage.
1c : A partir de ce même endroit de la calanque, on peut démarrer une longue traversée en escalade direction est, pas très difficile mais parfois bric-a-brac. Le passage juste avant la Grotte du Grand Mur est plus physique (6a+?) et permet d'installer une 45, mais la section qui suit demande un niveau 7a. Je déconseille cette option pour installer uniquement la 20m car on finit à l'eau à moins d'avoir un très bon niveau d'escalade.
2 : Par l'EST, il faut d'abord arriver jusqu'à la grotte marine par la plage principale de port d'Alon (Ouest) en prenant le sentier qui longe le haut des falaises. Après avoir passé une maison bien visible avec un grand jardin de pelouse verte, soyez attentif au grand pierrier qui descend sur la gauche. Ce pierrier amène sur le haut d'une falaise, on peut descendre tout droit (plein sud) pour rejoindre la grotte et commencer la traversée en partant direction nord ouest. 
2a . Soit grimper la traversée mais celà demande une organisation particulière. En effet, il y a un passage en traversée 6b+ au début dans un dévers, puis quelques passages cotés 5 avant d'arriver sur la plateforme du spot.
2b. Soit y aller à la nage avec des sacs étanches, d'ici la nage est moins longue que celle des options 1a et 1b (environ 80 mètres).
2c. Soit esquiver le passage difficile en 6b+ en faisant descendre les sacs attachés aux slacklines puis grimper le reste, déjà testé mais problématique car demande plusieurs personnes et certains risques dus à la hauteur, sachant que le retour est encore plus fatiguant.

Cetr9PT.anchorsInfo:
Need som belt loope for fixing the line 
1×2meter 
1×4meter

gy8MENi.name: Swanick
gy8MENi.restriction: partial: Access to pontoons requires permission from Swanick Marina
gy8MENi.accessInfo: Accessed by boat or by paddleboard/kayak

bcntPN5.description: waterline easy to rig, possible as a midline as well.

NMnuU-8.name: nahsholim
NMnuU-8.anchorsInfo: 10mm bolt, possible to rig naturally with proper padding. rocks are quite sharp
NMnuU-8.accessInfo: waze to the Nahsholim cemetery, and park there. go north to the spot.

po1N73g.name: Pitoplancton
po1N73g.description: Difficult access, having to walk for a couple of hours to the beach and afterwords walk on the rocks, climb and swim for an hour. It's only possible with calm tide.
po1N73g.anchorsInfo: Vegan anchors on both sides, surrounding the rocks.

Nh1HD6I.description: Natural Anchors on stone ledges. Use back-ups!!
Nh1HD6I.anchorsInfo: Natural Anchors on stone ledges. Use back-ups!!

cYggFvE.name: San vito line
cYggFvE.description: Amazing location, sometimes you find many climbers cos it is a deep water spot, good quality rock but a bit sharp so mind some protection. Easy to find natural anchors for different lenghts up to 50m

_BF0xXd.description: Tree and pole in the water
_BF0xXd.anchorsInfo: Tree and pole in the water

K_BYoJg.description: deep enough to fall in the middle easily, extended over land on far side, recommend water shoes- slate very sharp

0OPhO_f.name: Lago Sirio
0OPhO_f.description: Tree anchors, the left side has to be reached swimming. There are several possibilities to rig between 60-90m.

uuUEWxv.name: Slack park éphémère 1
uuUEWxv.description: Uniquement pendant la période estivale lorsque le niveau d'eau est au plus bas.

zuFWPue.name: Close to Taxi
zuFWPue.description: Simple rigging,2x m spansets for anchors

pRpabzk.name: Freshline
pRpabzk.description: not too deep pool but clean and nice place for waterline.

ICBeqKF.description: A 30m line and 2x 3m slings should work fine at this spot, text me if you set up one, i'd love to join ;)

SW7r69f.description: Fun waterline for a hot day. Rig from the tree to the right of the rope swing tree to the one across the pond.

ZYlmE25.name: Waterline Alvarado
ZYlmE25.anchorsInfo: The anchor points are very resistant poles for anchoring boats

TdP-9rI.description: Line set up every year during the Transalp Waterline Tour.

tQFAZ2K.name: Frejo
tQFAZ2K.description: Plusieurs waterlines possibles de 10 à  50 m dans une eau bien fraîche. Du monde à partir de midi l'été.
tQFAZ2K.accessInfo:
Parking source de frejo, suivre le sentier pédestre jusqu'à la cascade puis descendre à 50m en aval.
Arbres et rochers de chaque côté. 
Eau transparente.

QQ7taz9.name: BLAMcala
QQ7taz9.description: 3m sling on one side 2m on the other. Use the nobbles in the rock. Walk around the bay to link the line
QQ7taz9.anchorsInfo: 3m sling on one side 2m on the other. Use the nobbles in the rock.

BWsrava.name: Church Doors Waterline
BWsrava.description: NOT YET RIGGED Stunning bay, with potential for waterlines, thin slings or climbing protection.  Sharp limestone, so be careful about edge protection.  Probably mid to high tide.

4SPtloL.name: Hood River 200
4SPtloL.description: a nice waterline near the Hood River Event site
4SPtloL.anchorsInfo: Anchor off one leg of each metal piling
4SPtloL.accessInfo: You can swim, but a kayak or SUP would help.

WxwM1Cq.name: Šeškiukas
WxwM1Cq.description: Sort of midline'ish waterline with a major chance of dipping in the water on a leash fall closer to the middle areas. Nice in a sence of not requiring you to get the slackline wet when setting it up or bringing it down.
WxwM1Cq.anchorsInfo: Home anchor is an a-frame to the base of a pine tree. Static side requires you to climb several meters up another pine tree, which is backed up with another slackline to a tree behind to compensate the waterline pulling and to stabilize swaying of the tree.
WxwM1Cq.accessInfo: Ascending static side tree with a couple of slings and setting up rappelling rope there for further easier access

1WCXQnV.description: Really nice spot for waterlines, from 25 to 140m lenght

TSImfmV.name: Balscadden waterline
TSImfmV.description: short waterline rigged with slings around rock outcrop

y70bDiS.name: Possible water line
y70bDiS.description: From the pillar on the dock, to a tree on the shore

AJ9NHxo.name: Islais Creek waterline
AJ9NHxo.description: Easy access by climbing to the pylons from the bridge. After rain the water can get pretty gross with things washed into the creek.
AJ9NHxo.anchorsInfo: There are a line of pylons at both ends, about 30-40cm diameter. They are strong but have lots of tar on them.

owW_7UP.anchorsInfo: Nearside is a boulder which is slung with an 8m sling. The far side is a small tree that is slung at the base
owW_7UP.accessInfo: 2 minute walk from the car park.

ovJtN5u.name: One love
ovJtN5u.description: Línea sobre agua en julio o agosto se seca el Spot

ksLWY6q.name: Waterline Ancones
ksLWY6q.description: The rigging is quite easy. Take car of the level of the seabed, leash and harness  are a MUST

TZV6q6W.name: Like a sunday morning
TZV6q6W.description: En été à poser à l'aube ou en soirée car beaucoup de monde.
TZV6q6W.anchorsInfo: 2 points avec plaquettes côté berge. Un arbre en face.
TZV6q6W.accessInfo: Marcher 5 minutes en aval du pont.

2BSBV99.name: Swimming Pool with trick and rodeo line possibilties

JbrJuef.name: La Banchina
JbrJuef.description: Spot is full of people and tourists during the summer because of the restaurant La Banchina, and its a nice place to swim, its well protected from the wind and is sunny (no shade from buildings) until sunset. some extra Description
JbrJuef.anchorsInfo: One side is some metal rings to tie boats on, and other side is a solid willow tree. line is probably around 3m above the water level at the anchors.

Fy32HHm.name: Griotte Waterline
Fy32HHm.description: Across the deepest part of La Drôme near Die
Fy32HHm.anchorsInfo: Trees on either side of the river

5_P-pod.name: Afföllerwiesen
5_P-pod.description: Waterline in Afföllerwiesen. Best to access from the park side but will need to swim across or bike/walk the long way around (~1500m to get to the other side). There are two old concrete anchors from an old bridge with steel rods sicking out to use as anchors. Best to take some towels/padding to protect gear from rubbing on concrete and rusty steel. The anchor points are about 2.5m above the water so most rigging needs to be done within arms reach of anchors. So it is easiest with a linegrip or at least low stretch webbing. Water is ~3m deep.

LoYJ1ts.name: iLe de vodovator
LoYJ1ts.description:
This is a hard line to rig, only for advanced riggers. On the island is some bolted big rock but it is to low so you need to search some wood to build a A-frame. 
The tree on the is to thin so you need to back it up with some static rope, bring at least 50m. 
A very nice line, deep water, fresh water even in warmest summer!

DgMpoW3.description: Lot of waterlines everywhere and many naturals anchors. Check anchors before some rocks are fragile.

YItjxW-.name: Punta Negra
YItjxW-.description: Waterline, tends have small boats passing by or people doing canoeing but very enjoyable

6-cefIw.name: Glaglaline
6-cefIw.anchorsInfo: 2 points avec plaquettes côté sur la roche côté pont, arbre en face

cPpsvon.name: zwolseswag
cPpsvon.description: Climb on both sides in the tree with rope. The line can go acros the bridge

rNHtd7Z.name: Waterline La Ballena
rNHtd7Z.description: The spot use to be quite calm despite of the weather conditions.

6FVeNE_.name: Waterline
6FVeNE_.accessInfo: You have to walk 5 minutes from sansone beach to the right

TqyHIOp.name: pipemonster
TqyHIOp.description:
1 tree Sag at 2m at least
other maybe 1m max

pipe in the water!!
but able to see it

5xhBER-.description:
- Pole on one side
- Tree on the other (need at least a 3m sling)
5xhBER-.anchorsInfo:
- Pole on one side
- Tree on the other (need at least a 3m sling)

xFuX4ji.description: This is a rodeoline in a heavily trafficked area. There are lots of kayakers and paddle boarders here.
xFuX4ji.anchorsInfo: One anchor is a tree and the other is a metal handrail

cyU_Ria.description: waterline, easy access, easy rigging. You can use a basic slackline of 15m with ratchet
cyU_Ria.anchorsInfo:
On one side you put the ratchet through a hole on the rocks.
On the other side, you can use a 3m sling and attach the slackline loop to it. 
Bring a lot of padding, you put everything around rocks

uHjztuv.description:
Very nice spot and protected from rough sea.
water depth: 2,5 meters

4XKJqn2.name: Sotto Torre Uluzzo
4XKJqn2.description: Slings around rocks. At least 6-7 meters long on the north-west side and 3 meters on the other
4XKJqn2.anchorsInfo: Slings around rocks. At least 6-7 meters long on the north-west side and 3 meters on the other.

kOgdQSe.name: Crocodile
kOgdQSe.description: Nice Line, deep water, sharp rocks
kOgdQSe.anchorsInfo: Natural anchors, you need some ropes and good protection
kOgdQSe.accessInfo: Close to the Singletrail between Galiaskari and Lissos

dhNHy0K.name: Warline
dhNHy0K.description: Penton militaire abandonné, nécessite d'une embarcation pour y accédé, des cordes pour faciliter l'accès à la structure

jkIGpmZ.description:
Ancrage possible sur le ponton (priorité absolue aux pécheurs), mais plus pratique sur le gros arbre à côté.
Tendez la ligne assez haut pour permettre aux embarcations de passer dessous, il y a un loueur de bateaux électriques en aval.

-VLXTV1.name: Robinson
-VLXTV1.anchorsInfo: Avec A frame du coté continent sur base de l'arbre, arbre sur îlot
-VLXTV1.accessInfo: Marcher 15-20 minutes au départ des plos en direction de la Sûre avant de descendre sur le spot

xiy7Bqp.name: El palmero
xiy7Bqp.description: 2 bolts in the small island and natural anchor in the other side. Might need harness woth lower tides

jjUbjsM.name: Cacciucco briao
jjUbjsM.description: Il primo ancoraggio si trova sulla sinistra delle scale per scendere alla spiaggia, l'altro si trova sullo scoglio più alto visibile, sul lato opposto
jjUbjsM.anchorsInfo: Hai bisogno di 5 sling (spanset), 6 maglie rapide,  8 strisce di pad, le piastre sono già presenti
jjUbjsM.accessInfo: The name of the beach is "cala del leone"

pcPgYy8.description: Ancrage 1: Un gros anneau se trouve dans la roche, utilisation facile. Il est un peu loin du bord, donc on doit protéger la ligne ou avoir de long spanset. Deux lignes partent de cet endroit. Ancrage 2: On retrouve un arbre de l'autre bord vers la...
pcPgYy8.anchorsInfo: Ancrage 1: Un gros anneau se trouve dans la roche, utilisation facile. Il est un peu loin du bord, donc on doit protéger la ligne ou avoir de long spanset. Deux lignes partent de cet endroit. Ancrage 2: On retrouve un arbre de l'autre bord vers la droite. La ligne est très haute par rapport à l'eau.

pMQZXl_.description: Only possible after summer when there are not so many people.

kQO-eMB.name: Rae's Creek Aqueduct
kQO-eMB.description: Tree to tree. Public park no access issues

RLP4wTk.name: Sector de Escalada do Ratão
RLP4wTk.description: waterline in Castelo de Paiva, Sector de Escalada do Ratão.

ZKkFCkp.name: Blue Hole Waterline
ZKkFCkp.description:
A slackline with a deep hole right underneath the line, awesome diving location, snorkeling and chillout spot.
The entire area of dwejra is made up of stunning rock formations.
ZKkFCkp.anchorsInfo:
Natural rocks, padding or slings recommended.
beginner line friendly
ZKkFCkp.accessInfo: Parking close by, but you'll have to get your ankles wet before you reach the blue hole

oJbADAr.name: Mosier Swimming Hole
oJbADAr.description: A small waterline for a small swimming hole.
oJbADAr.anchorsInfo: Bring trad gear for a crack on either side.  Small Cams (Camalot .75 and smaller) are best.

vAujpXh.name: Ligne du diable
vAujpXh.description:
Ligne éphémère après les pluies lorsque la cascade est présente.
Ligne passant sous la cascade et suivant le lit de la rivière.
vAujpXh.anchorsInfo: Bosquet sous la cascade, arbre en face.
vAujpXh.accessInfo:
Direction saint Jean de la Blaquière, chemin ensuite carrossable mais en mauvais état en direction du canyon du diable.
Marcher 500m en direction de la cascade d'Agaras.

0Rkf21s.name: La Clavicula
0Rkf21s.description: Be careful with low tide, there is no enoug water below to fall safe.
0Rkf21s.accessInfo: You can park your car 20m from the anchors

v2MNfO8.name: Zarecki waterline
v2MNfO8.anchorsInfo: anchors around rocks, some long 10m slings needed.

UW0RJU9.name: Kamp slapić
UW0RJU9.description: nice spot in camp... depth is good and ease of access.

A53tnmo.name: Plos 2
A53tnmo.description: Selon niveau d'eau janvier 26 au plus haut

KLm9vip.name: Stair hole waterline
KLm9vip.anchorsInfo:
Anchor using nuts/hexes at the right hand edge of stair hole (as you look at it from the beach) - this side requires good sling protection as the rocked as sharp and jagged. Directly opposite is a small cave with a diagonal crack leading up to a big chockstone (theres evidence of previous anchor slings here). The boulder with the chockstone is hard to access via paddleborad at low tide - but you can always climb on the 'laws traverse' 6b+ to get on top of the boulder in the cave.
A 3m spanset on either side will do the trick.

vJ8kgde.name: Caraman line
vJ8kgde.restriction: partial: Baignade uniquement dans la zone nautique proche du camping.
vJ8kgde.anchorsInfo:
Plusieurs longueurs possibles avec arbres alignés le long de la berge.
Il est cependant interdit de se baigner en dehors de la zone nautique payante en pleine saison.

ZnSSbD9.name: Piscine 3
ZnSSbD9.description: Coté terre ancrage sous la piscine et surélévation avec un A frame.
ZnSSbD9.restriction: partial: Ne pas installer des deux côtés de la piscine sur la même session, de ce fait les passants ne pourraient pas rejoindre l'embarcadère.
ZnSSbD9.anchorsInfo: A frame et poteau d'amarrage en face

jVMWhjS.description: easy to access, with deep waters but must be carefull in the first 2 meters and the last 2 meters cause there are rocks in the surface of the sea

i59jNxa.name: Akimbo
i59jNxa.description: Long waterline over fast flowing river
i59jNxa.anchorsInfo:
2m spansets will do for both sides
Swim it across
Best to be a fairly strong swimmer
i59jNxa.accessInfo:
Go to killiecrankie soliders leap carpark
Walk down and turn left away from soliders leap, and scramble down to the side of the large pool

G6XiOek.name: Beckhole waterline
G6XiOek.description: Using rock anchors so you need big slings. Careful of rocks in the water

6oyKH6O.name: Sunline
6oyKH6O.description: Waterline magnifique, surtout au coucher de soleil. Cependant la longueur n'est pas possible à faire en entier, la flèche fini dans l'eau.
6oyKH6O.anchorsInfo: Utiliser les rochers et les rails de la piscine.

h1Q5G7L.name: Wąż Rzeczny
h1Q5G7L.description: A man came to us to check if we are all right, he said that it's private territory but as long as we don't litter he is ok with it :) There is also tons of people over there so it shouldn't be a problem :D

83ZxCk2.name: Water Saw
83ZxCk2.description: The easiest to rig waterline at this lake at the moment. No need to climb anywhere or hang over the water with rigging equipment as with Lil Swan spot.
83ZxCk2.anchorsInfo: Closest anchor is at the tree right beside waterfront. But since recently the birch tree that stood right next to it fell, the fallen trunk is now helpful with rigging the anchor there and pretensioning, as you can just stand on it over the water. Tensioning anchor ir on the other side of the lake as the anchor tree there is a few meters away from the waterfront and allows more freedom of motion there

GO6v8sl.name: Hippieline
GO6v8sl.description: Waterlines above the stunning turquoise waters of Lake Atitlán with volcanoes as background
GO6v8sl.anchorsInfo: You can reach the anchors walking
GO6v8sl.accessInfo: Playa Punta Tzancuil in Google Maps,  from the main road take the stairs down to the beach.

P6Sma1a.description: Rigged during vacations when the beach is crowdy.

Ajxefzz.name: Croc Pool, Stoney Creek
Ajxefzz.description: Trees available for anchors. Anchors are easily accessible crossing the creek or by swimming. Park in the carpark at the end of Stoney Creek Rd. Follow the track up for about 10-15 minutes, just past the turtle pool
Ajxefzz.accessInfo: Anchors are easily accessible crossing the creek or by swimming

zzV7FuT.name: waterline in Castelo de Paiva, Sector de Escalada do Ratão.
zzV7FuT.description: waterline in Castelo de Paiva, Sector de Escalada do Ratão.

VrhaseF.description: Water depth can vary but is typically between 5ft and 6ft. Trees

cGVff4I.accessInfo: 5 minute walk to access the line

MEopNBw.name: Houghton Falls
MEopNBw.description: Waterline across the outlet of Houghton Falls
MEopNBw.anchorsInfo: Birch Tree on the trail-side, Hemlock on the opposite shore

ElM6C4r.name: East Sands Harbour
ElM6C4r.description: Ask Harbour Board before for access. Both anchors are Mooring Posts on the Harbour
ElM6C4r.anchorsInfo: Both anchors are Mooring Posts on the Harbour

y7TFDBO.name: La Pata De la Vaca
y7TFDBO.description: Nice waterline with calm water in urban surroundings.
y7TFDBO.anchorsInfo: Large boulders to sling on both sides.

fxp3GsN.anchorsInfo:
Rive droite: sangle sur rocher (~3m, bien avec 2 sangles)
Rive gauche: un arbre mort (un pas d'escalade pour y accéder)
fxp3GsN.accessInfo: Voir info sur la 31m a côté.

HFyvc9j.name: L'odyssé
HFyvc9j.description: Une ligne parallèle à Ulysse : un grand classic d'abysse !
HFyvc9j.anchorsInfo: Nous réalisons l'encrage coté digue sur 2 bouleaux pour mieux repartir les forces. L'arbres utilisé en face et un chêne ou plutôt 2 petits chênes entrelacé.

bo_Zq6-.description: Il faut un peu grimpouiller pour aller mousquetonner la plaquette qui se situe sous la pille du pont
bo_Zq6-.anchorsInfo: 1 plaquette sur un spit de 10 de chaque côté

zON65--.name: Preciosa
zON65--.description: It can be a rodeo or a midline
zON65--.anchorsInfo: hole in the rock (lunule in french)

qEZjODO.name: Contrabanderos Freesta
qEZjODO.description:
Natural anchors both  ways 
You need some slings or one long rope and Aframe in one anchors

TjBF0v6.name: Into the Deep Sea
TjBF0v6.description: Simple rigging,2x m spansets for anchors
TjBF0v6.anchorsInfo: grounded steel and Poller on farside

00wF0Fq.name: No send yet
00wF0Fq.description:
Waterline / rodeo / middle line of 70m, only accessible through 18km of canoe.
Bring your leash. The bottom of lake is not really deep on half of the line.
00wF0Fq.anchorsInfo:
Two big trees, really easy to rig.
On the left side (when the lake is behind you) a big tree over a rock and on the right side a big tree where you can place our spansets high.
00wF0Fq.accessInfo:
The access is only possible with a canoe, during a canot-camping trip, through the #11 circuit.
Check at "Reserve faunique de la verendrye" for infos on the access.

HYz5tbh.name: Trill Farm waterline 2
HYz5tbh.description: Using the right side tree's you rig to the island, this line is over more water and its deeper..

MWT9T7X.description: Natural anchors, slings around rocks, paded well
MWT9T7X.anchorsInfo: Natural anchors, slings around rocks, paded well

KQRfLVY.name: Areuse
KQRfLVY.description: Deux sangles pour partir des arbres
KQRfLVY.anchorsInfo: Deux sangles pour partir des arbres

qb6zlTH.name: Quai Bellevue
qb6zlTH.description: Préférez la marée haute si vous ne voulez pas atterrir sur le sable

sHJxPNB.name: Island in the sun
sHJxPNB.description: A short waterline over the clutha by Albert town. Very nice on a sunny day but the water is cold... most fun with a wetsuit
sHJxPNB.anchorsInfo: Two tree wraps, far side you need to get into the scrub and find the anchor tree. This involves swiming over the river which can have strong flows so be careful!
sHJxPNB.accessInfo: Park on Alison ave, there is a walk through to the river track just at the bottom of the hill.

dXsRlB7.name: Heart of sardinia
dXsRlB7.description: Natural anchors on both sides, different lengths and even midlines possible
dXsRlB7.anchorsInfo: Natural anchors on both sides, different lengths and even midlines possible

KbxLCMF.name: Barrage Kaya
KbxLCMF.description:
Ligne en face du barrage de la base de canoë kayapuna.
Arbres de chaque côté.
KbxLCMF.accessInfo: Parking au dessus lenlong de la route.

wBV5e9P.name: Am Sprungfelsen
wBV5e9P.description: Easy and fast to rig waterline with access from both sides. Northern side is slightly overhanging and can be started from the shore.
wBV5e9P.anchorsInfo: Use stone column on northern side (thread 2m sling through the feature) and boulder on southern side (use 6m sling around boulder)

T1X1SJo.description: Small tree on one side. High anchors advised!
T1X1SJo.anchorsInfo: Small tree on one side. High anchors advised!

f6XoJXC.name: Im falling!!
f6XoJXC.description: Nice 40m waterline over the river. It's quite a hard line as the river is flowing underneath (feels like you are constantly falling). Popular swimming spot. water is quite deep (people jump from the curved bridge).
f6XoJXC.accessInfo: easiest way to get there is off Jericho road, over bridge (over railway line) and through the meadow. Best way to pass the line is to swim across with it.

WPgKgle.description:
Other possibilitis for longer lines
http://waterlinedatabase.blogspot.com/. Natural anchors on both sides. make sure you have good padding if you not wanna ruin your spannset. the rocks are pretty sharp
WPgKgle.anchorsInfo: natural anchors on both sides. make sure you have good padding if you not wanna ruin your spannset. the rocks are pretty sharp

iVAtHG3.name: with a little help
iVAtHG3.accessInfo: You can go there by car(max 2m high), or bike or by foot.

4UjHp5p.name: Fetcher Waterline
4UjHp5p.description: Tree anchors on both sides. On the peninsula side use the large cottonwood furthest from the parking lot. On the other side use the cottonwood behind the bench in the clearing.

LouPyKB.name: "Big V"
LouPyKB.description: Gotta pick one!  Either the "Big V" or the "Little Z".  This is probably the biggest waterline possible at the Klickitat.  Just a meter away from the rock, the water is super deep and safe to fall, even if the anchors are a little high.
LouPyKB.anchorsInfo: The eastern anchor shares anchors with the 60m.  The western anchor uses a chock stone in the crack about 5m away from the water, and an A-frame is very helpful for preventing abrasion and keeping the line level.

K7Nlbbp.description:
Élingues de 2m et 3m
prévoir un lasso pour un démontage rapide
K7Nlbbp.anchorsInfo:
élingues de 2m et 3m
prévoir un lasso pour un démontage rapide

uIwX5Os.name: Marina long
uIwX5Os.description: Un sitio precioso fácil de aparcar, chiringuito en la playa, duchas, palmeras para poner la hamaca y un pequeño puerto con bares y minimarkets a 5min andando
uIwX5Os.anchorsInfo: Fácil montaje con eslingas alrededor de la roca
uIwX5Os.accessInfo: Fácil acceso desde el coche hasta el spot

wAoI4nO.name: Agrykola
wAoI4nO.description: First rigged during the snow storm

NB7pIZd.description: Sometimes fishermen come and tell you that you have to leave and sometimes the just let you be there. Trees

XpWIBHX.name: Altenbergsteg Waterline
XpWIBHX.description: Hardcore Waterline for hardcore people. Be careful not to fall in the beginning. The water can be shallow and the line is quite high.

aRMF415.name: Big Wobbly Jellies
aRMF415.description: Short Waterline. Good fun, lovely view and awesome rocks. The area is very tidal, best 2 hours each side of high tide, unless you fancy a mid-line on trad gear. The area is a deep water solo venue at high tide, so extra climbing is possible and its deep.
aRMF415.anchorsInfo: Trad anchors each side. Good gear, bring lots of nuts and hexes
aRMF415.accessInfo: walk there, walk down the hill.

9FDgUau.name: Kangaroo Point Waterline
9FDgUau.description: Sweet line and great view but rather unpleasant water. Beware of the bullsharks!
9FDgUau.anchorsInfo: Pier side is bolted, land side you wrap a bollard (be aware council can tell you off for this)

COB_wVY.description:
DON'T trust google maps when you just type "Jägersee", it'll try to send you along closed roads.
Closest official parking is in Feucht before the to bridges crossing the highway and the railroad.

Many options available, but also lots of thinner trees.

k_6lzHF.name: no hay piedad pa los godos

f0k3JeT.name: Tranquil tellisford
f0k3JeT.description: good fun little waterline, plenty of trees to rig other lines, just need to make sure they are stable/strong wih not too many branches in the way!
f0k3JeT.anchorsInfo: Trees, from the one with the rope swing diagonally right to the big willow on the other side

qSk9TSi.name: Rodeoline Charco Azul
qSk9TSi.description:
Rodeo-Waterline

Visited Nov ‘25 with very poor water quality, not something you want to fall into!
qSk9TSi.anchorsInfo: There is a parabolt on each side, you will need 2 bolt hangers and 2 nuts

9gITdLq.name: Waterline Corvara - Lago Biotopo
9gITdLq.description: Little waterline over the biotop lake of Corvara. Ask the lifeguard for more info.

zGHaRNN.name: Little Swan
zGHaRNN.description: An idle and secluded waterline spot with a fine place for a campfire to warm up

h8chVs9.name: Joining
h8chVs9.description:
Located at the Joining restaurant. Not-so-great natural anchors, bring protection. Line is 3-4m above water so you cant climb back up after you fall. Be careful when the tide is low.
Some short boulder problems on the rocks surrounding the line.

OGnSFt2.name: Little mermaid
OGnSFt2.description: Nice waterline, mounting is safe ~3 m from the anchors.

TYttVHO.name: El pantanu mola nanu
TYttVHO.description: Waterline over the lake. There are many possibilities.
TYttVHO.anchorsInfo: Trees on both sides, you have to climb them. Some trees are pretty thin, so better backup them or create an hang frame if you have enough gear.
TYttVHO.accessInfo: Get to the recreative zone of Barrasona, after the kayaks spot.

y2IwIQy.name: Robinson
y2IwIQy.anchorsInfo: Avec A frame du coté continent

B4htUH_.name: Waterline 30
B4htUH_.description: This is a classic waterline in Bern
B4htUH_.restriction: partial: Slackattack has the official city permission for this line, it needs to be anchored in a specific way, please contact slackattack if you go.
B4htUH_.anchorsInfo: Bottom of the Bridge Railing and a little Wall on the other side
B4htUH_.accessInfo: Ask slackattack for details, gear is onsite

B8lrb6o.name: Project
B8lrb6o.description: Lovely waterline with easy rigging. Safe bay with natural anchors. Water is clear and deep (2,5-4 meters deep)
B8lrb6o.anchorsInfo: Natural anchors. One side hole in the rock (1,5-2m long sling) second side sling around rock (2m long sling) rocks are ultra sharp so you have to use some protectors both sides.

uc3LODM.description: świetna miejscówka na długie waterliney, mało ludzi, dobra opcja na spacelinea

ewLp07a.name: Frech'line
ewLp07a.accessInfo: Pas de Possibilité de stationnement proche de la ligne. Se garer le long de la départementale puis descendre.

l87Pt8I.name: Mouchette
l87Pt8I.description:
fun waterline.
Attention à la mouche noire

1t5pScN.name: La mer de rochers
1t5pScN.anchorsInfo:
Side 1 : 2 spits with plates
Side 2 : around the rock with a roudsling oh min 2T
1t5pScN.accessInfo: Park at the ponteverre parking and just go down the track after the bridge on your right

D6V0n-A.description:
This line is sometimes set up by the people Schloss Loshausen for kids with a line to hold on.
One side is a public park, the other side is private, but I am sure there is no problem if you ask. 
The river is not very deep and easy to access.

0pfLPZ6.description: Tidal pool on the atlantic seaboard with potential for a few different waterlines
0pfLPZ6.anchorsInfo: Big sharp granite boulders, bring lots of padding and beefy slings

IY7t8AM.name: Charco Azul
IY7t8AM.description:
Short waterline

Visited Nov ‘25 with very poor water quality, not something you want to fall into!

nSHgy4o.name: El Fructuoso cave lines
nSHgy4o.description: In El Fructuoso cave you can set several waterline lines using the stalagmites and stalactites for anchors...
nSHgy4o.restriction: none: Take care with the nature, this is a protected natural zone.
nSHgy4o.accessInfo: Get to Gibara, Holguin first, then ask for directions to El Fructuoso

JwZ6OCA.name: Ulysse
JwZ6OCA.description:
Ligne majeur du spot.
31m de long 
il faudra traverser à la nage pour installer ;-)
JwZ6OCA.anchorsInfo: Ancrage naturel sur des bouleaux - attention les arbres sont un peu fragile éviter les jumps ou tension trop fortes

4_SXAG1.name: Waterline Torbole
4_SXAG1.description: You can only slack in the afternoon or in the early morning, because this is the entry to the harbour.

IOSkFuE.description: Fun waterline for a hot day. Rig from the ropeswing tree to the one across the pond.

V0--Ewj.description:
DON'T trust google maps when you just type "Jägersee", it'll try to send you along closed roads.
Closest official parking is in Feucht before the to bridges crossing the highway and the railroad.

Many options available, but also lots of thinner trees.

tOo7Dxc.name: Caleb
tOo7Dxc.description: With low water there are cracks for cams. Very high water and trees can be utilized

S_DM1hy.description: You can vary the length infinitely here

eHnsMz6.name: Ochensbach Waterline
eHnsMz6.description:
A really nice place for a Waterline in the summer. Please do not drive your car to the lake. Only stupid people do this. There is a parking space near Neustadt. 
Also take care of the nature. Don't trash don't camp or make fires.
eHnsMz6.anchorsInfo: Trees directly near the water. 2m slings should be enough.

ULLDtGO.description: Beware that on one side the draft is not enough,  so you can use safely something like 3/4 of the length.

l13NHP-.description:
Élingues de 2m et 3m
prévoir un lasso pour un démontage rapide
l13NHP-.anchorsInfo:
élingues de 2m et 3m
prévoir un lasso pour un démontage rapide

TG1tajh.name: Upper class dirtbag
TG1tajh.description: A beautiful rodeo waterline but relatively not so easy to rig and not 100% walkable - natural anchors on sharp rock and requires a bit of climbing on both sides. Only 3/4 of the line can be walked (The other part have rocks below it) and the line can be walked only during high tide as  the surrounding water are pretty shallow - make sure that there are no Sea urchins below the line!
TG1tajh.accessInfo: You have to stay in the Resort in order to reach to the line, you can just swim from the resort's beach or use the free resorts kayaks to get there

UenjKPb.description: waterline, easy access, easy rigging. The place is full of waterlines with natural anchors. You can rig from 12 to 50m or more.
UenjKPb.anchorsInfo: Slings on the rocks, a lot of padding needed. You can look thourgh holes on the rocks for some anchor points

gjTgAX3.description:
Waterline de 31m, les ancrages sont assez bas, donc prendre une slack pas trop elastique.
Attention aux 2 rochers dans l'eau près de l'ancrage rive droite qui peuvent poser problème selon le niveau de l'eau. Préférable de commencer depuis la rive gauche, bien plus profonde.
gjTgAX3.anchorsInfo:
2 broches scellées.
Bien vérifier l'état des broches: le rocher n'est pas de grande qualité et le fier en crue peut abimer les broches.
L'ancrage rive droite est partagée avec une autre ligne, prévoir des petites sangles.
Plus facile de tendre la ligne depuis la rive gauche (traverser a la nage)
gjTgAX3.accessInfo:
Voir la photo.
Suivre la piste cyclable jusqu'a sous le pont puis prendre un petit chemin qui descend dans la forêt. Descendre le petit ressaut (1m50) et suivre le chemin le long de la rivière.

aKTm0f1.description: Respect du site car Situer en Zone Natura 2000 . Une élingue de  3 mètre autour d'un rocher  de votre coter et en face une spit avec une fix (sur le quel on se raccroche avec un mousquetons ). Route du pont st Nicolas , en partant du pont se garé ...
aKTm0f1.anchorsInfo: une élingue de  3 mètre autour d'un rocher  de votre coter et en face une spit avec une fix (sur le quel on se raccroche avec un mousquetons )

IF3-eMw.description: Couple options (none of them amazing) for rigging over a very nice swimming hole. I rigged it with 50m of blue off of one very large tree up the bank on the near side and a smaller but still solid tree on the far side. Had to swim a tagline across.

2XslBRN.description: Waterlines over Salford Quays. BEWARE OF SHARP METAL NEAR EDGES!!
2XslBRN.anchorsInfo: Bridge on one side, either sling the underside of the bridge or put a shackle through one of the holes on the side. Shipping bollard on other side

vEgPsUg.description: Tree on one side is about 6 feet around.  On the other side there is a chock stone stuck in a crack about 30 feet from the water
vEgPsUg.anchorsInfo: Tree on one side is about 6 feet around.  On the other side there is a chock stone stuck in a crack about 30 feet from the water.

8VZLz0P.name: Unnamed
8VZLz0P.description: Beautiful waterline over the sea in an amazing cove
8VZLz0P.anchorsInfo: 2 expansion bolts on one side and natural anchor on the other

qM9TSH7.name: Cascade blanche
qM9TSH7.description: Ancrages sur arbres, départ sur galets puis 15m au dessus de l'eau face à la cascade

uyI_WbN.name: The Precipice
uyI_WbN.description: The Precipice sits in a beautiful canyon, just above Palouse Falls. The line spans a large pool of water hidden from the view of the tourists above. This line was established in mid-September of 2021, during low flow conditions when the water was moving quite slowly towards the lip of the waterfall. Considering the proximity to the lip of a 200 foot water fall, make sure that you consider how fast the water is moving! At low flows, there is very little danger posed by the waterfall.
uyI_WbN.anchorsInfo: 2 glue-ins on the north side of the line. Sling a boulder on the south side.
uyI_WbN.accessInfo: Hike to the upper falls area, then follow the river downstream to the precipice of Palouse Falls!

_30v5ed.name: Wind of Change
_30v5ed.description: Awesome sundowner-line - can be rigged quite high, about 4 meter above the water

KI9PBZe.name: summervibe
KI9PBZe.anchorsInfo:
as seen in the pictures one side is a dead tree laying around (in case it is gone some day, there are also trees around which could be used.
On the side of the Illerdamm there is a beautiful tree that can be used as an anchor
KI9PBZe.accessInfo: best to reach this spot from the illerradweg, there is a little house which looks like a garage building. If you are right in front of it, pass by the left side and follow a small path which leads you straight to the dead tree (anchor 1).

Sy5L5Py.anchorsInfo: 2 bolts on each side of 12mm, bring hanger and nuts

dx-SSJk.name: walk into the woods
dx-SSJk.description:
1 tree Sag at 2m at least
other maybe 1m max

pipe in the water!!
but able to see it

_8L-YDD.description: Watermidline, easy access, and good DWS spot. Put a leash because the anchor points are 8m high. Or you can rig it super loose so its close to the water
_8L-YDD.anchorsInfo: 12mm bolts on the two sides. Bring your own hangers and nuts because there is nothing there

FPmmeMY.name: Linda
FPmmeMY.description: There is no bridge. You need to swim. And the river is not very deep - 2 meters max.

OsadBP4.name: Opera house water line
OsadBP4.description: Good anchors on both sides, made for boats. Good idea with extra straps and potentially some extra padding
OsadBP4.anchorsInfo: Good anchors on both sides, made for boats. Good idea with extra straps and potentially some extra padding

onyWl10.name: Cote d'azur
onyWl10.description: Very nice open space. Yet not sent. We rigged this line in extreme wind conditions but will be back soon :)
onyWl10.anchorsInfo: On one side you attach it to the tree and on the other side we have buried a thick brunch with anchor line attached to it.

Y0sP9gC.name: Silikatnoe
Y0sP9gC.description: There is no bridge. You need to swim.

CyH1z15.name: Grotte des fées
CyH1z15.accessInfo: À 300m en aval de la grotte des fées,  petite plagette avec plusieurs waterlines possibles de 25 à 70m.

ILw1VJq.name: Round Pond Waterline
ILw1VJq.description: This is a state park. There are no explicit rules against slacklining although I'm pretty sure slacklining may constitute as a dangerous activity which is at the discretion of the park rangers if you screw around/ screw up. Be careful and keep a l...

EqXJlfY.name: Cala de la Media Naranja
EqXJlfY.description:
The most beautiful waterline in Anadalucia (personal opinion). Pristine waters, not very deep, but deep enough.
There may also be possibilities for longer lines over deeper water, but the acces won't be super easy.
EqXJlfY.restriction: none: Watch out, sometimes people are going in the bay in motos boats - the can be to high or when your are rigging or derigging, their motors cut damage the line and break themselves.
EqXJlfY.anchorsInfo: One anchor is easily accessible on foot, the other one only through water. It's a natural hole in the stone. The other is only slinging around a rock.
EqXJlfY.accessInfo: Only on foot or via boat. If you look for Cala de la media naranja on google maps, it will take you to a place for parking - but the road is not very nice :) From there, its a 20 min walk.

6Mds5DB.name: Monstro do lago
6Mds5DB.description:
Boca do Igarapé recordação no Lago Verde, Alter do Chão/PA
Anc. A Escola da Floresta
Anc. B Pierre
6Mds5DB.anchorsInfo:
Ancoragem A : Sling 3m, 20m corda backup, 2 manilhas, softrelease, linelock
Ancoragem B: 20m corda, manilha.(olhal na ponta da fita.
6Mds5DB.accessInfo:
ancoragem A: árvore 15m High
Ancoragem B: árvore 13m High

lTZ_xum.name: Vervet waterline
lTZ_xum.description: Project, attempted late May 2025 by a brave Frenchman. Still awaiting crossing in one go. The line is very public, facing several restaurants and about 100 apartments.
lTZ_xum.restriction: partial: Access to the western anchor goes through a fence, that has a really big hole in it. So, we are probably not "ment to go there". But nobody has complained this far.
lTZ_xum.anchorsInfo: Bollards in both ends. Western bollard is about 3m from edge, eastern bollard right on the edge.
lTZ_xum.accessInfo: Eastern anchor is on public space, western is behind a fence (with large holes).

na0qQaO.description: Nice long waterline above deep, cold water.  Nice high anchors let you get your sag on.
na0qQaO.anchorsInfo: Two glue-in bolts on each side.

AxHIGAE.description: Big post and tree on one end. Fat post on the other. easy to rig
AxHIGAE.anchorsInfo: big post and tree on one end. Fat post on the other. easy to rig

Xsn2FJE.name: Trill Farm waterline 1
Xsn2FJE.description: Using the left side tree's you rig to the island, water is just below waist deep so you can walk the line across..

sjbNvFL.name: Cherwell
sjbNvFL.description: Rig a bit higher so that punts can still go underneath. Trees on both sides, however, the tree on the boathouse side is quite big, maybe use a 4m sling. Access from the East shore (via Aston's Eyot, which is accessible from Jackdaw Lane). Access f...
sjbNvFL.anchorsInfo: Trees on both sides, however, the tree on the boathouse side is quite big, maybe use a 4m sling.
sjbNvFL.accessInfo: Access from the East shore (via Aston's Eyot, which is accessible from Jackdaw Lane). Access from the other side (Christ Church College boathouse) only during the day via Christ Church Meadow (but you still want to hang out on the other side)

u4UwVs4.name: Little turtle
u4UwVs4.anchorsInfo: X 2 bosquets. Possibilité de rehausser avec un A frame
u4UwVs4.accessInfo: Troisième crique après le parking des plos

0odeVst.name: Piscine de la mer 1
0odeVst.description: Possibilités de poser plusieurs lignes sur la largeur, en diagonale ou sur la longueur.
0odeVst.anchorsInfo: Ancrage sous la piscine + surélévation avec un A Frame côté terre. Poteaux en face.

C2kT5m-.name: Everything Undone weir- shallow!
C2kT5m-.description: Parking is on ferry lane, just off the A36. Parking is VERY limited so travel in as fewer vehicles as possible. Easily accessed by the canal/cycle path. Walk over the train track, bridge and footpath sty, then right down the field to the weir
C2kT5m-.anchorsInfo: A tree on either side. We used a 4m and 5m sling.
C2kT5m-.accessInfo: We set up Base camp on the far side of the weir- an island- we swam to the other side to set up the anchor.

Em7zD2-.name: Plos
Em7zD2-.description: Selon le remplissage du lac, 1m à 1m50 sous la ligne

ewCUUdS.name: Sheng Luk High stream Sai Wan

lEm5asP.description:
ligne très sympa mais il faut se méfier de la marée slackable autour de la marée haute uniquement
la distance est très approximative
lEm5asP.anchorsInfo:
encrage sur les rocher directement 
roche en granite donc solide

LJWVjGs.name: maidens cove waterline
LJWVjGs.description: Tidal pool on the atlantic seaboard with potential for a few different waterlines
LJWVjGs.anchorsInfo: Big sharp granite boulders, bring lots of padding and beefy slings

Yoon6QR.name: Aster's Cold Feet
Yoon6QR.description: This is a great little waterline that a group of us established on our hike to Pear Lake. This line is slightly difficult due to the high movement of the water. The reason that I'm posting this on here is because it's a nice line you can rig while also enjoying many beautiful views along the way. Since the length of the line is only 90 feet a primitive kit is more than enough. Trust me, you don't want to take more than a primitive kit on a long hike such as this one.
Yoon6QR.anchorsInfo: One solid tree on one end and a bushy trunk sticking out of the rock on the other end. Take slings or webbing in order to anchor to these trees.
Yoon6QR.accessInfo: From the Wolverton area in SEKI, take the lakes trail to pear lake. Along the way you will see signs that point to Aster Lake. Hike down to the lake where you will find this spot.

hFaSlDD.name: Kokkinis line
hFaSlDD.description: Its not that good, but if you stay in the hotel next to it, it gets the job done
hFaSlDD.anchorsInfo: Natural anchors on stones, i used 2,5-3m spanset on both sides

_5_L5Ty.name: Unknown -
_5_L5Ty.description: From the Pole to an old Pier construction
_5_L5Ty.anchorsInfo: Big Pole in Water. Smaller poles from old Pier construction

Mfh3vot.description: Funny waterline over the icy water of a beautiful lake. Pleasant way to combine it with a highline or alpine routes.
Mfh3vot.anchorsInfo: One 12mm wedge bolt both side. You need hangers.
Mfh3vot.accessInfo: The approach of base camp Uzunkol takes 3-4 hours.

KcM4CW9.name: Wertachbrücke Wellenburger Allee
KcM4CW9.description: West anchor is a tree, east anchor is a pillar on the bridge
KcM4CW9.anchorsInfo: west anchor is a tree, east anchor is a pillar on the bridge

2yUgDzV.name: Ambolo
2yUgDzV.description: Are natural anchors, you need 3,5m of sling in each side. It's in beach "Cala Ambolo"
2yUgDzV.anchorsInfo: Are natural anchors, you need 3,5m of sling in each side.

fwdeaoX.name: Little Consolation
fwdeaoX.description: A lot of fun in the sun, and makes a good beginner line. It's impossible to keep the line out of the water but it provides a challenge and is a bit more exciting than the other options around.
fwdeaoX.anchorsInfo: First post past the benches and the post (not the railing) at the top of the stairs. Keeping the static side by the benches will keep your tension system dry, and there's a little spot underneath the stairs to sit and set it up.

x_HUdmY.name: Star system
x_HUdmY.description:
waterline with "no fall down allowed at the end "
2 bolt rigging in each size, but near the sea it gonna be old !

O3E_Md6.name: Rusty Bolt
O3E_Md6.description: Nice little waterline for beginners and all those who don't mind the lack of sag in the line.
O3E_Md6.anchorsInfo: Old, rusty bolts on both sides. IMPORTANT: they are touched by water so check them before rigging the line. There is no other place to attach backup of the anchors.
O3E_Md6.accessInfo: To reach the spot, drive or walk to Algamena Chica. Then you need to take a few minute walk. Very easy ascent to the line.

uZgfbcd.description: i prefer to go slacklining on the morning because of the crowd on the afternoon

t0eBQM5.name: Pier 60
t0eBQM5.description: Be mindful that it is a public beach and there might be kids around and there are lifeguards that are within eye site. I used 2 inch flat rope around the pillars of the pier
t0eBQM5.anchorsInfo: I used 2 inch flat rope around the pillars of the pier

3uVx5jH.description: Deep water underneath, more less clean.

9ym0vQX.name: Roberto Warriors
9ym0vQX.description: This is a waterline located in Roberto Barrios Waterfalls the middle of the jungle at 45 minute from Palenque, Chiapas.
9ym0vQX.anchorsInfo: Natural Anchors, you just need ropes or slings to anchor to the big trees, there are many more spots that you can find
9ym0vQX.accessInfo: Climbing the trees that are in the edge of the river

ywOFS1K.restriction:
partial: Due to sensitive relationship with the Verbund (owner of the lake)  highliners need a membership at Sportverein slackline.at for an insurance. 
Please contact slackline.at, before highlining there!
ywOFS1K.anchorsInfo: Waterline: Bolts M12 without Hangers- large root, Midline: Tree- Tree

GuZ3Mke.name: Currumbin Waterline
GuZ3Mke.description: Fun line in a lovely water hole :)

bSPNnGE.description: Beware of rowers. It is their training ground and you should let them pass by. A minimum rigging height of 3 m is recommended.

Q6XaRVS.description: Nice 30-40m waterline, far away from any road.
Q6XaRVS.anchorsInfo: Tree anchors on both sides. 2*3m spansets was enough, doable with 2*2m.
Q6XaRVS.accessInfo: First anchor (west side) is pretty to access, right next from the track. Second anchor is harder, you have to continue down the track and make your way through vegetation to access the big tree next to the water (see photo). Prefer crossing the line by swimming.

_4HlQjW.name: Le port du Bono
_4HlQjW.description: Slack facile à poser entre 2 bites d’amarrage, uniquement à marée haute (sinon il s'agit d'une vaseline et non plus d'une waterline). accessible le soir seulement en raison de l'activité portuaire en journée

UlnfBzi.name: El pantanu sempre mola nanu
UlnfBzi.description: People in the bar were really kind. Planty of possibilities depending on the water level.

8YlnxFr.description:
Swimming is forbidden but i put my lines every summer, no problem =)
Possibility to rig another lines with the same start place : 70m, 90m until 150/200m !. Trees

w_D8gxP.name: Thermaline
w_D8gxP.description: Waterline near the open access, warm up in the great public thermal fountain (up to 41°C?), and become a member of the club bagno popolare to support public access to thermal water
w_D8gxP.anchorsInfo:
North side: top of the handrail, install a V shape anchor with two attachement points on the handrail, PADDING, with a base of about 50cm to spread the load. Only in the CENTER of a handrail segment, they are each about 2-3m long. (This is a calculated, approved mounting type for peak loads of 10 kN, walking tension 2-3kN, this means high sag only).
Southern side: bring a ladder to climb down and install a bar beyond the drainage hole, pass some static cord through the drainage hole (picture).
w_D8gxP.accessInfo: Bring some tagline to cross the nearby bridge

_IYKmbD.name: Malcesine
_IYKmbD.description: To built this line you have to climb a medium difficult boulder over the wather on the south side of the bay .

4gy2Zhj.name: La petite des Palabres
4gy2Zhj.description: Petite ligne en diagonale, sur la 3ème piscine en partant du parking de la librairie.
4gy2Zhj.anchorsInfo: Ancrage sur rocher d'un côté,  arbre de l'autre
4gy2Zhj.accessInfo:
Parking au centre de Colombières, départ de la randonnée. 
Peu de places.

5kV1yyZ.name: Waterlines Hagenwörthstraße
5kV1yyZ.description: A couple of lines can be rigged here.

tU3V-wY.name: Reedends
tU3V-wY.description: Beautiful waterline at scenic park with many water birds in the middle of the city. Easy to rig. Since both shores get deep very vast it is more safe to walk most of the distance unlike other line spot here.

wrHZKIN.name: Pyramides de Vidy
wrHZKIN.description: An a-frame is stored at the nearby hangar, 2.5m high pillar is on the rocks  near the anchor, key is required, contact lausanne slackline WhatsUp group or Facebook.

Aaws470.name: Poseidon
Aaws470.description: Line between two rocks close to a popular cliff dive spot
Aaws470.accessInfo: Easly reachable by car, bicycle or on foot

rChVlpk.name: Long Load Weir
rChVlpk.description:
Waterline rigged off the weir, either at water level from the wooden posts or
from the weir to the higher posts..

-y--NuN.name: La roche péréandre
-y--NuN.anchorsInfo: Two trees each side, be careful there is a rock on the far side make sure you have sling protector
-y--NuN.accessInfo: From the road get down on the walking way to the river, trees are pretty obvious.

ep61HQ1.name: Swanpool Stacks
ep61HQ1.description: High tide spot as there's some shallow reef at lower tide, sharp rocks too but a great line

ouNVm4s.name: Coco
ouNVm4s.description: En plus de cette endroit ,il y en a partout autour.....possible de faire toute sorte de slackline

xBUbZnx.name: Waterline at Menzer-Werft-Platz, Geesthacht / Elbe
xBUbZnx.description: The slackline can be attached to the pier.

3uoDN_r.name: Laguinho
3uoDN_r.description:
you have contact with club Piratini.

address
Av. Transversal, 645 - Orvisa, Charqueadas - RS, 96745-000

RpQ6BLX.name: Multi lines du lac
RpQ6BLX.description: Spot entre 30m et 100m possible, au calme (loin des plagistes) mais vite à l'ombre en fin de journée.

hdaG6AX.name: Kokina Vraxia
hdaG6AX.description: The place is called red rocks because of the red color of them ( kokkina vraxia).
hdaG6AX.anchorsInfo: from the one side you can loop the rock but the another side you have to drill new anchors every summer becouse of the sea...

4CqPcJH.anchorsInfo: 1 plaquette de chaque coté sur un spit de 10

3v7w3NP.name: Savska boldrca
3v7w3NP.description: Beautiful riverline between two glacier boulders.
3v7w3NP.anchorsInfo:
Tension side: 1x 10mm expansion bolt without hanger; 1m spanset
Static side: 1x 10mm expansion bolt without hanger; 2m spanset
3v7w3NP.accessInfo: Park at Tina raft and go across the bridge. Then by the river bank.

mzFQd-Q.description:
Swimming is forbidden but i put my lines every summer, no problem =)
Possibility to rig another lines with the same start place : 70m, 90m until 150/200m !. Trees

WaI9TtF.name: Squaw Creek Waterline
WaI9TtF.description: Beautiful waterline spot over a calm creek. Have built up far side for nice seating and hammock spots. Very easy set up. Make sure to park by the volleyball courts and walk the gravel road back. Property owner doesn't mind but respect the land and don't drive over it.

_9bYO5B.name: Carnon Plage
_9bYO5B.description: One A frame needed on the beach side
_9bYO5B.anchorsInfo: Use long slings around the rock blocs.

PRisAF9.name: Bains des Pâquis
PRisAF9.description: a nice water line for people that like an audience
PRisAF9.anchorsInfo: on the building side the anchor is a wall mounted ring backed up by a rope leading on the roof once rigged the line is about 2m high on the building side so care needs to be taken to avoid people interacting with the line while someone is walking it. On the pier side the anchors are the big wooden pillars.

NeLqwbv.name: Beginner Line
NeLqwbv.description: A short waterline, not too high up, that is perfect for getting used to the change in mindset that Waterlines require.
NeLqwbv.accessInfo: accessible from land, but a boat or SUP would help.

R0WQ0Ov.name: Cita pallars
R0WQ0Ov.description: Waterline sag depends of water level

_dXGjeL.name: Volimo Hrvatsku
_dXGjeL.description: A very nice and quiet place with deep crystal clear water, a sea mattress is recommended to make rigging and approaching the anchors easier
_dXGjeL.anchorsInfo: there are a lot of crack on the rocks on both side that can be used to place natural anchors - we used a rope with ties in one edge as anchor for low tension line - the rock is sharp so padding would be a good idea.
_dXGjeL.accessInfo: Around 30 min walk from the parking on the main road, a shortcut can be made by parking next to the abandoned building on the side of the road above the spot and walking straight down (a steep walk).

5RUE2Yb.description: Very nice line, with deep clean water
5RUE2Yb.anchorsInfo: I put it on some big pipe like in the middle of channel both sides are same
5RUE2Yb.accessInfo: Next to swimming zone..and nobody distrub me because there are no swimmers

kBqDB4l.name: Anse de Ster-Ouen
kBqDB4l.description: Difficult to fix the line and must take care of the tide. But really interesting and beautiful
kBqDB4l.anchorsInfo: The anchors are : A hole in the rock by one side and a strong metal bar to the other side
kBqDB4l.accessInfo: Easy to join by a path

FnZci-W.name: Bird Poo Rock
FnZci-W.description: The line is at Meelup Beach - From the carpark look right and you can clearly see the rock. You can rig a shorter line here but the one shown in the picture is the best one. It has natural anchors which you can use a span set around. You can only walk around 2/3 of the line as it's over shallow water and rocks but if you are confident then you can walk the whole thing. Bring some short rope to hang as a wind dampener and also as a way to climb back onto the line so you don't have to climb on the rock every time you fall off.

DW1ZFta.restriction:
partial: Due to sensitive relationship with the Verbund (owner of the lake)  highliners need a membership at Sportverein slackline.at for an insurance. 
Please contact slackline.at, before highlining there!

5pOwKf2.name: Mont Chateau
5pOwKf2.description:
Please respect the land. Take out all trash. Respect the authority of the folks working at the West Virginia Economic Survey. Do not park in neighborhoods or restaurants. 

This is a great place to rig a waterline. Note, am able to touch anywhere under the line, but the water comes up to my chin in places (I am 5 foot 10 inches). This has never been an issue for me if you rig the line low enough, the water should break your fall. Use this link to check the water level of the lake:

https://waterdata.usgs.gov/monitoring-location/USGS-03071590/#dataTypeId=continuous-62614-0&period=P30D&showMedian=true&showFieldMeasurements=true

It is recommended to only rig when water levels are around or greater than 869ft. This cove is a common place to hang out and drink, so watch out from broken glass. Take a bag and carry out some trash and have fun noodling.
5pOwKf2.anchorsInfo: Both recommended trees are near the large rocks, on the side of the waterfall.
5pOwKf2.accessInfo:
There is a parking lot at the address:

1 Mont Chateau Rd, Morgantown, WV 26508

NOTE THAT THEY CLOSE THE GATE AT 5pm ON WEEKDAYS, AND THE PARKING LOT IS CLOSED ON WEEKENDS. It is recommended to park alternatively at the parking lot located at:

39.66797392743181, -79.85931247296381

From here you can walk along the road to the first address (about a twenty minute walk). The access trail can be seen on SlackMap. Walk around the south side (closest to the river) of the "West Virginia Geological and Economical Survey" building and follow the sidewalk around the north side of the "Activities Building" where you will find the trail.

0xcnpvK.name: Cascada 4 encantos
0xcnpvK.description:
Ubicación no precisa (se necesita una guía desde termales)
Lugar hermoso en la jungla
Mucha profundidad en el agua (mas de 3 metros)
0xcnpvK.anchorsInfo: Unos árboles de un lado, ancraje en las rocas del otro lado

fyhJEZK.name: Cormoline
fyhJEZK.description: Ligne éphémère quand le niveau d'eau est au plus haut.
fyhJEZK.anchorsInfo: Arbuste + A frame côté vailhés / arbre imposant en face

zHyIsd7.name: Humble Pie
zHyIsd7.description: This beautiful line lies along the Snake River, in the bottom of a vast basalt canyon. The water, craggy surroundings and shrub trees are reminiscent of a Mediterranean landscape. There is also a small climbing area within a stones throw. The line is 75 meters long and 2.5 meters above the water. First rigged on 7/15/20. Still awaiting clean walk!
zHyIsd7.anchorsInfo: Wrap large boulders on either end. Bolts are anticipated to be installed in the near future. Bring plenty of padding for the length of the anchors that are in contact with the boulders. Until Bolted anchors are installed, Approximately 50 feet of rope is required to lasso the SE boulder, and approximately 20 feet of rope is required to lasso the NW boulder.
zHyIsd7.accessInfo: 1 Minute Approach from public parking area, free of charge.

ELEGESg.name: Mane Bogad
ELEGESg.description: Étang tout en longueur avec un sentier tout autour et des arbres juste derrière en guise de points de fixation, plusieurs longueur possible de 30 à 50m environ. Attention au passage au dessus de la berge, 1m50 de fond au milieu, beaucoup de vase!

Xfd403a.name: Coco's birthday
Xfd403a.description: Petite ligne sympathique. Pas facile à marée montante.
Xfd403a.anchorsInfo: Plaquettes des deux côtés. Pas besoin de monter sur les blockhaus si vous êtes plusieurs.
Xfd403a.accessInfo: Parking gratuit pour le moment. Privilégier le hors saison pokr ne pas gêner le passage. Installation à marée basse.

udPjAUs.name: Hawea Waterline
udPjAUs.description: A short waterline bolted between the old bridge supports. The bolts may be chopped as they are a tripping hazard for swimmers.
udPjAUs.anchorsInfo: Two bolts per side, may be hidden under rocks so look around. Byo hangars and nuts. Both sides need some kind of A frame and the height needed will depend on lake level.
udPjAUs.accessInfo: Pull in on the side of SH6, just after the first corner after isthmus peak trail head

ERAD1FD.name: Tamarit
ERAD1FD.description: All natural, got a photonfrom the tension side, bthe statick one has a lot of options. We used a hole in the rock. Use tons of protection, the rock is very sharp
ERAD1FD.anchorsInfo: All natural, got a photonfrom the tension side, bthe statick one has a lot of options. We used a hole in the rock. Use tons of protection, the rock is very sharp.

t3ZMiHb.name: El Juncal
t3ZMiHb.description: On the left side natural anchor (3m sling & imagination) on another side 2 bolts

MHIpw3d.anchorsInfo: Wrap the bridge (not the hand rail!) and the lock (not the rusty equipment!)

Q_MhZbI.name: Borg line
Q_MhZbI.anchorsInfo: Naturel, ancrages rochers de chaque côté

L3x5mEn.name: Megalodon
L3x5mEn.description: Holds for MMS on each side
L3x5mEn.anchorsInfo: Holds for MMS on each side

G_POrCo.name: 4i20
G_POrCo.description: Linha de Jesus, andar sobre a agua
G_POrCo.anchorsInfo: Lado A 3 pinos P titanio, lado B parabolt e chapeleta, necessarios conectores
G_POrCo.accessInfo: Trilha do Gravatá, lado B pelo costão sentido Praia Mole

x8JG-U9.description: 1 spit de chaque coter avec une platine
x8JG-U9.anchorsInfo: 1 spit de chaque coter avec une platine .

2bF9tAZ.name: Waterline Humaita , Descoberto por Edney Junior e Lucas Rest. By: Edney Junior

i7cHVrT.description: very beautiful but you'll have to walk waist deep cause the anchors are too low for the length. Maybe higher and shorter options on the west side of this one but they will need creative rigging.
i7cHVrT.anchorsInfo:
north side: wood in crack, 5m sling is perfect in bucket configuration
south: a bomber moorning peg for boats (round with eye)

aP-EsnU.name: Pont Medieval de Llierca
aP-EsnU.description: Dos chapas en el lado derecho, una chapa mal apretada y un parabolt sin chapa en el lado izquierdo (si vuelvo meteré chapas nuevas)
aP-EsnU.anchorsInfo: Dos chapas en el lado derecho, una chapa mal apretada y un parabolt sin chapa en el lado izquierdo (si vuelvo meteré chapas nuevas).

GNGrwkk.name: ile de sein
GNGrwkk.description:
from 20m (from the dock to the breakwater) to 60m between the 2 breakwaters. 
might be difficult to install due to boat traffic and park!

rN3ARqV.name: Consensual Send
rN3ARqV.description: Water level here varies by about 2-3 ft throughout the year. Late in the summer the water is only chest deep near the tension side (still plenty deep in middle and static side). Just don't pencil dive!! Have fun! . 2 bolts per side, quick links ar...
rN3ARqV.anchorsInfo: 2 bolts per side, quick links are fixed to hangers so either a short static rope threaded thru the links, or short spansets with biners are appropriate.
rN3ARqV.accessInfo:
Static anchor: Down climb a chossy cliff west of the bridge, traverse right and look for the bolts at about head level from the water. 

Tension side: walk down the trail from the parking area, stay left and traverse the smooth rocks, bolts are at head level from the water.

Bb11qQ1.description: We use the base of a single tree for the tensioning side anchor and equalize off three smaller trees for the static anchor
Bb11qQ1.anchorsInfo: We use the base of a single tree for the tensioning side anchor and equalize off three smaller trees for the static anchor.

rmf6Z-a.name: Sans faire d'histoire
rmf6Z-a.description:
pretty obvious rig. girth hitch on the tree which has the electrical box underneath (you can use it for access). tension on the other side, on the first one of the taller pillars of the jetty.

installation assez évidente. tête d'alouette sur l'arbre qui a la boîte électrique à son pied (qu'on peut utiliser pour accéder aux branches si besoin). tendre de l'autre côté, sur le premier des plus hauts piliers de la jetée.

JI5UbYS.name: Big falls line
JI5UbYS.description: I wouldn't recommend using our tensions side anchor. I'm pretty sure it shifted during tensioning but I decided to roll with it.an alternative anchor would be wrapping the whole Boulder if you have enough static rope or using the surrounding trees.
JI5UbYS.anchorsInfo: Solid trees on the static side and a Boulder on the tension side

ZRWq9iH.name: Pond People
ZRWq9iH.description: A spring fed pond that stays colder than the surrounding river flows. A bit muddy, but about 8ft deep once you're about 5ft out from the shore. Keep an eye out for snapping turtles, we saw a huge guy floating around when we rolled up. Approach from lock 12 parking lot, and look for a faint trail off to the right when you hit the the small rock flow about 0.2 miles in, this will take you to the pond. Approaching from the south involves some very unpleasant bushwacking.
ZRWq9iH.anchorsInfo: Large trees up and back off either bank. Unfortunately adds about 6feet of height off of the water.

FU2fnMS.name: Naabbrücke Naapspitz
FU2fnMS.description: South anchor is an easy to climb tree, north anchor can be chosen at any length between 30-100m at the handrail of the bridge
FU2fnMS.anchorsInfo: South anchor is an easy to climb tree, north anchor can be chosen at any length between 30-100m at the handrail of the bridge

jA5WAup.description: Fun and adventurous waterline! Totally safe considering deep water beneath most of the line.
jA5WAup.anchorsInfo: Natural anchors around granite formations on each side. Both sides include rock formation which create a kind of mushroom around which the slings are attached. Due to high friction, padding required around each rock.
jA5WAup.accessInfo: Most comfortable access and transportation of equipment by canoe (drop canoes at Levante or Ponente beach and paddle around Capo Testa), although the spot is a short distance from the car park near the lighthouse.

thdyyxP.name: Back to the roots
thdyyxP.description:
Giola is a natural pool and a famous point to jump from 8m higher to the water.
This is because at high summer is to much people there.
I put the line at end of September ;)
thdyyxP.anchorsInfo:
Both anchorages are natural.
Stone protection is needed.
thdyyxP.accessInfo: With car to Giola + 5min walk to the spot

8o1ZF7b.description: Ancrage 1: Un gros anneau se trouve dans la roche, utilisation facile. Il est un peu loin du bord, donc on doit protéger la ligne ou avoir de long spanset. Deux lignes partent de cet endroit. Ancrage 2: On retrouve un arbre de l'autre bord vers la...
8o1ZF7b.anchorsInfo: Ancrage 1: Un gros anneau se trouve dans la roche, utilisation facile. Il est un peu loin du bord, donc on doit protéger la ligne ou avoir de long spanset. Deux lignes partent de cet endroit. Ancrage 2: On retrouve un arbre de l'autre bord vers la gauche à 5 m du bord de la falaise. La ligne est très haute par rapport à l'eau.

2qI8Tdg.description: waterline de 65m, possibilité plus. quelques ronces sur l'autre berge, les troncs d'arbres sont bien caché derrière les branches mais ça se fait bien
2qI8Tdg.anchorsInfo: Des arbres des 2 cotés de la rivière
2qI8Tdg.accessInfo: acces par la rive droite du loch, se garer un peu avant le barrage (sur la gauche en dessous un chemin barré aux voitures. Puis prendre ce chemin a pied tout droit, dépasser le barrage, toujours tout droit, le chemin fini par redescendre sur un petit spot confortable ou les jeunes aiment se retrouver pour sauter des arbres. (5min de marche en tout)

F5e3QML.description:
Natural anchors,one two 2m round slings 
Primitive sistem
Other lines possible
F5e3QML.anchorsInfo:
Natural anchors,one two 2m round slings 
Primitive sistem
Other lines possible

QiMclgp.description: Short sling for anchoring to the bridge.

BOTXE-e.name: Un pasito a la vez
BOTXE-e.description: Its a mid waterline, 80 m long, safe to walk only 50 m
BOTXE-e.anchorsInfo: one side aguaje palm tree - you need a big ladder to access this is the static side. the other side its sangre de grado amazonian tree, this side is in a bit of hill, easy to access, also need a ladder but small one will be good this is the dinamic side and were you access to the line.
BOTXE-e.accessInfo: just one side you have to be patience with the big ladder, then the rest is easy, its better to cross a tagline first them pass the webbing

G0RJko_.name: Balkanoid
G0RJko_.description: Sand on the shore, deep water 5m from the shore

TTS0PiI.anchorsInfo: Principalement des ancrage en plaquettes, quelques possibilité d'ancrage naturelles.
TTS0PiI.accessInfo: Accès: Garez vous vers l’arrêt de bus avant le virage, puis déscendez un petit chemin en face jusqu'à la rivière.

WZ2eJ8Q.name: Santa Maria Caves Waterline
WZ2eJ8Q.description: This waterline is sitting on another fun diving spot, so if you don't mind unfriendly rocks pocking at your feet the line is yours to rig.
WZ2eJ8Q.anchorsInfo: You'll need slings or padding cause the anchors are sharp rocks!
WZ2eJ8Q.accessInfo: a trail leads from the Santa maria bay camping area

7PE490s.name: Pappelgrun
7PE490s.description:
pipe in the water!!
but able to see it

6vKOeWD.name: Eierbal
6vKOeWD.description:
A waterline spot over canal near Garmerwolde, Groningen
it is just next to bridge so you can easly cross ans set up without getting wet. One tree is next to one house, please ring the bell and ask nicely for permission. The family is nice,  they are going to let you set up

3oGJ5Se.name: Baidarė
3oGJ5Se.anchorsInfo: X shaped double tree on the far side. Simple tree among the bush on the tensioning side.

KYS6gnV.anchorsInfo:
short- beginner friendly short waterlines (different lengths possible between 20-50m more less)
natural anchors (trees)

wAo_DKu.name: Rope Swing Waterline
wAo_DKu.description: Normally rigged from a car's tow hitch, redirected over the barrier and to the tree. This does stop people using the rope swing so only come here when it's quiet. You'll need to lift the line for paddleboarders and kayakers.

8WDLPCW.name: LSP Waterline
8WDLPCW.description: Variety of trees for rigging waterlines across Horsetooth. Bring towels and try to be considerate of boaters

9MiJ5gV.name: Golddiggings waterlines.
9MiJ5gV.description: Bolted waterlines in old quarry.  Popular for swimming/jumping in summer.  Check depths near the prow. Cold water

DDopccD.name: Tulava Jurnjava
DDopccD.description: Beatiful landscape, biodiversity at its finest. Please clean after yourself 🙏
DDopccD.anchorsInfo: You hug to huge stones with slings, on one side, be aware that the slings could slip away so you should reinforce it so that it doesnt slip away :D
DDopccD.accessInfo:
Parking is at: https://maps.app.goo.gl/SThRWCKVEYHg5Khf9?g_st=ac

The camp is wherever you want it to be. We had ours just beneath the highline. There were cca 40 people (mostly climbers :P)

CyaqKMB.name: Ósmy dzień majówki
CyaqKMB.description: hajek pomiędzy turnią z krokiem a wielbładem
CyaqKMB.anchorsInfo:
wielbład- obite 2 pkt z prawej strony wyższego garba wielbłąda patrząc z dołu. backup do drzewa z tyłu.

turnia z krokiem- full natural sporo zawiesi, wyobraźnia nie zna granic

aPwFqQm.name: Flat'line
aPwFqQm.restriction: none: Respect Norwegian law and nature!
aPwFqQm.anchorsInfo: Anchor to trees with a few different possibilities
aPwFqQm.accessInfo: Walking distance is about 500 meters from free parking

fXdLJLX.name: Springline
fXdLJLX.restriction: partial: There is roaming freedom, but vehicles are prohibited and blocked with gates

6V_lDN9.name: Coimbra Highline
6V_lDN9.restriction: full: The line is in private property and is from the responsability of the Coimbra Slackline Team, please contact us first if you want to come join us
6V_lDN9.anchorsInfo: One Big tree on one side, 3 bases of trees the other side
6V_lDN9.accessInfo: You can park your car, 50m from the line
